First, existing implementations on platforms like Pepper often rely on cascaded Speech-to-Text (STT)->LLM->Text-to-Speech (TTS) pipelines, resulting in high latency and the loss of paralinguistic information. Second, most implementations fail to fully leverage the LLM's capabilities for multimodal perception and agentic control. We present an open-source Android framework for the Pepper robot that addresses these limitations through two key innovations. First, we integrate end-to-end Speech-to-Speech (S2S) models to achieve low-latency interaction while preserving paralinguistic cues and enabling adaptive intonation. Second, we implement extensive Function Calling capabilities that elevate the LLM to an agentic planner, orchestrating robot actions (navigation, gaze control, tablet interaction) and integrating diverse multimodal feedback (vision, touch, system state). The framework runs on the robot's tablet but can also be built to run on regular Android smartphones or tablets, decoupling development from robot hardware. This work provides the HRI community with a practical, extensible platform for exploring advanced LLM-driven embodied interaction.

</details>


### [475] [Does AI Homogenize Student Thinking? A Multi-Dimensional Analysis of Structural Convergence in AI-Augmented Essays](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21228)
*Keito Inoshita,Michiaki Omura,Tsukasa Yamanaka,Go Maeda,Kentaro Tsuji*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 研究发现AI辅助写作存在质量-同质化权衡：AI显著提升文章质量的同时导致结构多样性大幅降低，但提示策略可以逆转这种同质化效应


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然AI辅助写作已被广泛报道能提高文章质量，但其对学生思维结构多样性的影响尚未被探索。本研究旨在实证检验AI写作辅助是否会导致学生思维的同质化

Method: 分析了6,875篇文章，涵盖五个条件：纯人工、纯AI、以及三种人机协作提示策略。使用结构多样性分析、收敛目标分析等方法，量化评估不同维度上的变化

Result: 发现了质量-同质化权衡效应：质量大幅提升的同时，结构多样性显著降低。具体维度上，衔接结构方差损失70-78%，而视角多样性反而增加。AI增强的文章向AI结构模式收敛，但偏离人机轴线，表明部分替代与部分涌现并存。提示特异性能够逆转同质化，在论证深度上实现多样化

Conclusion: 同质化不是AI的固有属性，而是交互设计的函数。通过精心设计的提示策略，可以平衡质量提升与思维多样性，避免AI导致的学生思维同质化

Abstract: While AI-assisted writing has been widely reported to improve essay quality, its impact on the structural diversity of student thinking remains unexplored. Analyzing 6,875 essays across five conditions (Human-only, AI-only, and three Human+AI prompt strategies), we provide the first empirical evidence of a Quality-Homogenization Tradeoff, in which substantial quality gains co-occur with significant homogenization. The effect is dimension-specific: cohesion architecture lost 70-78% of its variance, whereas perspective plurality was diversified. Convergence target analysis further revealed that AI-augmented essays were pulled toward AI structural patterns yet deviated significantly from the Human-AI axis, indicating simultaneous partial replacement and partial emergence. Crucially, prompt specificity reversed homogenization into diversification on argument depth, demonstrating that homogenization is not an intrinsic property of AI but a function of interaction design.

</details>


### [476] [MIND: Multi-agent inference for negotiation dialogue in travel planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21696)
*Hunmin Do,Taejun Yoon,Kiyong Jung*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: MIND框架通过心智理论增强多智能体辩论，在旅行规划等复杂利益协调任务中实现更有效的共识构建，相比传统MAD方法在多个指标上显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多智能体辩论研究在协调复杂利益相关者（如旅行规划）方面的效果尚未充分探索，需要开发能模拟真实共识构建的框架来处理异质性偏好。

Method: 提出MIND框架，基于心智理论引入战略评估阶段，从语言细微差别中推断对手意愿度，准确率达90.2%，用于模拟旅行者间的协商对话。

Result: MIND在High-w Hit上提升20.5%，辩论命中率提升30.7%，LLM-as-a-Judge评估显示在理性度(68.8%)和流畅度(72.4%)上超越基线，总体胜率68.3%。

Conclusion: MIND能有效建模人类协商动态，产生有说服力的共识，为复杂利益协调的多智能体系统提供了新方法。

Abstract: While Multi-Agent Debate (MAD) research has advanced, its efficacy in coordinating complex stakeholder interests such as travel planning remains largely unexplored. To bridge this gap, we propose MIND (Multi-agent Inference for Negotiation Dialogue), a framework designed to simulate realistic consensus-building among travelers with heterogeneous preferences. Grounded in the Theory of Mind (ToM), MIND introduces a Strategic Appraisal phase that infers opponent willingness (w) from linguistic nuances with 90.2% accuracy. Experimental results demonstrate that MIND outperforms traditional MAD frameworks, achieving a 20.5% improvement in High-w Hit and a 30.7% increase in Debate Hit-Rate, effectively prioritizing high-stakes constraints. Furthermore, qualitative evaluations via LLM-as-a-Judge confirm that MIND surpasses baselines in Rationality (68.8%) and Fluency (72.4%), securing an overall win rate of 68.3%. These findings validate that MIND effectively models human negotiation dynamics to derive persuasive consensus.

</details>


### [477] [Compensating Visual Insufficiency with Stratified Language Guidance for Long-Tail Class Incremental Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21708)
*Xi Wang,Xu Yang,Donghao Sun,Cheng Deng*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用语言知识解决长尾类增量学习问题的方法，通过构建分层语言树并结合自适应语言指导和语义对齐指导，有效缓解数据不平衡和灾难性遗忘问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长尾类增量学习面临双重挑战：尾部类别样本稀缺导致学习困难，以及在持续演化的不平衡数据分布下加剧灾难性遗忘。现有方法难以同时解决这两个问题。

Method: 1) 分析LT CIL数据分布，指导大语言模型生成分层语言树，从粗到细层次化组织语义信息；2) 提出分层自适应语言指导，使用可学习权重融合多尺度语义表示，动态调整尾部类别的监督；3) 提出分层对齐语言指导，利用语言树的结构稳定性约束优化，增强语义视觉对齐。

Result: 在多个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，该方法达到了最先进的性能。

Conclusion: 通过利用语言知识的丰富性和可扩展性，提出的方法有效解决了长尾类增量学习中的数据不平衡和灾难性遗忘问题，为这一挑战性任务提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: Long-tail class incremental learning (LT CIL) remains highly challenging because the scarcity of samples in tail classes not only hampers their learning but also exacerbates catastrophic forgetting under continuously evolving and imbalanced data distributions. To tackle these issues, we exploit the informativeness and scalability of language knowledge. Specifically, we analyze the LT CIL data distribution to guide large language models (LLMs) in generating a stratified language tree that hierarchically organizes semantic information from coarse to fine grained granularity. Building upon this structure, we introduce stratified adaptive language guidance, which leverages learnable weights to merge multi-scale semantic representations, thereby enabling dynamic supervisory adjustment for tail classes and alleviating the impact of data imbalance. Furthermore, we introduce stratified alignment language guidance, which exploits the structural stability of the language tree to constrain optimization and reinforce semantic visual alignment, thereby alleviating catastrophic forgetting. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state of the art performance.

</details>


### [478] [Future-Interactions-Aware Trajectory Prediction via Braid Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22035)
*Caio Azevedo,Stefano Sabatini,Sascha Hornauer,Fabien Moutarde*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于辫子理论的辅助任务，通过预测多智能体轨迹之间的交叉模式来增强联合轨迹预测性能，在三个数据集上显著提升了联合预测指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶车辆需要准确预测周围多个交互智能体的未来行为。现有方法要么计算成本高，要么依赖启发式方法标记多智能体行为类型。辫子理论提供了一种精确描述多智能体行为的数学表示，但之前的工作未能充分利用其表达能力。

Method: 提出了一种新颖的辅助任务——辫子预测，与轨迹预测任务并行执行。通过将智能体之间的边分类为辫子表示中的正确交叉类型，该任务能够增强模型的社会意识。这种方法在训练和推理时几乎不增加额外复杂度。

Result: 在三个独立数据集上，该简单辅助任务显著改善了联合预测指标。辫子预测任务使模型具备未来意图意识，从而产生更准确的联合预测。

Conclusion: 充分利用辫子理论的表达能力并将其用于条件化轨迹预测，可以显著提升多智能体联合预测性能，同时保持计算效率。辫子预测作为一种辅助任务，有效增强了模型的社会意识和未来意图理解能力。

Abstract: To safely operate, an autonomous vehicle must know the future behavior of a potentially high number of interacting agents around it, a task often posed as multi-agent trajectory prediction. Many previous attempts to model social interactions and solve the joint prediction task either add extensive computational requirements or rely on heuristics to label multi-agent behavior types. Braid theory, in contrast, provides a powerful exact descriptor of multi-agent behavior by projecting future trajectories into braids that express how trajectories cross with each other over time; a braid then corresponds to a specific mode of coordination between the multiple agents in the future. In past work, braids have been used lightly to reason about interacting agents and restrict the attention window of predicted agents. We show that leveraging more fully the expressivity of the braid representation and using it to condition the trajectories themselves leads to even further gains in joint prediction performance, with negligible added complexity either in training or at inference time. We do so by proposing a novel auxiliary task, braid prediction, done in parallel with the trajectory prediction task. By classifying edges between agents into their correct crossing types in the braid representation, the braid prediction task is able to imbue the model with improved social awareness, which is reflected in joint predictions that more closely adhere to the actual multi-agent behavior. This simple auxiliary task allowed us to obtain significant improvements in joint metrics on three separate datasets. We show how the braid prediction task infuses the model with future intention awareness, leading to more accurate joint predictions. Code is available at github.com/caiocj1/traj-pred-braid-theory.

</details>


### [479] [SpecTM: Spectral Targeted Masking for Trustworthy Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22097)
*Syed Usama Imtiaz,Mitra Nasr Azadani,Nasrin Alamdari*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出SpecTM（光谱目标掩码），一种物理信息掩码设计，用于地球观测基础模型预训练，通过跨光谱上下文重建目标波段，提升微囊藻毒素浓度预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前地球观测基础模型通常依赖随机掩码，缺乏明确的物理约束，这在指导公共卫生决策的预测模型中存在可信度限制。需要物理信息掩码设计来提升模型的可解释性和预测性能。

Method: 提出SpecTM物理信息掩码设计，鼓励在预训练期间从跨光谱上下文重建目标波段。开发了适应性多任务自监督学习框架，包括波段重建、生物光学指数推断和8天前时间预测，通过联合优化编码光谱内在表示。

Result: 在NASA PACE高光谱图像上评估微囊藻毒素浓度回归模型，SpecTM达到R²=0.695（当前周）和R²=0.620（8天前预测），分别比基线模型提升+34%和+99%。目标掩码比随机掩码提升+0.037 R²，在极端稀缺条件下具有2.2倍的标签效率优势。

Conclusion: SpecTM实现了跨地球观测领域的物理信息表示学习，提升了基础模型的可解释性，为物理约束的自监督学习提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Foundation models are now increasingly being developed for Earth observation (EO), yet they often rely on stochastic masking that do not explicitly enforce physics constraints; a critical trustworthiness limitation, in particular for predictive models that guide public health decisions. In this work, we propose SpecTM (Spectral Targeted Masking), a physics-informed masking design that encourages the reconstruction of targeted bands from cross-spectral context during pretraining. To achieve this, we developed an adaptable multi-task (band reconstruction, bio-optical index inference, and 8-day-ahead temporal prediction) self-supervised learning (SSL) framework that encodes spectrally intrinsic representations via joint optimization, and evaluated it on a downstream microcystin concentration regression model using NASA PACE hyperspectral imagery over Lake Erie. SpecTM achieves R^2 = 0.695 (current week) and R^2 = 0.620 (8-day-ahead) predictions surpassing all baseline models by (+34% (0.51 Ridge) and +99% (SVR 0.31)) respectively. Our ablation experiments show targeted masking improves predictions by +0.037 R^2 over random masking. Furthermore, it outperforms strong baselines with 2.2x superior label efficiency under extreme scarcity. SpecTM enables physics-informed representation learning across EO domains and improves the interpretability of foundation models.

</details>


### [480] [MARCUS: An agentic, multimodal vision-language model for cardiac diagnosis and management](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22179)
*Jack W O'Sullivan,Mohammad Asadi,Lennart Elbe,Akshay Chaudhari,Tahoura Nedaee,Francois Haddad,Michael Salerno,Li Fe-Fei,Ehsan Adeli,Rima Arnaout,Euan A Ashley*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: MARCUS是一个用于心脏影像多模态解释的智能视觉语言系统，采用分层代理架构，在ECG、超声心动图和心脏MRI上超越前沿模型表现


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 心血管疾病是全球主要死因，但现有AI视觉语言模型仅限于单模态输入且缺乏交互性，需要能够综合解释多种心脏测试的系统

Method: 采用分层代理架构：特定模态的视觉语言专家模型（整合领域训练的视觉编码器和多阶段语言模型优化）+多模态协调器。训练数据包括1350万张图像和160万个专家标注问题

Result: 在内部（斯坦福）和外部（UCSF）测试中，ECG准确率87-91%，超声心动图67-86%，心脏MRI 85-88%，比前沿模型（GPT-5、Gemini 2.5）提升34-45%。多模态病例准确率70%，是前沿模型的近3倍

Conclusion: 领域特定的视觉编码器与代理协调器相结合能够实现多模态心脏影像解释，系统对幻象推理具有抵抗力，模型、代码和基准已开源

Abstract: Cardiovascular disease remains the leading cause of global mortality, with progress hindered by human interpretation of complex cardiac tests. Current AI vision-language models are limited to single-modality inputs and are non-interactive. We present MARCUS (Multimodal Autonomous Reasoning and Chat for Ultrasound and Signals), an agentic vision-language system for end-to-end interpretation of electrocardiograms (ECGs), echocardiograms, and cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMR) independently and as multimodal input. MARCUS employs a hierarchical agentic architecture comprising modality-specific vision-language expert models, each integrating domain-trained visual encoders with multi-stage language model optimization, coordinated by a multimodal orchestrator. Trained on 13.5 million images (0.25M ECGs, 1.3M echocardiogram images, 12M CMR images) and our novel expert-curated dataset spanning 1.6 million questions, MARCUS achieves state-of-the-art performance surpassing frontier models (GPT-5 Thinking, Gemini 2.5 Pro Deep Think). Across internal (Stanford) and external (UCSF) test cohorts, MARCUS achieves accuracies of 87-91% for ECG, 67-86% for echocardiography, and 85-88% for CMR, outperforming frontier models by 34-45% (P<0.001). On multimodal cases, MARCUS achieved 70% accuracy, nearly triple that of frontier models (22-28%), with 1.7-3.0x higher free-text quality scores. Our agentic architecture also confers resistance to mirage reasoning, whereby vision-language models derive reasoning from unintended textual signals or hallucinated visual content. MARCUS demonstrates that domain-specific visual encoders with an agentic orchestrator enable multimodal cardiac interpretation. We release our models, code, and benchmark open-source.

</details>


### [481] [Your Robot Will Feel You Now: Empathy in Robots and Embodied Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20200)
*Angelica Lim,Ö. Nilay Yalçin*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该论文回顾了人机交互和具身对话代理领域关于移情实现的研究，探讨了如何将传统多模态移情模型应用于当前基于语言的AI代理（如ChatGPT）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着ChatGPT等基于语言的AI代理的普及，需要借鉴传统人机交互和具身对话代理领域在移情实现方面的研究成果，为语言模型添加社交和情感智能。

Method: 文献综述方法，系统回顾人机交互和具身对话代理领域关于移情实现的研究，分析这些领域如何通过模仿人类和动物行为实现移情，以及探索机器特定类比的方式。

Result: 总结了传统多模态移情模型的研究成果，包括面部表情、身体语言、手势和语音等非语言线索的移情实现方法，为语言模型的情感智能提供参考框架。

Conclusion: 传统人机交互和具身对话代理领域的移情研究成果可以为当前基于语言的AI代理提供重要启示，帮助开发更具社交和情感智能的语言模型。

Abstract: The fields of human-robot interaction (HRI) and embodied conversational agents (ECAs) have long studied how empathy could be implemented in machines. One of the major drivers has been the goal of giving multimodal social and emotional intelligence to these artificially intelligent agents, which interact with people through facial expressions, body, gesture, and speech. What empathic behaviors and models have these fields implemented by mimicking human and animal behavior? In what ways have they explored creating machine-specific analogies? This chapter aims to review the knowledge from these studies, towards applying the lessons learned to today's ubiquitous, language-based agents such as ChatGPT.

</details>


### [482] [Exploring Teacher-Chatbot Interaction and Affect in Block-Based Programming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20211)
*Bahare Riahi,Ally Limke,Xiaoyi Tian,Viktoriia Storozhevykh,Sayali Patukale,Tahreem Yasir,Khushbu Singh,Jennifer Chiu,Nicholas lytle,Tiffany Barnes,Veronica Catete*

Main category: cs.CY

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 该研究探讨中学教师对LLM聊天机器人在编程教学中的看法，识别出三种教师类型（探索者、受挫者、混合型），并提出设计建议以支持教学。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI聊天机器人有潜力加速学习和教学，但如果没有深思熟虑的设计和支架支持，也可能产生反效果。研究旨在了解教师对基于大语言模型的聊天机器人在科学和计算思维活动中的看法。

Method: 对11组中学教师进行定性研究，分析他们在基于块的编程环境中使用聊天机器人的音频转录和交互数据，识别教师的不同类型和需求。

Result: 识别出三种教师类型：探索者（积极尝试）、受挫者（遇到困难）、混合型（两者兼有）。教师认为聊天机器人能培养提示技能和自信心，但也担心可能降低学习和批判性思维能力。

Conclusion: 提出关键设计建议：为聊天机器人引入提供支架支持、促进教师对聊天机器人功能的控制、建议聊天机器人的使用时机和方式，以支持中学编程活动中的教师和学习者。

Abstract: AI-based chatbots have the potential to accelerate learning and teaching, but may also have counterproductive consequences without thoughtful design and scaffolding. To better understand teachers' perspectives on large language model (LLM)-based chatbots, we conducted a study with 11 teams of middle school teachers using chatbots for a science and computational thinking activity within a block-based programming environment. Based on a qualitative analysis of audio transcripts and chatbot interactions, we propose three profiles: explorer, frustrated, and mixed, that reflect diverse scaffolding needs. In their discussions, we found that teachers perceived chatbot benefits such as building prompting skills and self-confidence alongside risks including potential declines in learning and critical thinking. Key design recommendations include scaffolding the introduction to chatbots, facilitating teacher control of chatbot features, and suggesting when and how chatbots should be used. Our contribution informs the design of chatbots to support teachers and learners in middle school coding activities.

</details>


### [483] [Inference Energy and Latency in AI-Mediated Education: A Learning-per-Watt Analysis of Edge and Cloud Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20223)
*Kushal Khemani*

Main category: cs.CY

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 研究比较了FP16和NF4量化在AI教学中的延迟-能耗-学习效果权衡，提出了学习每瓦特(LpW)新指标，发现量化效率高度依赖硬件和推理配置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI教学中即时反馈对学习效果至关重要，但现有研究很少关注其能耗和延迟成本。特别是在资源受限环境中，需要平衡教学质量和系统效率。

Method: 在NVIDIA T4 GPU上比较Microsoft Phi-3 Mini模型的FP16和NF4量化配置，使用500个教育提示覆盖5个中学学科，通过10名教师和3个前沿AI系统评估1000个响应的教学质量。

Result: NF4比FP16能耗更低(329J vs 369J)但延迟更高(13.4s vs 9.2s)，LpW指标显示FP16优势为1.33倍。禁用KV缓存时差距扩大到7.4倍，夸大了FP16优势。

Conclusion: 量化效率高度依赖硬件和推理配置，离线评估可能严重高估全精度优势，这对资源受限环境中的AI教学部署有重要影响。

Abstract: Immediate feedback is a foundational requirement of effective AI-mediated learning, yet the energy and latency costs of delivering it remain largely unexamined. This study investigates the latency-energy-learning trade-off in AI tutoring through an empirical comparison of two on-device inference configurations of Microsoft Phi-3 Mini (4k-instruct) on an NVIDIA T4 GPU: full-precision FP16 and 4-bit NormalFloat (NF4) quantisation. Both were evaluated under KV-cache-enabled inference across 500 educational prompts spanning five secondary school subject domains. Pedagogical quality was assessed for each of the 1000 generated responses by a hybrid panel of 10 Cambridge International teachers and three frontier AI systems using a four-dimension rubric. We introduce Learning-per-Watt (LpW), a novel metric quantifying pedagogical value per unit of energy over the learner's waiting window. Under realistic deployment, NF4 achieves lower per-inference energy than FP16 (329 J vs. 369 J) but higher latency (13.4 s vs. 9.2 s), yielding a modest FP16 advantage in LpW of 1.33x at a quality difference of 0.19 points. Under cache-disabled inference -- used in offline evaluation but absent from real deployments -- the gap widens to 7.4x, overstating the FP16 advantage by more than fivefold. Quantisation efficiency is hardware-dependent and inference-regime dependent, with significant implications for equitable AI tutoring deployment in low-resource settings.

</details>


### [484] [Generalized Discrete Diffusion from Snapshots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21342)
*Oussama Zekri,Théo Uscidda,Nicolas Boullé,Anna Korba*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: GDDS是一个统一的离散扩散建模框架，支持大型离散状态空间上的任意噪声过程，通过快照潜在变量简化训练，在大型词汇生成任务中超越现有离散扩散方法和自回归模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散扩散方法在噪声过程选择上受限，且训练效率较低。需要更灵活的框架来支持任意噪声过程，同时提高大型离散状态空间（如大型词汇表）上的训练效率和生成质量。

Method: 提出基于均匀化的前向噪声过程，支持快速任意噪声。反向过程使用基于快照潜在变量的简单ELBO，而非整个噪声路径，使标准生成架构能高效训练且保持概率解释性。

Result: 在大型词汇离散生成任务中，GDDS在训练效率和生成质量上优于现有离散扩散方法，首次在此规模上超越自回归模型。

Conclusion: GDDS提供了一个统一的离散扩散建模框架，支持灵活的噪声过程选择，在大型离散生成任务中表现出色，为离散扩散模型的发展提供了新方向。

Abstract: We introduce Generalized Discrete Diffusion from Snapshots (GDDS), a unified framework for discrete diffusion modeling that supports arbitrary noising processes over large discrete state spaces. Our formulation encompasses all existing discrete diffusion approaches, while allowing significantly greater flexibility in the choice of corruption dynamics. The forward noising process relies on uniformization and enables fast arbitrary corruption. For the reverse process, we derive a simple evidence lower bound (ELBO) based on snapshot latents, instead of the entire noising path, that allows efficient training of standard generative modeling architectures with clear probabilistic interpretation. Our experiments on large-vocabulary discrete generation tasks suggest that the proposed framework outperforms existing discrete diffusion methods in terms of training efficiency and generation quality, and beats autoregressive models for the first time at this scale. We provide the code along with a blog post on the project page : \href{https://oussamazekri.fr/gdds}{https://oussamazekri.fr/gdds}.

</details>


### [485] [WebNavigator: Global Web Navigation via Interaction Graph Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20366)
*Xuanwang Zhang,Yuteng Han,Jinnan Qi,Mulong Xie,Zhen Wu,Xinyu Dai*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: WebNavigator通过构建交互图将网页导航从概率探索转变为确定性检索和路径规划，解决了现有方法的拓扑盲问题，在复杂网页环境中实现了接近人类水平的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自主网页导航方法在复杂网页环境中表现远低于人类水平，主要原因是"拓扑盲"问题——代理只能通过试错探索，无法获取环境的全局拓扑结构信息。

Method: WebNavigator采用离线零标记成本启发式探索构建交互图，在线通过检索-推理-传送工作流进行全局导航，将网页导航从概率探索转变为确定性检索和路径规划。

Result: 在WebArena和OnlineMind2Web上达到最先进性能，WebArena多站点任务成功率达72.9%，比企业级代理性能提高一倍以上。

Conclusion: 拓扑盲而非模型推理能力是自主网页导航中被低估的瓶颈，WebNavigator通过利用全局拓扑结构显著提升了导航性能。

Abstract: Despite significant advances in autonomous web navigation, current methods remain far from human-level performance in complex web environments. We argue that this limitation stems from Topological Blindness, where agents are forced to explore via trial-and-error without access to the global topological structure of the environment. To overcome this limitation, we introduce WebNavigator, which reframes web navigation from probabilistic exploration into deterministic retrieval and pathfinding. WebNavigator constructs Interaction Graphs via zero-token cost heuristic exploration offline and implements a Retrieve-Reason-Teleport workflow for global navigation online. WebNavigator achieves state-of-the-art performance on WebArena and OnlineMind2Web. On WebArena multi-site tasks, WebNavigator achieves a 72.9\% success rate, more than doubling the performance of enterprise-level agents. This work reveals that Topological Blindness, rather than model reasoning capabilities alone, is an underestimated bottleneck in autonomous web navigation.

</details>


### [486] [ALARA for Agents: Least-Privilege Context Engineering Through Portable Composable Multi-Agent Teams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20380)
*Christopher J. Agostino,Nayan D'Souza*

Main category: cs.MA

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种声明式的上下文-代理-工具（CAT）数据层和命令行工具npcsh，用于统一管理多智能体系统的行为规范，通过最小化代理上下文来提升安全性和可维护性，并在22个本地模型上进行了广泛评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多智能体系统的行为规范分散在多个地方（文档、配置文件、MCP服务器等），难以共享、版本控制和协作维护。需要一种统一、可扩展的机制来管理代理的行为规范，同时遵循ALARA原则最小化代理的上下文访问权限。

Method: 1. 引入声明式的CAT数据层，通过相互关联的文件定义每个代理的工具访问和上下文范围；2. 开发npcsh命令行工具来执行该系统；3. 系统通过结构解析强制执行这些文件，确保工具列表修改产生确定的行为变化；4. 在22个本地模型（0.6B-35B参数）上进行115个实际任务的评估。

Result: 在约2500次执行中，系统能够：1. 确保代理行为规范的确定性变化；2. 最小化每个代理的上下文访问权限；3. 成功评估了不同模型家族在不同任务类别（文件操作、网页搜索、多步脚本、工具链、多代理委托）上的表现和失败模式。

Conclusion: CAT数据层和npcsh提供了一种统一、可扩展的方法来管理多智能体系统的行为规范，解决了现有框架中规范分散的问题，同时通过最小化上下文访问提升了安全性。评估结果为不同规模模型的实际应用提供了指导。

Abstract: Industry practitioners and academic researchers regularly use multi-agent systems to accelerate their work, yet the frameworks through which these systems operate do not provide a simple, unified mechanism for scalably managing the critical aspects of the agent harness, impacting both the quality of individual human-agent interactions and the capacity for practitioners to coordinate toward common goals through shared agent infrastructure. Agent frameworks have enabled increasingly sophisticated multi-agent systems, but the behavioral specifications that define what these agents can do remain fragmented across prose instruction files, framework-internal configuration, and mechanisms like MCP servers that operate separately from individual agent definitions, making these specifications difficult to share, version, or collaboratively maintain across teams and projects. Applying the ALARA principle from radiation safety (exposures kept as low as reasonably achievable) to agent context, we introduce a declarative context-agent-tool (CAT) data layer expressed through interrelated files that scope each agent's tool access and context to the minimum its role requires, and \texttt{npcsh}, a command-line shell for executing it. Because the system parses and enforces these files structurally, modifying an agent's tool list produces a guaranteed behavioral change rather than a suggestion the model may or may not follow. We evaluate 22 locally-hosted models from 0.6B to 35B parameters across 115 practical tasks spanning file operations, web search, multi-step scripting, tool chaining, and multi-agent delegation, characterizing which model families succeed at which task categories and where they break down across $\sim$2500 total executions.

</details>


### [487] [SNAP: Speaker Nulling for Artifact Projection in Speech Deepfake Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20686)
*Kyudan Jung,Jihwan Kim,Minwoo Lee,Soyoon Kim,Jeonghoon Kim,Jaegul Choo,Cheonbok Park*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出SNAP框架解决语音深度伪造检测中的说话人纠缠问题，通过正交投影抑制说话人信息，使检测器专注于合成伪影特征


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于自监督学习的语音编码器在深度伪造检测中存在泛化问题，研究发现这些编码器表示过度受说话人信息影响，导致检测器依赖说话人特定相关性而非合成伪影特征，这种现象称为"说话人纠缠"

Method: 提出SNAP（说话人零化框架）：1）估计说话人子空间；2）应用正交投影抑制说话人相关成分；3）在残差特征中隔离合成伪影，减少说话人纠缠

Result: SNAP框架实现了最先进的性能，通过减少说话人纠缠，使检测器能够专注于伪影相关模式，提高跨说话人的泛化能力

Conclusion: 说话人纠缠是语音深度伪造检测的关键问题，SNAP框架通过抑制说话人信息成功解决了这一问题，为更鲁棒的检测系统提供了新方向

Abstract: Recent advancements in text-to-speech technologies enable generating high-fidelity synthetic speech nearly indistinguishable from real human voices. While recent studies show the efficacy of self-supervised learning-based speech encoders for deepfake detection, these models struggle to generalize across unseen speakers. Our quantitative analysis suggests these encoder representations are substantially influenced by speaker information, causing detectors to exploit speaker-specific correlations rather than artifact-related cues. We call this phenomenon speaker entanglement. To mitigate this reliance, we introduce SNAP, a speaker-nulling framework. We estimate a speaker subspace and apply orthogonal projection to suppress speaker-dependent components, isolating synthesis artifacts within the residual features. By reducing speaker entanglement, SNAP encourages detectors to focus on artifact-related patterns, leading to state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [488] [Learning to Aggregate Zero-Shot LLM Agents for Corporate Disclosure Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20965)
*Kemal Kirtac*

Main category: q-fin.TR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 论文研究通过轻量级训练聚合器结合多个零样本LLM代理的判断，用于企业信息披露分类，显著提升股票回报方向预测性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 零样本LLM可以直接阅读企业披露信息而无需任务特定微调，但不同提示、推理风格和模型家族之间的预测存在差异。需要解决这种预测不一致问题，并利用多个LLM代理的互补信号来提升分类性能。

Method: 采用多代理框架：三个零样本代理独立阅读每份披露信息，输出情感标签、置信度分数和简短理由。然后使用逻辑元分类器聚合这些信号，预测次日股票回报方向。使用2018-2024年间纳斯达克和标普500公司的18,420份美国企业披露数据。

Result: 训练聚合器优于所有单个代理、多数投票、置信度加权投票和FinBERT基线。平衡准确率从最佳单个代理的0.561提升到训练聚合器的0.612。在结合强劲当前业绩与弱指导或高风险的信息披露中提升最明显。

Conclusion: 零样本LLM代理捕获了互补的金融信号，监督聚合可以将跨代理分歧转化为更有用的分类目标。该方法展示了LLM多代理协作在金融文本分析中的潜力。

Abstract: This paper studies whether a lightweight trained aggregator can combine diverse zero-shot large language model judgments into a stronger downstream signal for corporate disclosure classification. Zero-shot LLMs can read disclosures without task-specific fine-tuning, but their predictions often vary across prompts, reasoning styles, and model families. I address this problem with a multi-agent framework in which three zero-shot agents independently read each disclosure and output a sentiment label, a confidence score, and a short rationale. A logistic meta-classifier then aggregates these signals to predict next-day stock return direction. I use a sample of 18,420 U.S. corporate disclosures issued by Nasdaq and S&P 500 firms between 2018 and 2024, matched to next-day stock returns. Results show that the trained aggregator outperforms all single agents, majority vote, confidence-weighted voting, and a FinBERT baseline. Balanced accuracy rises from 0.561 for the best single agent to 0.612 for the trained aggregator, with the largest gains in disclosures combining strong current performance with weak guidance or elevated risk. The results suggest that zero-shot LLM agents capture complementary financial signals and that supervised aggregation can turn cross-agent disagreement into a more useful classification target.

</details>


### [489] [ECI: Effective Contrastive Information to Evaluate Hard-Negatives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20990)
*Aarush Sinha,Rahul Seetharaman,Aman Bansal*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出ECI指标，基于信息论评估密集检索模型训练中的困难负样本质量，无需微调即可预测下游检索性能，减少计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 困难负样本对密集检索模型训练至关重要，但传统方法需要大量消融实验和重复微调来评估负样本质量，计算成本高昂。需要一种理论基础的指标来预先评估负样本质量。

Method: 提出ECI（有效对比信息）指标，基于信息论和信息检索原理，通过优化信息容量（由集合大小决定的互信息对数界）和判别效率（信号强度与安全性的调和平衡）之间的权衡来评估负样本质量。

Result: ECI能准确预测下游检索性能，发现混合策略（BM25+交叉编码器）在数量和可靠性方面提供最佳平衡，显著减少端到端消融实验的需求。

Conclusion: ECI为评估困难负样本质量提供了理论基础，能有效指导负样本选择策略，减少密集检索模型训练的计算成本。

Abstract: Hard negatives play a critical role in training and fine-tuning dense retrieval models, as they are semantically similar to positive documents yet non-relevant, and correctly distinguishing them is essential for improving retrieval accuracy. However, identifying effective hard negatives typically requires extensive ablation studies involving repeated fine-tuning with different negative sampling strategies and hyperparameters, resulting in substantial computational cost. In this paper, we introduce ECI: Effective Contrastive Information , a theoretically grounded metric grounded in Information Theory and Information Retrieval principles that enables practitioners to assess the quality of hard negatives prior to model fine-tuning. ECI evaluates negatives by optimizing the trade-off between Information Capacity the logarithmic bound on mutual information determined by set size and Discriminative Efficiency, a harmonic balance of Signal Magnitude (Hardness) and Safety (Max-Margin). Unlike heuristic approaches, ECI strictly penalizes unsafe, false-positive negatives prevalent in generative methods. We evaluate ECI across hard-negative sets mined or generated using BM25, cross-encoders, and large language models. Our results demonstrate that ECI accurately predicts downstream retrieval performance, identifying that hybrid strategies (BM25+Cross-Encoder) offer the optimal balance of volume and reliability, significantly reducing the need for costly end-to-end ablation studies.

</details>


### [490] [DSL-R1: From SQL to DSL for Training Retrieval Agents across Structured and Unstructured Data with Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21018)
*Yunhai Hu,Junwei Zhou,Yumo Cao,Yitao Long,Yiwei Xu,Qiyi Jiang,Weiyao Wang,Xiaoyu Cao,Zhen Sun,Yiran Zou,Nan Du*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: DSL-R1是一个统一框架，通过领域特定语言（DSL）将逻辑推理与语义匹配相结合，在复杂领域检索中实现符号精确性和语义覆盖的互补优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂领域的有效检索需要弥合结构化元数据和非结构化内容之间的差距。现有系统通常孤立这两种能力，要么依赖符号过滤，要么依赖向量相似性，无法捕捉它们的相互作用。

Method: 提出DSL-R1框架，通过领域特定语言（DSL）将逻辑推理与语义匹配协同。在SQL风格操作符中嵌入向量原语，结合符号精确性和语义覆盖优势。引入强化学习机制，通过基于规则的执行反馈和检索质量奖励共同优化DSL生成，平衡结构正确性和语义对齐。

Result: 在大规模工业邮件基准测试中，DSL-R1在Hit@1/3指标上实现了+12.3%的改进，持续优于解耦基线，为混合检索建立了稳健范式。

Conclusion: DSL-R1通过统一逻辑推理和语义匹配，在复杂领域检索中实现了显著性能提升，为混合检索系统提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Effective retrieval in complex domains requires bridging the gap between structured metadata and unstructured content. Existing systems typically isolate these capabilities, relying on either symbolic filtering or vector similarity, failing to capture their interplay. In this work, we propose DSL-R1, a unified framework that synergizes logical reasoning with semantic matching via a novel Domain-Specific Language (DSL). By embedding vector primitives within SQL-style operators, our approach leverages the complementary strengths of symbolic precision and semantic coverage. We further introduce a reinforcement learning mechanism where rule-based execution feedback and retrieval quality rewards jointly optimize the DSL generation, balancing structural correctness and semantic alignment. Evaluations on a large-scale industrial email benchmark demonstrate that DSL-R1 achieves a +12.3% improvement in Hit@1/3, consistently outperforming decoupled baselines and establishing a robust paradigm for hybrid retrieval.

</details>


### [491] [TRACE: A Multi-Agent System for Autonomous Physical Reasoning in Seismological Science](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21152)
*Feng Liu,Jian Xu,Xin Cui,Xinghao Wang,Zijie Guo,Jiong Wang,S. Mostafa Mousavi,Xinyu Gu,Hao Chen,Ben Fei,Lihua Fang,Fenghua Ling,Zefeng Li,Lei Bai*

Main category: physics.geo-ph

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: TRACE是一个多智能体系统，结合大语言模型规划和形式化地震学约束，从原始观测数据中推导可审计、物理基础的地震机制推断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前地震序列的物理解释严重依赖专家对目录、时空统计和候选物理模型的综合，限制了可重复性和跨环境洞察的系统性转移。需要一种能够从原始观测中自主推导物理机制的方法。

Method: TRACE采用多智能体系统架构，结合大语言模型进行规划推理，并融入形式化的地震学约束条件。系统能够处理原始观测数据，通过逻辑推理和物理约束推导地震机制。

Result: 在2019年Ridgecrest序列中，TRACE自主识别出应力扰动诱导的延迟触发机制，解析了Mw 6.4和Mw 7.1主震之间的级联相互作用。在Santorini-Kolumbo案例中，系统识别出结构引导的侵入模型，区分了断层通道化间歇性迁移与均匀地壳破裂预期的连续传播。

Conclusion: TRACE为解释异质地震现象提供了一个可推广的逻辑基础设施，推动地震学从依赖专家分析向知识引导的自主发现转变。

Abstract: Inferring the physical mechanisms that govern earthquake sequences from indirect geophysical observations remains difficult, particularly across tectonically distinct environments where similar seismic patterns can reflect different underlying processes. Current interpretations rely heavily on the expert synthesis of catalogs, spatiotemporal statistics, and candidate physical models, limiting reproducibility and the systematic transfer of insight across settings. Here we present TRACE (Trans-perspective Reasoning and Automated Comprehensive Evaluator), a multi-agent system that combines large language model planning with formal seismological constraints to derive auditable, physically grounded mechanistic inference from raw observations. Applied to the 2019 Ridgecrest sequence, TRACE autonomously identifies stress-perturbation-induced delayed triggering, resolving the cascading interaction between the Mw 6.4 and Mw 7.1 mainshocks; in the Santorini-Kolumbo case, the system identifies a structurally guided intrusion model, distinguishing fault-channeled episodic migration from the continuous propagation expected in homogeneous crustal failure. By providing a generalizable logical infrastructure for interpreting heterogeneous seismic phenomena, TRACE advances the field from expert-dependent analysis toward knowledge-guided autonomous discovery in Earth sciences.

</details>


### [492] [Is Monitoring Enough? Strategic Agent Selection For Stealthy Attack in Multi-Agent Discussions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21194)
*Qiuchi Xiang,Haoxuan Qu,Hossein Rahmani,Jun Liu*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 论文研究多智能体讨论中的监控场景攻击，发现现有攻击在监控下会失败，但作者开发了新攻击方法证明仅靠监控无法消除对抗风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体讨论系统存在安全漏洞，现有攻击方法在没有监控时有效，但在有异常检测器持续监控通信的场景下会失败。作者想探究监控是否足以保护多智能体讨论系统。

Method: 开发了一种专门针对讨论监控场景的新型攻击方法，该方法能够在异常检测器持续监控和拦截对抗消息的情况下仍然有效。

Result: 实验表明，即使在持续监控下，有效的攻击仍然是可能的，这说明仅靠监控无法消除多智能体讨论系统中的对抗风险。

Conclusion: 讨论监控场景下的多智能体系统仍然存在安全漏洞，需要更全面的安全措施来保护这些系统。

Abstract: Multi-agent discussions have been widely adopted, motivating growing efforts to develop attacks that expose their vulnerabilities. In this work, we study a practical yet largely unexplored attack scenario, the discussion-monitored scenario, where anomaly detectors continuously monitor inter-agent communications and block detected adversarial messages. Although existing attacks are effective without discussion monitoring, we show that they exhibit detectable patterns and largely fail under such monitoring constraints. But does this imply that monitoring alone is sufficient to secure multi-agent discussions? To answer this question, we develop a novel attack method explicitly tailored to the discussion-monitored scenario. Extensive experiments demonstrate that effective attacks remain possible even under continuous monitoring, indicating that monitoring alone does not eliminate adversarial risks.

</details>


### [493] [When Convenience Becomes Risk: A Semantic View of Under-Specification in Host-Acting Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21231)
*Di Lu,Yongzhi Liao,Xutong Mu,Lele Zheng,Ke Cheng,Xuewen Dong,Yulong Shen,Jianfeng Ma*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 论文研究主机代理（host-acting agents）的安全问题，指出用户目标规范中的语义欠规范会导致安全风险，即使目标本身是良性的，代理在补全执行语义时也可能产生危险计划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 主机代理提供便捷的交互模式，用户只需指定目标，系统自动实现。但这种便利性引入了独特的安全问题：目标规范中的语义欠规范。用户指令通常是目标导向的，但往往未充分指定过程约束、安全边界、持久性和暴露性，导致代理在补全执行语义时可能产生风险计划。

Method: 1. 开发语义威胁模型；2. 提出语义诱导风险补全模式的分类法；3. 通过OpenClaw为中心的案例研究和执行轨迹分析来研究该现象；4. 推导防御设计原则，使执行边界显式化并约束风险补全。

Result: 研究发现主机代理的安全不仅需要管理执行时允许哪些操作，还需要控制如何将仅包含目标的指令转换为可执行计划。语义欠规范确实会导致安全风险，即使原始目标是良性的。

Conclusion: 保护主机代理需要治理两个方面：执行时允许的操作，以及目标指令到可执行计划的转换过程。需要使执行边界显式化并约束风险补全模式。

Abstract: Host-acting agents promise a convenient interaction model in which users specify goals and the system determines how to realize them. We argue that this convenience introduces a distinct security problem: semantic under-specification in goal specification. User instructions are typically goal-oriented, yet they often leave process constraints, safety boundaries, persistence, and exposure insufficiently specified. As a result, the agent must complete missing execution semantics before acting, and this completion can produce risky host-side plans even when the user-stated goal is benign. In this paper, we develop a semantic threat model, present a taxonomy of semantic-induced risky completion patterns, and study the phenomenon through an OpenClaw-centered case study and execution-trace analysis. We further derive defense design principles for making execution boundaries explicit and constraining risky completion. These findings suggest that securing host-acting agents requires governing not only which actions are allowed at execution time, but also how goal-only instructions are translated into executable plans.

</details>


### [494] [Fingerprinting Deep Neural Networks for Ownership Protection: An Analytical Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21411)
*Guang Yang,Ziye Geng,Yihang Chen,Changqing Luo*

Main category: cs.CR

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: AnaFP提出了一种基于理论指导的对抗性指纹方案，通过可调节的拉伸因子控制指纹到决策边界的距离，确保鲁棒性和唯一性，解决了现有启发式方法无法同时满足这两个关键属性的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于对抗样本的DNN指纹方法虽然有效，但缺乏理论指导来确定指纹到决策边界的最佳距离。现有方法依赖经验启发式，可能违反鲁棒性或唯一性要求，无法同时满足所有权保护的这两个基本属性。

Method: 1) 将指纹生成问题形式化为通过可调拉伸因子控制指纹到决策边界的距离；2) 数学形式化鲁棒性和唯一性属性，推导出拉伸因子的上下界；3) 使用有限代理模型池近似无限模型集合；4) 采用分位数松弛策略放松推导的边界；5) 通过网格搜索确定最可行的拉伸因子。

Result: 实验结果表明，AnaFP在各种模型架构和模型修改攻击下，始终优于现有方法，实现了有效的所有权验证。该方法在鲁棒性和唯一性之间取得了更好的平衡。

Conclusion: AnaFP通过理论指导的指纹生成方案，解决了现有对抗性指纹方法在鲁棒性和唯一性之间的权衡问题，为DNN模型所有权保护提供了更可靠的理论基础。

Abstract: Adversarial-example-based fingerprinting approaches, which leverage the decision boundary characteristics of deep neural networks (DNNs) to craft fingerprints, have proven effective for model ownership protection. However, a fundamental challenge remains unresolved: how far a fingerprint should be placed from the decision boundary to simultaneously satisfy two essential properties, i.e., robustness and uniqueness, for effective and reliable ownership protection. Despite the importance of the fingerprint-to-boundary distance, existing works lack a theoretical solution and instead rely on empirical heuristics, which may violate either robustness or uniqueness properties.
  We propose AnaFP, an analytical fingerprinting scheme that constructs fingerprints under theoretical guidance. Specifically, we formulate fingerprint generation as controlling the fingerprint-to-boundary distance through a tunable stretch factor. To ensure both robustness and uniqueness, we mathematically formalize these properties that determine the lower and upper bounds of the stretch factor. These bounds jointly define an admissible interval within which the stretch factor must lie, thereby establishing a theoretical connection between the two constraints and the fingerprint-to-boundary distance. To enable practical fingerprint generation, we approximate the original (infinite) sets of pirated and independently trained models using two finite surrogate model pools and employ a quantile-based relaxation strategy to relax the derived bounds. Due to the circular dependency between the lower bound and the stretch factor, we apply grid search over the admissible interval to determine the most feasible stretch factor. Extensive experimental results show that AnaFP consistently outperforms prior methods, achieving effective ownership verification across diverse model architectures and model modification attacks.

</details>


### [495] [LLM-Powered Workflow Optimization for Multidisciplinary Software Development: An Automotive Industry Case Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21439)
*Shuai Wang,Yinan Yu,Earl Barr,Dhasarathy Parthasarathy*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 提出基于图的LLM驱动工作流优化方法，用于多学科软件开发协作，在Volvo车载API系统上实现93.7% F1分数，将单API开发时间从5小时降至7分钟


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多学科软件开发中，领域专家和开发者需要在不同形式化系统和分离的工件集之间协作，现有AI编码助手仅自动化单个编码任务，但缺乏连接领域知识到实现的工作流，导致重复协调、澄清和错误传递

Method: 基于图的工作流优化方法，逐步用LLM驱动的服务替代人工协调，支持增量采用而不破坏现有实践；在Volvo集团生产级车载API系统上评估

Result: 自动化工作流达到93.7% F1分数，将单API开发时间从约5小时减少到7分钟以下，节省979工程小时；生产中获得领域专家和开发者高度满意

Conclusion: 基于图的LLM驱动工作流优化能有效解决多学科软件开发中的协作问题，显著提高效率和满意度

Abstract: Multidisciplinary Software Development (MSD) requires domain experts and developers to collaborate across incompatible formalisms and separate artifact sets. Today, even with AI coding assistants like GitHub Copilot, this process remains inefficient; individual coding tasks are semi-automated, but the workflow connecting domain knowledge to implementation is not. Developers and experts still lack a shared view, resulting in repeated coordination, clarification rounds, and error-prone handoffs. We address this gap through a graph-based workflow optimization approach that progressively replaces manual coordination with LLM-powered services, enabling incremental adoption without disrupting established practices. We evaluate our approach on \texttt{spapi}, a production in-vehicle API system at Volvo Group involving 192 endpoints, 420 properties, and 776 CAN signals across six functional domains. The automated workflow achieves 93.7\% F1 score while reducing per-API development time from approximately 5 hours to under 7 minutes, saving an estimated 979 engineering hours. In production, the system received high satisfaction from both domain experts and developers, with all participants reporting full satisfaction with communication efficiency.

</details>


### [496] [Efficient Failure Management for Multi-Agent Systems with Reasoning Trace Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21522)
*Lingzhe Zhang,Tong Jia,Mingyu Wang,Weijie Hong,Chiming Duan,Minghua He,Rongqian Wang,Xi Peng,Meiling Wang,Gong Zhang,Renhai Chen,Ying Li*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: EAGER：基于推理轨迹表示的多智能体系统高效故障管理框架，利用历史故障模式进行实时故障检测、诊断和缓解


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着基于LLM的多智能体系统日益复杂和自主，现有故障管理方法依赖逐条轨迹推理导致效率低下，且忽视历史故障模式限制了诊断准确性，需要更高效的故障管理方案

Method: 提出EAGER框架，采用无监督推理范围对比学习编码智能体内推理和智能体间协调，基于历史故障知识实现实时步进式故障检测、诊断和反射性缓解

Result: 在三个开源多智能体系统上的初步评估证明了EAGER的有效性，展示了利用历史故障模式增强故障管理的潜力

Conclusion: EAGER为多智能体系统提供了一种高效的故障管理框架，利用历史故障知识显著提升故障管理的效率和准确性，为可靠多智能体系统操作开辟了有前景的研究方向

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLM)-based Multi-Agent Systems (MASs) have emerged as a new paradigm in software system design, increasingly demonstrating strong reasoning and collaboration capabilities. As these systems become more complex and autonomous, effective failure management is essential to ensure reliability and availability. However, existing approaches often rely on per-trace reasoning, which leads to low efficiency, and neglect historical failure patterns, limiting diagnostic accuracy. In this paper, we conduct a preliminary empirical study to demonstrate the necessity, potential, and challenges of leveraging historical failure patterns to enhance failure management in MASs. Building on this insight, we propose \textbf{EAGER}, an efficient failure management framework for multi-agent systems based on reasoning trace representation. EAGER employs unsupervised reasoning-scoped contrastive learning to encode both intra-agent reasoning and inter-agent coordination, enabling real-time step-wise failure detection, diagnosis, and reflexive mitigation guided by historical failure knowledge. Preliminary evaluations on three open-source MASs demonstrate the effectiveness of EAGER and highlight promising directions for future research in reliable multi-agent system operations.

</details>


### [497] [DiT-Flow: Speech Enhancement Robust to Multiple Distortions based on Flow Matching in Latent Space and Diffusion Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21608)
*Tianyu Cao,Helin Wang,Ari Frummer,Yuval Sieradzki,Adi Arbel,Laureano Moro Velazquez,Jesus Villalba,Oren Gal,Thomas Thebaud,Najim Dehak*

Main category: eess.AS

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: DiT-Flow：基于流匹配和潜在扩散Transformer的语音增强框架，通过LoRA与MoE集成实现参数高效训练，在多种失真条件下表现优异


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语音增强模型通常在有限数据集上训练，评估条件狭窄，限制了实际应用。需要开发能在多种失真条件下（噪声、混响、压缩）保持鲁棒性的模型

Method: 1. 基于潜在扩散Transformer（DiT）构建流匹配语音增强框架
2. 使用VAE提取的紧凑潜在特征
3. 集成LoRA与MoE框架实现参数高效训练
4. 在合成但声学真实的StillSonicSet数据集上训练

Result: 1. 在多种失真条件下持续优于最先进的生成式语音增强模型
2. 仅使用总参数的4.9%即可在五种未见失真上获得更好性能
3. 验证了流匹配在多条件语音增强中的有效性

Conclusion: DiT-Flow通过流匹配和参数高效训练，有效解决了训练与部署条件不匹配的问题，为鲁棒语音增强提供了有前景的解决方案

Abstract: Recent advances in generative models, such as diffusion and flow matching, have shown strong performance in audio tasks. However, speech enhancement (SE) models are typically trained on limited datasets and evaluated under narrow conditions, limiting real-world applicability. To address this, we propose DiT-Flow, a flow matching-based SE framework built on the latent Diffusion Transformer (DiT) backbone and trained for robustness across diverse distortions, including noise, reverberation, and compression. DiT-Flow operates on compact variational auto-encoders (VAEs)-derived latent features. We validated our approach on StillSonicSet, a synthetic yet acoustically realistic dataset composed of LibriSpeech, FSD50K, FMA, and 90 Matterport3D scenes. Experiments show that DiT-Flow consistently outperforms state-of-the-art generative SE models, demonstrating the effectiveness of flow matching in multi-condition speech enhancement. Despite ongoing efforts to expand synthetic data realism, a persistent bottleneck in SE is the inevitable mismatch between training and deployment conditions. By integrating LoRA with the MoE framework, we achieve both parameter-efficient and high-performance training for DiT-Flow robust to multiple distortions with using 4.9% percentage of the total parameters to obtain a better performance on five unseen distortions.

</details>


### [498] [More Isn't Always Better: Balancing Decision Accuracy and Conformity Pressures in Multi-AI Advice](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22152)
*Yuta Tsuchiya,Yukino Baba*

Main category: cs.HC

Relevance: 65.0

TL;DR: 研究探讨人类在决策时咨询多个AI系统的效果，发现小规模AI小组能提升决策准确性，但大规模小组无额外增益；小组内共识程度影响人类对AI建议的依赖程度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人们现在可以咨询多个AI系统来辅助决策，但群体决策研究表明建议聚合会产生从众压力，导致过度依赖。目前尚不清楚多AI咨询何时能改善或损害人类决策

Method: 通过三个任务的实验，参与者从AI小组获得建议。变量包括：小组规模、小组内共识程度、AI建议呈现方式的人类相似度

Result: 小规模AI小组相比单个AI能提高准确性；大规模小组无额外增益。高共识导致过度依赖；单一异议减少从众压力；广泛分歧造成困惑并削弱适当依赖。人类化呈现增加感知有用性和代理感，但不增加从众压力

Conclusion: 研究结果为呈现多AI建议提供了设计启示：在保持准确性的同时减轻从众压力，需要平衡小组规模、共识程度和呈现方式

Abstract: Just as people improve decision-making by consulting diverse human advisors, they can now also consult with multiple AI systems. Prior work on group decision-making shows that advice aggregation creates pressure to conform, leading to overreliance. However, the conditions under which multi-AI consultation improves or undermines human decision-making remain unclear. We conducted experiments with three tasks in which participants received advice from panels of AIs. We varied panel size, within-panel consensus, and the human-likeness of presentation. Accuracy improved for small panels relative to a single AI; larger panels yielded no gains. The level of within-panel consensus affected participants' reliance on AI advice: High consensus fostered overreliance; a single dissent reduced pressure to conform; wide disagreement created confusion and undermined appropriate reliance. Human-like presentations increased perceived usefulness and agency in certain tasks, without raising conformity pressure. These findings yield design implications for presenting multi-AI advice that preserve accuracy while mitigating conformity.

</details>


### [499] [Compression is all you need: Modeling Mathematics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20396)
*Vitaly Aksenov,Eve Bodnia,Michael H. Freedman,Michael Mulligan*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出人类数学(HM)是形式数学(FM)中一个可压缩的子集，通过分层嵌套的定义、引理和定理实现压缩。使用幺半群模型分析，发现HM在非阿贝尔自由幺半群中仅线性增长，而在阿贝尔自由幺半群中可实现指数级表达扩展。对MathLib(Lean 4数学库)的实证分析支持HM占据FM中多项式增长子集的观点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类发现的数学(HM)只是形式数学(FM)中极小的一部分。作者试图理解HM与FM的区别特征，特别是HM如何通过定义和定理的层次结构实现压缩，从而在庞大的数学空间中定位人类感兴趣的数学区域。

Method: 1. 使用幺半群模型：将数学推导视为原始符号串，定义和定理作为可压缩字符串的宏
2. 分析两种幺半群：自由阿贝尔幺半群$A_n$和自由非阿贝尔幺半群$F_n$
3. 实证分析：使用MathLib(Lean 4数学库)作为HM的代理，分析元素的深度、包装长度(定义中的token数)和展开长度(完全展开后的原始符号数)
4. 依赖图分析：在MathLib依赖图上进行压缩度量和PageRank式分析

Result: 1. 在$A_n$中，对数稀疏的宏集可实现指数级表达扩展；在$F_n$中，即使多项式密集的宏集也只能产生线性扩展
2. MathLib分析显示：展开长度随深度和包装长度呈指数增长，而包装长度在所有深度上大致恒定
3. 这些结果与$A_n$模型一致，与$F_n$模型不一致，支持HM占据FM中多项式增长子集的观点
4. 压缩度量和PageRank式分析可量化数学兴趣，指导自动推理系统

Conclusion: 人类数学(HM)是形式数学(FM)中一个可压缩的子集，其特征是通过分层嵌套定义实现压缩。这种压缩性使得HM在庞大的数学空间中占据多项式增长的区域，而非指数增长的区域。这一发现有助于指导自动推理系统专注于人类感兴趣的数学区域。

Abstract: Human mathematics (HM), the mathematics humans discover and value, is a vanishingly small subset of formal mathematics (FM), the totality of all valid deductions. We argue that HM is distinguished by its compressibility through hierarchically nested definitions, lemmas, and theorems. We model this with monoids. A mathematical deduction is a string of primitive symbols; a definition or theorem is a named substring or macro whose use compresses the string. In the free abelian monoid $A_n$, a logarithmically sparse macro set achieves exponential expansion of expressivity. In the free non-abelian monoid $F_n$, even a polynomially-dense macro set only yields linear expansion; superlinear expansion requires near-maximal density. We test these models against MathLib, a large Lean~4 library of mathematics that we take as a proxy for HM. Each element has a depth (layers of definitional nesting), a wrapped length (tokens in its definition), and an unwrapped length (primitive symbols after fully expanding all references). We find unwrapped length grows exponentially with both depth and wrapped length; wrapped length is approximately constant across all depths. These results are consistent with $A_n$ and inconsistent with $F_n$, supporting the thesis that HM occupies a polynomially-growing subset of the exponentially growing space FM. We discuss how compression, measured on the MathLib dependency graph, and a PageRank-style analysis of that graph can quantify mathematical interest and help direct automated reasoning toward the compressible regions where human mathematics lives.

</details>


### [500] [ReLaMix: Residual Latency-Aware Mixing for Delay-Robust Financial Time-Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20869)
*Tianyou Lai,Wentao Yue,Jiayi Zhou,Chaoyuan Hao,Lingke Chang,Qingyu Mao,Zhibo Niu,Qilei Li*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: ReLaMix是一个轻量级的时间序列预测网络，专门处理高频金融市场中延迟观测问题，通过可学习的瓶颈压缩和残差混合增强来恢复被零阶保持机制破坏的信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界高频金融市场中，由于异步数据采集和传输延迟，经常出现延迟或部分陈旧观测值，这给时间序列预测带来挑战。论文研究了模拟延迟设置，其中部分历史信号被零阶保持机制破坏，导致预测难度显著增加。

Method: 提出ReLaMix（Residual Latency-Aware Mixing Network），作为TimeMixer的轻量级扩展。该方法集成了可学习的瓶颈压缩与残差细化，通过残差混合增强来抑制重复陈旧值的冗余，同时保留信息丰富的市场动态。

Result: 在秒级分辨率PAXGUSDT基准测试中，ReLaMix在多个延迟比率和预测时间范围内一致达到最先进精度，显著优于强大的混合器和Transformer基线，且参数量更少。在BTCUSDT上的额外评估证实了该框架的跨资产泛化能力。

Conclusion: 结果表明，残差瓶颈混合在高频金融预测中处理现实延迟引起的陈旧性方面非常有效，为实际市场条件下的时间序列预测提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Financial time-series forecasting in real-world high-frequency markets is often hindered by delayed or partially stale observations caused by asynchronous data acquisition and transmission latency. To better reflect such practical conditions, we investigate a simulated delay setting where a portion of historical signals is corrupted by a Zero-Order Hold (ZOH) mechanism, significantly increasing forecasting difficulty through stepwise stagnation artifacts. In this paper, we propose ReLaMix (Residual Latency-Aware Mixing Network), a lightweight extension of TimeMixer that integrates learnable bottleneck compression with residual refinement for robust signal recovery under delayed observations. ReLaMix explicitly suppresses redundancy from repeated stale values while preserving informative market dynamics via residual mixing enhancement. Experiments on a large-scale second-resolution PAXGUSDT benchmark demonstrate that ReLaMix consistently achieves state-of-the-art accuracy across multiple delay ratios and prediction horizons, outperforming strong mixer and Transformer baselines with substantially fewer parameters. Moreover, additional evaluations on BTCUSDT confirm the cross-asset generalization ability of the proposed framework. These results highlight the effectiveness of residual bottleneck mixing for high-frequency financial forecasting under realistic latency-induced staleness.

</details>


### [501] [Is the future of AI green? What can innovation diffusion models say about generative AI's environmental impact?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21419)
*Robert Viseur,Nicolas Jullien*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 论文分析生成式AI的环境影响，使用A-U创新扩散模型预测行业结构和环境影响的演变，认为虽然AI永远不会是绿色的，但影响可能没有声称的那么严重，取决于主导商业模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前对生成式AI环境影响的预测往往忽略了创新扩散过程中产品演进和性能优化（主要出于经济原因）也会减少环境影响。需要更全面地分析GAI生态系统的环境影响演变。

Method: 使用经典的A-U（Abernathy-Utterback）创新扩散模型分析GAI生态系统，预测行业结构变化和环境影响的演变路径。

Result: 分析表明，虽然生成式AI永远不会是"绿色"的，但其环境影响可能没有当前预测的那么严重。关键影响因素是哪种商业模式会成为主导，不同的商业模式会导致不同的环境影响轨迹。

Conclusion: 生成式AI的环境影响需要基于创新扩散和商业模式演变的动态视角来分析，而不是静态预测。行业结构和产品优化会显著改变环境影响，但最终结果取决于主导的商业模式选择。

Abstract: The rise of generative artificial intelligence (GAI) has led to alarming predictions about its environmental impact. However, these predictions often overlook the fact that the diffusion of innovation is accompanied by the evolution of products and the optimization of their performance, primarily for economic reasons. This can also reduce their environmental impact. By analyzing the GAI ecosystem using the classic A-U innovation diffusion model, we can forecast this industry's structure and how its environmental impact will evolve. While GAI will never be green, its impact may not be as problematic as is sometimes claimed. However, this depends on which business model becomes dominant.

</details>


### [502] [Safety as Computation: Certified Answer Reuse via Capability Closure in Task-Oriented Dialogue](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21448)
*Cosimo Spera*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的任务导向对话系统范式：将安全认证作为答案重用的计算原语，通过认证答案存储和预答案块实现子毫秒级响应


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前对话系统将每个对话轮次独立处理，即使答案已可从先前状态推导出，仍通过检索或生成重新计算答案，导致效率低下

Method: 在基于能力的系统中，安全认证步骤计算固定点闭包cl(At)，包含当前配置下所有可达答案。通过认证答案存储(CAS)和预答案块(PAB)实现：在每个认证轮次，系统物化所有可推导的后续答案及最小来源见证

Result: 后续查询通过形式包含检查在亚毫秒时间内回答，消除了冗余检索和生成，显著提升效率

Conclusion: 安全认证可作为答案重用的有效计算原语，通过认证答案存储和预答案块实现高效的任务导向对话系统

Abstract: We introduce a new paradigm for task-oriented dialogue systems: safety certification as a computational primitive for answer reuse. Current systems treat each turn independently, recomputing answers via retrieval or generation even when they are already derivable from prior state. We show that in capability-based systems, the safety certification step computes a fixed-point closure cl(At) that already contains every answer reachable from the current configuration. We operationalize this insight with a Certified Answer Store (CAS) augmented by Pre-Answer Blocks (PAB): at each certified turn, the system materializes all derivable follow-up answers together with minimal provenance witnesses. Subsequent queries are answered in sub-millisecond time via formal containment checks, eliminating redundant retrieval and generation.

</details>


### [503] [Guideline-grounded retrieval-augmented generation for ophthalmic clinical decision support](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21925)
*Shuying Chen,Sen Cui,Zhong Cao*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: Oph-Guid-RAG：用于眼科临床问答的多模态视觉RAG系统，通过页面级图像检索保留表格和流程图信息，采用可控检索框架（路由和过滤）减少噪声，在HealthBench基准上相比GPT-5.2/5.4有显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决临床AI应用中证据基础薄弱的问题，特别是在需要精确、基于证据推理的挑战性案例中。传统方法在处理包含表格、流程图和布局信息的临床指南时存在局限，需要更好的多模态检索和可控推理框架。

Method: 1) 将每个指南页面作为独立证据单元进行图像检索，保留表格、流程图和布局信息；2) 设计可控检索框架，包含路由和过滤机制，选择性引入外部证据并减少噪声；3) 集成查询分解、查询重写、检索、重排序和多模态推理；4) 提供可追溯的输出，包含指南页面引用。

Result: 在HealthBench硬子集上：相比GPT-5.2，总体得分从0.2969提升至0.3861（+30.0%），准确率从0.5956提升至0.6576（+10.4%）；相比GPT-5.4，准确率增益达+0.1289（+24.4%）。消融研究表明重排序、路由和检索设计对稳定性能至关重要。

Conclusion: 结合视觉检索与可控推理可以显著提升临床AI应用中的证据基础和鲁棒性。页面级图像检索和可控检索框架对处理复杂临床指南特别有效，但仍需进一步完善以实现更全面的解决方案。

Abstract: In this work, we propose Oph-Guid-RAG, a multimodal visual RAG system for ophthalmology clinical question answering and decision support. We treat each guideline page as an independent evidence unit and directly retrieve page images, preserving tables, flowcharts, and layout information. We further design a controllable retrieval framework with routing and filtering, which selectively introduces external evidence and reduces noise. The system integrates query decomposition, query rewriting, retrieval, reranking, and multimodal reasoning, and provides traceable outputs with guideline page references. We evaluate our method on HealthBench using a doctor-based scoring protocol. On the hard subset, our approach improves the overall score from 0.2969 to 0.3861 (+0.0892, +30.0%) compared to GPT-5.2, and achieves higher accuracy, improving from 0.5956 to 0.6576 (+0.0620, +10.4%). Compared to GPT-5.4, our method achieves a larger accuracy gain of +0.1289 (+24.4%). These results show that our method is more effective on challenging cases that require precise, evidence-based reasoning. Ablation studies further show that reranking, routing, and retrieval design are critical for stable performance, especially under difficult settings. Overall, we show how combining visionbased retrieval with controllable reasoning can improve evidence grounding and robustness in clinical AI applications,while pointing out that further work is needed to be more complete.

</details>


### [504] [Beyond Detection: Governing GenAI in Academic Peer Review as a Sociotechnical Challenge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20214)
*Tatiana Chakravorti,Pranav Narayanan Venkit,Sourojit Ghosh,Sarah Rajtmajer*

Main category: cs.CY

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 本文通过混合方法研究探讨生成式AI在学术同行评审中的应用，发现虽然AI可用于辅助性任务，但核心评估判断应保留给人类，并提出了保留人类评估权、建立角色特定控制机制的建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着生成式AI工具逐渐进入学术同行评审流程，引发了关于公平性、问责制和评估判断合法性的问题。虽然这些系统在评审者负担加重的情况下能提高效率，但也带来了新的社会技术风险。本文旨在探讨AI在同行评审中的实际应用和影响。

Method: 采用收敛混合方法：1) 对448个社交媒体帖子进行话语分析；2) 对14位来自顶级AI和HCI会议的领域主席和程序主席进行访谈。通过三角验证公开治理话语与实际评审实践。

Result: 研究发现：1) 普遍认为AI可用于有限的辅助任务（如提高清晰度、结构化反馈）；2) 核心评估判断（新颖性、贡献度、接受决定）应保留为人类责任；3) 存在认知伤害、过度标准化、责任不清、对抗性风险等担忧；4) 结构压力和制度政策模糊将解释和执行负担转移给个体学者，对初级作者和评审者影响更大。

Conclusion: AI辅助的同行评审不应通过全面禁止或单纯检测来管理，而应明确保留人类评估判断权，同时建立可执行的角色特定控制机制以保持问责制。提出了正式化支持与判断边界的角色特定建议。

Abstract: Generative AI tools are increasingly entering academic peer review workflows, raising questions about fairness, accountability, and the legitimacy of evaluative judgment. While these systems promise efficiency gains amid growing reviewer overload, their use introduces new sociotechnical risks. This paper presents a convergent mixed-method study combining discourse analysis of 448 social media posts with interviews with 14 area chairs and program chairs from leading AI and HCI conferences to examine how GenAI is discussed and experienced in peer review. Across both datasets, we find broad agreement that GenAI may be acceptable for limited supportive tasks, such as improving clarity or structuring feedback, but that core evaluative judgments, assessing novelty, contribution, and acceptance, should remain human responsibilities. At the same time, participants highlight concerns about epistemic harm, over-standardization, unclear responsibility, and adversarial risks such as prompt injection. User interviews reveal how structural strain and institutional policy ambiguity shift interpretive and enforcement burdens onto individual scholars, disproportionately affecting junior authors and reviewers. By triangulating public governance discourse with lived review practices, this work reframes AI mediated peer review as a sociotechnical governance challenge and offers recommendations for preserving accountability, trust, and meaningful human oversight. Overall, we argue that AI-assisted peer review is best governed not by blanket bans or detection alone, but by explicitly reserving evaluative judgment for humans while instituting enforceable, role-specific controls that preserve accountability. We conclude with role specific recommendations that formalize the support judgment boundary.

</details>


### [505] [Fusing Driver Perceived and Physical Risk for Safety Critical Scenario Screening in Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20232)
*Chen Xiong,Ziwen Wang,Deqi Wang,Cheng Wang,Yiyang Chen,He Zhang,Chao Gou*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 提出基于驾驶员风险融合的自动驾驶危险场景筛选方法，通过改进的驾驶员风险场和动态成本模型生成高质量风险监督信号，实现高效的大规模场景级风险评估和检索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自动驾驶测试依赖从大规模自然驾驶数据中挖掘安全关键场景，但现有筛选流程仍需要人工风险标注和昂贵的逐帧风险评估，导致效率低下且风险量化基础薄弱。

Method: 1) 改进的驾驶员风险场：引入新的风险高度函数和速度自适应前瞻机制；2) 动态成本模型：整合动能、定向边界框约束和高斯核扩散平滑；3) 风险轨迹交叉注意力解码器：联合解码风险和轨迹；4) 训练时生成高质量风险监督信号，推理时直接预测场景级风险分数。

Result: 在INTERACTION和FLUID数据集上实验表明，该方法产生更平滑、更具区分性的风险估计。在FLUID数据集上，AUC达到0.792，AP达到0.825，分别比PODAR方法提升9.1%和5.1%。

Conclusion: 该方法能够实现可扩展的风险标注和危险场景筛选，显著提高了自动驾驶测试中安全关键场景挖掘的效率和准确性。

Abstract: Autonomous driving testing increasingly relies on mining safety critical scenarios from large scale naturalistic driving data, yet existing screening pipelines still depend on manual risk annotation and expensive frame by frame risk evaluation, resulting in low efficiency and weakly grounded risk quantification. To address this issue, we propose a driver risk fusion based hazardous scenario screening method for autonomous driving. During training, the method combines an improved Driver Risk Field with a dynamic cost model to generate high quality risk supervision signals, while during inference it directly predicts scenario level risk scores through fast forward passes, avoiding per frame risk computation and enabling efficient large scale ranking and retrieval. The improved Driver Risk Field introduces a new risk height function and a speed adaptive look ahead mechanism, and the dynamic cost model integrates kinetic energy, oriented bounding box constraints, and Gaussian kernel diffusion smoothing for more accurate interaction modeling. We further design a risk trajectory cross attention decoder to jointly decode risk and trajectories. Experiments on the INTERACTION and FLUID datasets show that the proposed method produces smoother and more discriminative risk estimates. On FLUID, it achieves an AUC of 0.792 and an AP of 0.825, outperforming PODAR by 9.1 percent and 5.1 percent, respectively, demonstrating its effectiveness for scalable risk labeling and hazardous scenario screening.

</details>


### [506] [An Industrial-Scale Retrieval-Augmented Generation Framework for Requirements Engineering: Empirical Evaluation with Automotive Manufacturing Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20534)
*Muhammad Khalid,Yilmaz Uygun*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: 该论文对检索增强生成(RAG)在工业需求工程自动化中的应用进行了全面实证评估，使用真实的汽车制造文档，在提取准确性、检索效果和成本效益方面显著优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业4.0中的需求工程面临异构、非结构化文档的挑战，现有RAG方法缺乏对真实工业工作流程的全面评估。需要评估RAG在工业需求工程自动化中的实际性能。

Method: 使用真实的汽车制造文档(669个需求，4个规范标准，49个供应商资质)，通过控制实验比较基于BERT的方法和无基础的LLM方法。采用混合语义-词汇检索，进行多维度专家质量评估和纵向分析。

Result: RAG框架达到98.2%的提取准确率，比基线方法分别高出24.4%和19.6%。混合检索的MRR为0.847，专家质量评估平均4.32/5.0，减少83%手动分析时间，节省47%成本，识别出10个需要重新认证的供应商。

Conclusion: RAG在工业需求工程中表现出色，能显著提高准确性、效率和成本效益，同时揭示行业趋势变化，为工业4.0的文档处理提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Requirements engineering in Industry 4.0 faces critical challenges with heterogeneous, unstructured documentation spanning technical specifications, supplier lists, and compliance standards. While retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) shows promise for knowledge-intensive tasks, no prior work has evaluated RAG on authentic industrial RE workflows using comprehensive production-grade performance metrics. This paper presents a comprehensive empirical evaluation of RAG for industrial requirements engineering automation using authentic automotive manufacturing documentation comprising 669 requirements across four specification standards (MBN 9666-1, MBN 9666-2, BQF 9666-5, MBN 9666-9) spanning 2015-2023, plus 49 supplier qualifications with extensive supporting documentation. Through controlled comparisons with BERT-based and ungrounded LLM approaches, the framework achieves 98.2% extraction accuracy with complete traceability, outperforming baselines by 24.4% and 19.6%, respectively. Hybrid semantic-lexical retrieval achieves MRR of 0.847. Expert quality assessment averaged 4.32/5.0 across five dimensions. The evaluation demonstrates 83% reduction in manual analysis time and 47% cost savings through multi-provider LLM orchestration. Ablation studies quantify individual component contributions. Longitudinal analysis reveals a 55% reduction in requirement volume coupled with 1,800% increase in IT security focus, identifying 10 legacy suppliers (20.4%) requiring requalification, representing potential $2.3M in avoided contract penalties.

</details>


### [507] [One Model, Two Markets: Bid-Aware Generative Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22231)
*Yanchen Jiang,Zhe Feng,Christopher P. Mah,Aranyak Mehta,Di Wang*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 45.0

TL;DR: GEM-Rec是一个统一的生成式推荐框架，将商业相关性和变现目标直接整合到生成序列中，通过控制令牌和竞价感知解码机制解决传统语义推荐系统的商业变现问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于语义ID的生成式推荐系统（如TIGER）仅关注语义检索，未解决商业检索中的变现和竞价问题。平台需要同时优化语义相关性和平台收入，但现有架构无法处理广告展示决策和实时竞价。

Method: 1. 引入控制令牌解耦"是否展示广告"和"展示哪个项目"的决策，让模型直接从反映过去成功广告投放的交互日志中学习有效展示模式。2. 设计竞价感知解码机制，在推理过程中直接注入竞价信息，引导生成高价值项目。该方法保证分配单调性，即更高竞价会弱增加广告展示概率，无需模型重新训练。

Result: 实验证明GEM-Rec允许平台动态优化语义相关性和平台收入，实现了商业相关性和变现目标的统一框架。

Conclusion: GEM-Rec成功解决了生成式推荐系统中的商业变现挑战，通过控制令牌和竞价感知解码机制，实现了语义相关性和平台收入的联合优化，为商业推荐系统提供了实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Generative Recommender Systems using semantic ids, such as TIGER (Rajput et al., 2023), have emerged as a widely adopted competitive paradigm in sequential recommendation. However, existing architectures are designed solely for semantic retrieval and do not address concerns such as monetization via ad revenue and incorporation of bids for commercial retrieval. We propose GEM-Rec, a unified framework that integrates commercial relevance and monetization objectives directly into the generative sequence. We introduce control tokens to decouple the decision of whether to show an ad from which item to show. This allows the model to learn valid placement patterns directly from interaction logs, which inherently reflect past successful ad placements. Complementing this, we devise a Bid-Aware Decoding mechanism that handles real-time pricing, injecting bids directly into the inference process to steer the generation toward high-value items. We prove that this approach guarantees allocation monotonicity, ensuring that higher bids weakly increase an ad's likelihood of being shown without requiring model retraining. Experiments demonstrate that GEM-Rec allows platforms to dynamically optimize for semantic relevance and platform revenue.

</details>


### [508] [Multi-RF Fusion with Multi-GNN Blending for Molecular Property Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20724)
*Zacharie Bugaud*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: Multi-RF Fusion在ogbg-molhiv数据集上取得了0.8476的ROC-AUC，在OGB排行榜上排名第一。该方法通过融合12个随机森林模型和深度集成GNN预测，并采用两种关键优化策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 该研究的动机是提升分子属性预测任务的性能，特别是在ogbg-molhiv数据集上超越现有方法。研究关注如何通过有效的模型融合策略和超参数优化来提升预测准确性和稳定性。

Method: 核心方法是：1）使用12个随机森林模型的秩平均集成，输入为4种分子指纹的拼接（共4,263维）；2）以12%的权重融合深度集成的GNN预测；3）关键优化包括：将max_features设为0.20而非默认的sqrt(d)，以及在融合前对10个种子的GNN预测进行平均以消除方差。

Result: 在ogbg-molhiv数据集上取得了0.8476 ± 0.0002的测试ROC-AUC，超越之前的领先方法HyperFusion（0.8475 ± 0.0003），在OGB排行榜上排名第一。通过GNN预测平均将标准差从0.0008降至0.0002。

Conclusion: 研究表明：1）随机森林超参数优化（max_features=0.20）能显著提升性能；2）在模型融合前对GNN预测进行种子平均能有效消除方差；3）简单的模型融合策略可以在分子属性预测任务上取得最先进的结果，无需外部数据或预训练。

Abstract: Multi-RF Fusion achieves a test ROC-AUC of 0.8476 +/- 0.0002 on ogbg-molhiv (10 seeds), placing #1 on the OGB leaderboard ahead of HyperFusion (0.8475 +/- 0.0003). The core of the method is a rank-averaged ensemble of 12 Random Forest models trained on concatenated molecular fingerprints (FCFP, ECFP, MACCS, atom pairs -- 4,263 dimensions total), blended with deep-ensembled GNN predictions at 12% weight. Two findings drive the result: (1) setting max_features to 0.20 instead of the default sqrt(d) gives a +0.008 AUC gain on this scaffold split, and (2) averaging GNN predictions across 10 seeds before blending with the RF eliminates GNN seed variance entirely, dropping the final standard deviation from 0.0008 to 0.0002. No external data or pre-training is used.

</details>


### [509] [The AI Scientific Community: Agentic Virtual Lab Swarms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21344)
*Ulisses Braga-Neto*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 提出使用虚拟实验室的智能体群作为AI科学社区模型，每个粒子代表一个完整的虚拟实验室实例，通过群体智能实现去中心化协调、探索-利用平衡和涌现集体行为，模拟真实科研社区并加速科学发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在创建一个模拟真实科学社区的AI框架，利用群体智能的特性来加速科学发现过程。当前科学社区存在效率瓶颈，而AI驱动的虚拟实验室群可以提供更高效、多样化的科研探索方式。

Method: 提出基于群体智能的虚拟实验室群框架，每个实验室作为智能体粒子，包含：1）实验室间通信和影响机制（类似引用的投票系统）；2）量化科学成功的适应度函数设计；3）防止实验室主导和保持多样性的机制；4）支持大规模复杂涌现行为的计算效率策略。

Result: 目前正在开发AI科学社区的工作实例，论文主要提出概念框架和设计思路，尚未报告具体实验结果。

Conclusion: 虚拟实验室的智能体群是一个有前景的AI科学社区模型，能够模拟真实科研社区的动态特性，通过群体智能加速科学发现，需要进一步开发和完善实际系统。

Abstract: In this short note we propose using agentic swarms of virtual labs as a model of an AI Science Community. In this paradigm, each particle in the swarm represents a complete virtual laboratory instance, enabling collective scientific exploration that mirrors real-world research communities. The framework leverages the inherent properties of swarm intelligence - decentralized coordination, balanced exploration-exploitation trade-offs, and emergent collective behavior - to simulate the behavior of a scientific community and potentially accelerate scientific discovery. We discuss architectural considerations, inter-laboratory communication and influence mechanisms including citation-analogous voting systems, fitness function design for quantifying scientific success, anticipated emergent behaviors, mechanisms for preventing lab dominance and preserving diversity, and computational efficiency strategies to enable large swarms exhibiting complex emergent behavior analogous to real-world scientific communities. A working instance of the AI Science Community is currently under development.

</details>


### [510] [The data heat island effect: quantifying the impact of AI data centers in a warming world](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20897)
*Andrea Marinoni,Pietro Lio',Erik Cambria,Luca Dal Zilio,Weisi Lin,Mauro Dalla Mura,Jocelyn Chanussot,Edoardo Ragusa,Gianmarco Mengaldo,Chi Yan Tso,Yihao Zhu,Benjamin Horton*

Main category: cs.CY

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: 研究发现AI数据中心运行后会导致周边地表温度平均上升2°C，形成"数据热岛效应"，可能影响全球超过3.4亿人口


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI服务快速增长，全球AI数据中心不断扩张，其能源消耗和热排放对环境的影响尚不明确。研究旨在量化AI数据中心对周边环境温度的实际影响。

Method: 利用遥感平台获取的过去几十年地表温度数据，分析全球AI数据中心运营前后周边区域温度变化，建立稳健的温度影响评估模型。

Result: AI数据中心开始运营后，周边地表温度平均上升2°C，形成局部微气候区（数据热岛效应）。估计全球超过3.4亿人口可能受到这种温度上升的影响。

Conclusion: 数据热岛效应对社区和区域福利可能产生显著影响，应成为全球环境可持续AI讨论的重要组成部分。

Abstract: The strong and continuous increase of AI-based services leads to the steady proliferation of AI data centres worldwide with the unavoidable escalation of their power consumption. It is unknown how this energy demand for computational purposes will impact the surrounding environment. Here, we focus our attention on the heat dissipation of AI hyperscalers. Taking advantage of land surface temperature measurements acquired by remote sensing platforms over the last decades, we are able to obtain a robust assessment of the temperature increase recorded in the areas surrounding AI data centres globally. We estimate that the land surface temperature increases by 2°C on average after the start of operations of an AI data centre, inducing local microclimate zones, which we call the data heat island effect. We assess the impact on the communities, quantifying that more than 340 million people could be affected by this temperature increase. Our results show that the data heat island effect could have a remarkable influence on communities and regional welfare in the future, hence becoming part of the conversation around environmentally sustainable AI worldwide.

</details>


### [511] [NeSy-Edge: Neuro-Symbolic Trustworthy Self-Healing in the Computing Continuum](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21145)
*Peihan Ye,Alfreds Lapkovskis,Alaa Saleh,Qiyang Zhang,Praveen Kumar Donta*

Main category: cs.DC

Relevance: 40.0

TL;DR: NeSy-Edge：一种用于计算连续体可信自愈的神经符号框架，采用边缘优先设计，在资源受限的边缘节点进行本地感知和推理，仅在最终诊断阶段调用云模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代AI服务的计算需求正从集中式云向边缘和终端设备转移，但这些环境的规模、异构性和跨层依赖使得弹性维护变得困难。现有故障管理方法通常过于静态、碎片化或繁重，无法支持及时的自愈，特别是在噪声日志和边缘资源约束下。

Method: 1) 将原始运行时日志转换为结构化事件表示；2) 构建先验约束的稀疏符号因果图；3) 将因果证据与历史故障排除知识集成，进行根因分析和恢复推荐。采用边缘优先设计，资源受限的边缘节点执行本地感知和推理，云模型仅在最终诊断阶段调用。

Result: 在具有多个语义噪声级别的代表性Loghub数据集上评估，NeSy-Edge即使在最高噪声级别下也保持稳健，实现了高达75%的根因分析准确率和65%的端到端准确率，同时在约1500MB的本地内存内运行。

Conclusion: NeSy-Edge为计算连续体中的可信自愈提供了一个有效的神经符号框架，能够在边缘资源约束下保持稳健性能，解决了现有故障管理方法的局限性。

Abstract: The computational demands of modern AI services are increasingly shifting execution beyond centralized clouds toward a computing continuum spanning edge and end devices. However, the scale, heterogeneity, and cross-layer dependencies of these environments make resilience difficult to maintain. Existing fault-management methods are often too static, fragmented, or heavy to support timely self-healing, especially under noisy logs and edge resource constraints. To address these limitations, this paper presents NeSy-Edge, a neuro-symbolic framework for trustworthy self-healing in the computing continuum. The framework follows an edge-first design, where a resource-constrained edge node performs local perception and reasoning, while a cloud model is invoked only at the final diagnosis stage. Specifically, NeSy-Edge converts raw runtime logs into structured event representations, builds a prior-constrained sparse symbolic causal graph, and integrates causal evidence with historical troubleshooting knowledge for root-cause analysis and recovery recommendation. We evaluate our work on representative Loghub datasets under multiple levels of semantic noise, considering parsing quality, causal reasoning, end-to-end diagnosis, and edge-side resource usage. The results show that NeSy-Edge remains robust even at the highest noise level, achieving up to 75% root-cause analysis accuracy and 65% end-to-end accuracy while operating within about 1500 MB of local memory.

</details>


### [512] [Leveraging Natural Language Processing and Machine Learning for Evidence-Based Food Security Policy Decision-Making in Data-Scarce Making](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20425)
*Karan Kumar Singh,Nikita Gajbhiye*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: ZeroHungerAI是一个结合NLP和ML的框架，用于数据稀缺地区的粮食安全政策建模，使用DistilBERT架构，在1200个样本上达到91%分类准确率，公平性优化将人口统计差异降至3%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数据稀缺地区的粮食安全政策制定面临挑战：结构化数据有限、文本报告碎片化、决策系统存在人口统计偏差。需要开发能在极端数据稀缺条件下进行证据驱动政策建模的系统。

Method: 提出ZeroHungerAI框架，结合结构化社会经济指标和上下文政策文本嵌入，使用基于迁移学习的DistilBERT架构。采用公平性感知优化减少人口统计偏差。

Result: 在25个地区的1200个样本混合数据集上，达到91%分类准确率、0.89精确率、0.85召回率、0.86 F1分数。比SVM和逻辑回归分别提升13%和17%性能。公平性优化将人口统计差异降至3%。

Conclusion: 基于Transformer的上下文学习显著增强了低资源治理环境中的政策智能，实现了可扩展且偏差感知的饥饿预测系统。

Abstract: Food security policy formulation in data-scarce regions remains a critical challenge due to limited structured datasets, fragmented textual reports, and demographic bias in decision-making systems. This study proposes ZeroHungerAI, an integrated Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Machine Learning (ML) framework designed for evidence-based food security policy modeling under extreme data scarcity. The system combines structured socio-economic indicators with contextual policy text embeddings using a transfer learning based DistilBERT architecture. Experimental evaluation on a 1200-sample hybrid dataset across 25 districts demonstrates superior predictive performance, achieving 91 percent classification accuracy, 0.89 precision, 0.85 recall, and an F1 score of 0.86 under imbalanced conditions. Comparative analysis shows a 13 percent performance improvement over classical SVM and 17 percent over Logistic Regression models. Precision Recall evaluation confirms robust minority class detection (average precision around 0.88). Fairness aware optimization reduces demographic parity difference to 3 percent, ensuring equitable rural urban policy inference. The results validate that transformer based contextual learning significantly enhances policy intelligence in low resource governance environments, enabling scalable and bias aware hunger prediction systems.

</details>


### [513] [DiffGraph: An Automated Agent-driven Model Merging Framework for In-the-Wild Text-to-Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20470)
*Zhuoling Li,Hossein Rahmani,Jiarui Zhang,Yu Xue,Majid Mirmehdi,Jason Kuen,Jiuxiang Gu,Jun Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: DiffGraph：基于图结构的智能体驱动模型融合框架，用于自动整合在线专家文本到图像模型，实现灵活组合以满足多样化用户需求


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 文本到图像（T2I）社区快速发展，涌现了大量在线专家模型，但现有模型融合方法难以充分利用这些丰富的专家资源，也无法灵活满足多样化用户需求

Method: 提出DiffGraph框架：1）构建可扩展图结构，通过节点注册和校准组织在线专家模型；2）基于用户需求动态激活特定子图，实现不同专家的灵活组合；3）采用智能体驱动的方式自动管理专家资源

Result: 大量实验验证了方法的有效性，能够更好地利用在线专家资源，灵活满足多样化用户需求

Conclusion: DiffGraph为文本到图像模型融合提供了创新的图结构框架，能够自动整合在线专家资源，实现灵活组合以满足多样化生成需求

Abstract: The rapid growth of the text-to-image (T2I) community has fostered a thriving online ecosystem of expert models, which are variants of pretrained diffusion models specialized for diverse generative abilities.
