Result: 在中等维度的Lorenz-63和Lorenz-96非线性系统上评估，使用非线性测量模型。结果表明，当使用中小规模集合时，该方法优于广泛使用的集合卡尔曼滤波和粒子滤波。

Conclusion: 闭式条件扩散模型为数据同化提供了有效框架，特别适用于非线性、非高斯分布的黑箱系统，在中小集合规模下优于传统滤波方法。

Abstract: We propose closed-form conditional diffusion models for data assimilation. Diffusion models use data to learn the score function (defined as the gradient of the log-probability density of a data distribution), allowing them to generate new samples from the data distribution by reversing a noise injection process. While it is common to train neural networks to approximate the score function, we leverage the analytical tractability of the score function to assimilate the states of a system with measurements. To enable the efficient evaluation of the score function, we use kernel density estimation to model the joint distribution of the states and their corresponding measurements. The proposed approach also inherits the capability of conditional diffusion models of operating in black-box settings, i.e., the proposed data assimilation approach can accommodate systems and measurement processes without their explicit knowledge. The ability to accommodate black-box systems combined with the superior capabilities of diffusion models in approximating complex, non-Gaussian probability distributions means that the proposed approach offers advantages over many widely used filtering methods. We evaluate the proposed method on nonlinear data assimilation problems based on the Lorenz-63 and Lorenz-96 systems of moderate dimensionality and nonlinear measurement models. Results show the proposed approach outperforms the widely used ensemble Kalman and particle filters when small to moderate ensemble sizes are used.

</details>


### [741] [Feature Incremental Clustering with Generalization Bounds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21590)
*Jing Zhang,Chenping Hou*

Main category: math.ST

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 论文提出四种特征增量聚类算法（FIC-FT、FIC-DR、FIC-DA、FIC-MR），用于处理特征空间随时间扩展的数据流聚类问题，特别针对活动识别场景，并分析了其泛化误差界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在活动识别等动态环境中，数据特征会随时间增量累积，形成特征空间逐渐扩展的数据流。如何设计理论保证的算法来有效聚类这种特征增量数据流，以及如何分析其泛化边界，是尚未探索的问题。

Method: 以k-means为基础，针对不同数据访问情况提出四种特征增量聚类算法：特征裁剪（FT）、数据重构（DR）、数据适配（DA）和模型重用（MR）。详细分析了这四种算法的泛化误差边界，并识别了影响边界的关键因素。

Result: 数值实验表明所提算法有效，特别是在活动识别聚类任务中表现良好。理论分析揭示了训练数据量、假设空间复杂度、预训练模型质量和重构特征分布差异等关键因素对泛化性能的影响。

Conclusion: 论文为特征增量聚类问题提供了系统的算法框架和理论分析，填补了该领域的研究空白，为动态环境下的数据流聚类提供了理论保证的解决方案。

Abstract: In many learning systems, such as activity recognition systems, as new data collection methods continue to emerge in various dynamic environmental applications, the attributes of instances accumulate incrementally, with data being stored in gradually expanding feature spaces. How to design theoretically guaranteed algorithms to effectively cluster this special type of data stream, commonly referred to as activity recognition, remains unexplored. Compared to traditional scenarios, we will face at least two fundamental questions in this feature incremental scenario. (i) How to design preliminary and effective algorithms to address the feature incremental clustering problem? (ii) How to analyze the generalization bounds for the proposed algorithms and under what conditions do these algorithms provide a strong generalization guarantee? To address these problems, by tailoring the most common clustering algorithm, i.e., $k$-means, as an example, we propose four types of Feature Incremental Clustering (FIC) algorithms corresponding to different situations of data access: Feature Tailoring (FT), Data Reconstruction (DR), Data Adaptation (DA), and Model Reuse (MR), abbreviated as FIC-FT, FIC-DR, FIC-DA, and FIC-MR. Subsequently, we offer a detailed analysis of the generalization error bounds for these four algorithms and highlight the critical factors influencing these bounds, such as the amounts of training data, the complexity of the hypothesis space, the quality of pre-trained models, and the discrepancy of the reconstruction feature distribution. The numerical experiments show the effectiveness of the proposed algorithms, particularly in their application to activity recognition clustering tasks.

</details>


### [742] [Rateless DeepJSCC for Broadcast Channels: a Rate-Distortion-Complexity Tradeoff](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21616)
*Zijun Qin,Jingxuan Huang,Zesong Fei,Haichuan Ding,Yulin Shao,Xianhao Chen*

Main category: cs.IT

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出非线性变换无速率信源信道编码(NTRSCC)，一种基于无速率码的广播信道可变长度联合信源信道编码框架，实现失真、速率和复杂度之间的可控权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无线边缘出现大量数据密集型广播应用，需要灵活的失真、传输速率和处理复杂度权衡。现有DeepJSCC方案多为最坏情况解、缺乏自适应复杂度、在广播场景中效率低下。

Method: 集成学习源变换与物理层LT码，开发利用解码器边信息的不等保护方案，设计近似方法实现无速率参数端到端优化，使异构接收器自适应调整接收符号数和置信传播解码迭代次数。

Result: 仿真结果表明，该方法在严格通信和处理预算下，在异构边缘设备上提升了图像广播质量。

Conclusion: NTRSCC框架解决了现有DeepJSCC在广播场景中的局限性，实现了失真、速率和复杂度之间的可控权衡，适用于异构边缘设备环境。

Abstract: In recent years, numerous data-intensive broadcasting applications have emerged at the wireless edge, calling for a flexible tradeoff between distortion, transmission rate, and processing complexity. While deep learning-based joint source-channel coding (DeepJSCC) has been identified as a potential solution to data-intensive communications, most of these schemes are confined to worst-case solutions, lack adaptive complexity, and are inefficient in broadcast settings. To overcome these limitations, this paper introduces nonlinear transform rateless source-channel coding (NTRSCC), a variable-length JSCC framework for broadcast channels based on rateless codes. In particular, we integrate learned source transformations with physical-layer LT codes, develop unequal protection schemes that exploit decoder side information, and devise approximations to enable end-to-end optimization of rateless parameters. Our framework enables heterogeneous receivers to adaptively adjust their received number of rateless symbols and decoding iterations in belief propagation, thereby achieving a controllable tradeoff between distortion, rate, and decoding complexity. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed method enhances image broadcast quality under stringent communication and processing budgets over heterogeneous edge devices.

</details>


### [743] [LipsAM: Lipschitz-Continuous Amplitude Modifier for Audio Signal Processing and its Application to Plug-and-Play Dereverberation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21684)
*Kazuki Matsumoto,Ren Uchida,Kohei Yatabe*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了LipsAM——音频处理中振幅调制器(AM)的Lipschitz连续变体，用于增强深度神经网络的鲁棒性认证，并在语音去混响任务中验证了其稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度神经网络的鲁棒性可以通过Lipschitz连续性来认证，但音频处理DNN由于与现有结果兼容性差，一直不是研究重点。作者旨在为音频信号处理中常用的振幅调制器(AM)架构开发Lipschitz连续变体。

Method: 提出了LipsAM架构：1) 证明了AM具有Lipschitz连续性的充分条件；2) 提出了两种LipsAM架构作为示例；3) 将提出的架构应用于语音去混响的Plug-and-Play算法。

Result: 通过数值实验证明了LipsAM架构在语音去混响任务中的改进稳定性，验证了所提方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 成功开发了音频处理中AM架构的Lipschitz连续变体LipsAM，为音频DNN的鲁棒性认证提供了新方法，并在实际应用中展示了其稳定性优势。

Abstract: The robustness of deep neural networks (DNNs) can be certified through their Lipschitz continuity, which has made the construction of Lipschitz-continuous DNNs an active research field. However, DNNs for audio processing have not been a major focus due to their poor compatibility with existing results. In this paper, we consider the amplitude modifier (AM), a popular architecture for handling audio signals, and propose its Lipschitz-continuous variants, which we refer to as LipsAM. We prove a sufficient condition for an AM to be Lipschitz continuous and propose two architectures as examples of LipsAM. The proposed architectures were applied to a Plug-and-Play algorithm for speech dereverberation, and their improved stability is demonstrated through numerical experiments.

</details>


### [744] [Model selection in hybrid quantum neural networks with applications to quantum transformer architectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21749)
*Harsh Wadhwa,Rahul Bhowmick,Naipunnya Raj,Rajiv Sangle,Ruchira V. Bhat,Krishnakumar Sabapathy*

Main category: quant-ph

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出了量子偏置-表达能力工具箱(QBET)，用于评估量子、经典和混合Transformer架构，通过简洁性偏置(SB)和表达能力(EXP)指标预筛选模型变体，避免完整训练流程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量子机器学习模型缺乏系统设计原则，通常需要大量资源密集型训练来寻找有效的编码、量子电路设计和初始化策略配置。

Method: 开发QBET框架，引入简洁性偏置(SB)和表达能力(EXP)指标，扩展SB分析到生成和多类分类任务，使用18个量子比特进行嵌入（查询、键、值各6个量子比特）。

Result: QBET能够高效预筛选有前景的模型变体，在Transformer分类和生成任务评估中，识别出量子自注意力变体超越经典对应模型的情况。

Conclusion: QBET为量子机器学习模型提供了系统评估框架，通过SB和EXP指标实现模型变体的高效预筛选，展示了量子自注意力在某些场景下的优势。

Abstract: Quantum machine learning models generally lack principled design guidelines, often requiring full resource-intensive training across numerous choices of encodings, quantum circuit designs and initialization strategies to find effective configuration. To address this challenge, we develope the Quantum Bias-Expressivity Toolbox ($\texttt{QBET}$), a framework for evaluating quantum, classical, and hybrid transformer architectures. In this toolbox, we introduce lean metrics for Simplicity Bias ($\texttt{SB}$) and Expressivity ($\texttt{EXP}$), for comparing across various models, and extend the analysis of $\texttt{SB}$ to generative and multiclass-classification tasks. We show that $\texttt{QBET}$ enables efficient pre-screening of promising model variants obviating the need to execute complete training pipelines. In evaluations on transformer-based classification and generative tasks we employ a total of $18$ qubits for embeddings ($6$ qubits each for query, key, and value). We identify scenarios in which quantum self-attention variants surpass their classical counterparts by ranking the respective models according to the $\texttt{SB}$ metric and comparing their relative performance.

</details>


### [745] [Identifiability and amortized inference limitations in Kuramoto models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21752)
*Emma Hannula,Jana de Wiljes,Matthew T. Moores,Heikki Haario,Lassi Roininen*

Main category: stat.AP

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于Kuramoto振荡器网络的摊销贝叶斯推断方法，通过神经网络从模拟相位动态中学习后验分布近似，实现快速、可扩展的推断，无需重复采样或优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非线性振荡器网络（如Kuramoto模型）在物理、生物和工程中广泛用于研究同步现象，但传统贝叶斯推断面临高维状态空间和难以处理的似然函数，计算成本过高。

Method: 采用摊销贝叶斯推断方法，从模拟的相位动态数据中学习神经近似后验分布。该方法一次性训练神经网络来近似后验，避免了传统方法中每次推断都需要重复采样或优化的计算开销。

Result: 在合成Kuramoto网络上应用该方法，显示出在近似后验分布和捕捉不确定性方面的良好效果，相比传统贝叶斯技术具有显著的计算节省。

Conclusion: 摊销推断为振荡器网络的不确定性感知分析提供了一个实用且灵活的框架，能够克服传统方法在计算上的限制。

Abstract: Bayesian inference is a powerful tool for parameter estimation and uncertainty quantification in dynamical systems. However, for nonlinear oscillator networks such as Kuramoto models, widely used to study synchronization phenomena in physics, biology, and engineering, inference is often computationally prohibitive due to high-dimensional state spaces and intractable likelihood functions. We present an amortized Bayesian inference approach that learns a neural approximation of the posterior from simulated phase dynamics, enabling fast, scalable inference without repeated sampling or optimization. Applied to synthetic Kuramoto networks, the method shows promising results in approximating posterior distributions and capturing uncertainty, with computational savings compared to traditional Bayesian techniques. These findings suggest that amortized inference is a practical and flexible framework for uncertainty-aware analysis of oscillator networks.

</details>


### [746] [All elementary functions from a single binary operator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21852)
*Andrzej Odrzywołek*

Main category: cs.SC

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 论文发现了一个名为eml(x,y)=exp(x)-ln(y)的二元运算符，配合常数1，可以生成科学计算器的所有标准函数，包括算术、代数、超越函数等，类似于布尔逻辑中的NAND门。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在数字硬件中，单个两输入门（如NAND）就足以实现所有布尔逻辑。然而在连续数学中，计算sin、cos、sqrt、log等基本函数一直需要多种不同的操作。本文旨在寻找是否存在类似的单一原始运算符，能够生成连续数学中的所有基本函数。

Method: 通过系统性的穷举搜索，作者发现了eml(x,y)=exp(x)-ln(y)这个二元运算符。然后构造性地证明了该运算符配合常数1足以生成科学计算器的所有函数。作者还提出了EML（Exp-Minus-Log）形式，将表达式表示为相同节点的二叉树，并展示了如何使用梯度优化（Adam）进行符号回归，从数值数据中精确恢复闭式基本函数。

Result: 发现eml(x,y)=exp(x)-ln(y)运算符配合常数1可以生成所有基本数学函数，包括：常数e、π、i；算术运算+、-、×、/、幂运算；以及超越函数和代数函数。通过EML树结构，可以在浅层树深度（最多4层）下从数值数据中精确恢复闭式基本函数。

Conclusion: EML运算符为连续数学提供了一个类似于布尔逻辑中NAND门的通用原始运算符。这种统一的表示形式不仅简化了数学表达，还支持基于梯度的符号回归，能够从数据中发现精确的数学公式，为数学发现和函数逼近提供了新方法。

Abstract: A single two-input gate suffices for all of Boolean logic in digital hardware. No comparable primitive has been known for continuous mathematics: computing elementary functions such as sin, cos, sqrt, and log has always required multiple distinct operations. Here I show that a single binary operator, eml(x,y)=exp(x)-ln(y), together with the constant 1, generates the standard repertoire of a scientific calculator. This includes constants such as $e$, $π$, and $i$; arithmetic operations including $+$, $-$, $\times$, $/$, and exponentiation as well as the usual transcendental and algebraic functions. For example, $e^x=\operatorname{eml}(x,1)$, $\ln x=\operatorname{eml}(1,\operatorname{eml}(\operatorname{eml}(1,x),1))$, and likewise for all other operations. That such an operator exists was not anticipated; I found it by systematic exhaustive search and established constructively that it suffices for the concrete scientific-calculator basis. In EML (Exp-Minus-Log) form, every such expression becomes a binary tree of identical nodes, yielding a grammar as simple as $S \to 1 \mid \operatorname{eml}(S,S)$. This uniform structure also enables gradient-based symbolic regression: using EML trees as trainable circuits with standard optimizers (Adam), I demonstrate the feasibility of exact recovery of closed-form elementary functions from numerical data at shallow tree depths up to 4. The same architecture can fit arbitrary data, but when the generating law is elementary, it may recover the exact formula.

</details>


### [747] [MAGPI: Multifidelity-Augmented Gaussian Process Inputs for Surrogate Modeling from Scarce Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22050)
*Atticus Rex,Elizabeth Qian,David Peterson*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: 提出一种新的多保真度高斯过程回归方法，利用低保真度数据定义额外特征来增强学习模型的输入空间，结合了协同克里金法和自回归估计器的优点


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在科学和工程应用中，获取高保真度训练数据通常成本高昂且有限，而低保真度模型虽然便宜但精度不足。多保真度机器学习旨在结合高、低保真度数据，学习出比低保真度模型更准确、比高保真度模型更便宜的代理模型

Method: 提出新的多保真度高斯过程回归训练方法，使用低保真度数据定义额外特征来增强学习模型的输入空间。该方法结合了协同克里金法和自回归估计器两类现有多保真度GPR方法的优点

Result: 在多个测试问题上的数值实验表明，相对于现有技术，该方法具有更高的预测精度和更低的计算成本

Conclusion: 该方法成功地将协同克里金法和自回归估计器的优点结合起来，为多保真度高斯过程回归提供了一种有效的新方法，在预测精度和计算效率方面都有显著提升

Abstract: Supervised machine learning describes the practice of fitting a parameterized model to labeled input-output data. Supervised machine learning methods have demonstrated promise in learning efficient surrogate models that can (partially) replace expensive high-fidelity models, making many-query analyses, such as optimization, uncertainty quantification, and inference, tractable. However, when training data must be obtained through the evaluation of an expensive model or experiment, the amount of training data that can be obtained is often limited, which can make learned surrogate models unreliable. However, in many engineering and scientific settings, cheaper \emph{low-fidelity} models may be available, for example arising from simplified physics modeling or coarse grids. These models may be used to generate additional low-fidelity training data. The goal of \emph{multifidelity} machine learning is to use both high- and low-fidelity training data to learn a surrogate model which is cheaper to evaluate than the high-fidelity model, but more accurate than any available low-fidelity model. This work proposes a new multifidelity training approach for Gaussian process regression which uses low-fidelity data to define additional features that augment the input space of the learned model. The approach unites desirable properties from two separate classes of existing multifidelity GPR approaches, cokriging and autoregressive estimators. Numerical experiments on several test problems demonstrate both increased predictive accuracy and reduced computational cost relative to the state of the art.

</details>


### [748] [AnimalCLAP: Taxonomy-Aware Language-Audio Pretraining for Species Recognition and Trait Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22053)
*Risa Shinoda,Kaede Shiohara,Nakamasa Inoue,Hiroaki Santo,Fumio Okura*

Main category: cs.SD

Relevance: 35.0

TL;DR: AnimalCLAP是一个结合生物分类学知识的语言-音频框架，用于从未见过的物种声音分类，包含4,225小时、6,823个物种的音频数据集，通过层次化生物信息提升零样本分类能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动物声音对野生动物评估至关重要，特别是在森林等复杂环境中。虽然深度学习已能自动分类物种声音，但训练时未见过的物种分类仍然具有挑战性。现有方法缺乏对生物分类学结构的利用。

Method: 提出AnimalCLAP框架：1) 构建包含4,225小时录音、6,823个物种的数据集，标注22个生态特征；2) 开发模型，利用分类学结构对齐音频和文本表示，通过层次化生物信息提升未见物种识别能力。

Result: 模型能直接从动物声音推断物种的生态和生物属性，在未见物种分类上表现优于传统CLAP方法。数据集、代码和模型将公开。

Conclusion: AnimalCLAP通过整合生物分类学知识，有效解决了未见物种声音分类的挑战，为野生动物监测提供了更强大的工具。

Abstract: Animal vocalizations provide crucial insights for wildlife assessment, particularly in complex environments such as forests, aiding species identification and ecological monitoring. Recent advances in deep learning have enabled automatic species classification from their vocalizations. However, classifying species unseen during training remains challenging. To address this limitation, we introduce AnimalCLAP, a taxonomy-aware language-audio framework comprising a new dataset and model that incorporate hierarchical biological information. Specifically, our vocalization dataset consists of 4,225 hours of recordings covering 6,823 species, annotated with 22 ecological traits. The AnimalCLAP model is trained on this dataset to align audio and textual representations using taxonomic structures, improving the recognition of unseen species. We demonstrate that our proposed model effectively infers ecological and biological attributes of species directly from their vocalizations, achieving superior performance compared to CLAP. Our dataset, code, and models will be publicly available at https://dahlian00.github.io/AnimalCLAP_Page/.

</details>


### [749] [Direct Interval Propagation Methods using Neural-Network Surrogates for Uncertainty Quantification in Physical Systems Surrogate Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21308)
*Ghifari Adam Faza,Jolan Wauters,Fabio Cuzzolin,Hans Hallez,David Moens*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出将区间传播重新表述为区间值回归问题，使用神经网络代理模型直接预测输出边界，显著提高了计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统区间传播方法需要解决优化问题，对于复杂系统计算成本高昂。现有代理模型通常只在优化循环中替换评估器，仍需要大量推理调用。需要更高效的方法来预测不确定输入下的输出边界。

Method: 将区间传播重新表述为区间值回归问题，研究三种神经网络方法：1）通过标准架构的朴素区间传播；2）边界传播方法（IBP和CROWN）；3）具有区间权重的区间神经网络（INNs）。使用MLP和DeepONet作为代理模型。

Result: 这些方法相比传统基于优化的方法显著提高了计算效率，同时保持了准确的区间估计。研究还讨论了实际应用中的限制和开放挑战。

Conclusion: 神经网络代理模型为区间传播问题提供了有效的解决方案，能够平衡计算效率和准确性，但实际应用中仍存在需要解决的挑战。

Abstract: In engineering, uncertainty propagation aims to characterise system outputs under uncertain inputs. For interval uncertainty, the goal is to determine output bounds given interval-valued inputs, which is critical for robust design optimisation and reliability analysis. However, standard interval propagation relies on solving optimisation problems that become computationally expensive for complex systems. Surrogate models alleviate this cost but typically replace only the evaluator within the optimisation loop, still requiring many inference calls. To overcome this limitation, we reformulate interval propagation as an interval-valued regression problem that directly predicts output bounds. We present a comprehensive study of neural network-based surrogate models, including multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) and deep operator networks (DeepONet), for this task. Three approaches are investigated: (i) naive interval propagation through standard architectures, (ii) bound propagation methods such as Interval Bound Propagation (IBP) and CROWN, and (iii) interval neural networks (INNs) with interval weights. Results show that these methods significantly improve computational efficiency over traditional optimisation-based approaches while maintaining accurate interval estimates. We further discuss practical limitations and open challenges in applying interval-based propagation methods.

</details>


### [750] [Optimizing Feature Extraction for On-device Model Inference with User Behavior Sequences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21508)
*Chen Gong,Zhenzhe Zheng,Yiliu Chen,Sheng Wang,Fan Wu,Guihai Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: AutoFeature：一个自动化特征提取引擎，通过消除冗余操作和高效缓存来加速移动设备上的模型执行，将端到端延迟降低1.33-4.53倍


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动应用中机器学习模型广泛用于分析用户行为，但现有研究主要关注模型推理加速，忽略了从原始应用日志中提取输入特征这一关键瓶颈。特征提取操作在跨不同模型特征和连续推理中存在大量冗余，导致延迟问题。

Method: AutoFeature采用三核心设计：1) 图抽象：将不同输入特征提取流程表示为有向无环图；2) 图优化：识别并融合图中跨特征冗余操作节点；3) 高效缓存：最小化连续模型推理间重叠原始数据的操作。

Result: 在搜索、视频和电商等五个工业移动服务中集成AutoFeature，在线评估显示：白天端到端设备模型执行延迟降低1.33-3.93倍，夜间降低1.43-4.53倍，且不损害模型推理精度。

Conclusion: AutoFeature通过优化特征提取流程显著加速设备端模型执行，解决了实际部署中的关键瓶颈。该方法可广泛应用于移动应用中的机器学习服务，提升用户体验。

Abstract: Machine learning models are widely integrated into modern mobile apps to analyze user behaviors and deliver personalized services. Ensuring low-latency on-device model execution is critical for maintaining high-quality user experiences. While prior research has primarily focused on accelerating model inference with given input features, we identify an overlooked bottleneck in real-world on-device model execution pipelines: extracting input features from raw application logs. In this work, we explore a new direction of feature extraction optimization by analyzing and eliminating redundant extraction operations across different model features and consecutive model inferences. We then introduce AutoFeature, an automated feature extraction engine designed to accelerate on-device feature extraction process without compromising model inference accuracy. AutoFeature comprises three core designs: (1) graph abstraction to formulate the extraction workflows of different input features as one directed acyclic graph, (2) graph optimization to identify and fuse redundant operation nodes across different features within the graph; (3) efficient caching to minimize operations on overlapping raw data between consecutive model inferences. We implement a system prototype of AutoFeature and integrate it into five industrial mobile services spanning search, video and e-commerce domains. Online evaluations show that AutoFeature reduces end-to-end on-device model execution latency by 1.33x-3.93x during daytime and 1.43x-4.53x at night.

</details>


### [751] [BOOST-RPF: Boosted Sequential Trees for Radial Power Flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21977)
*Ehimare Okoyomon,Christoph Goebel*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: BOOST-RPF将配电网电压预测从全局图回归重构为基于路径的顺序学习问题，利用梯度提升决策树建模局部电压降规律，在拓扑变化下保持高精度和线性计算复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统配电网潮流分析面临可扩展性问题，现有机器学习模型泛化能力不足。需要一种能够适应拓扑变化、具有良好泛化性能且计算高效的电压预测方法。

Method: 将辐射状网络分解为根到叶的路径，将电压预测重构为基于路径的顺序学习问题。使用梯度提升决策树（XGBoost）建模局部电压降规律，提出三种架构变体：绝对电压、父节点残差和物理信息残差。

Result: 在Kerber Dorfnetz电网和ENGAGE套件上评估，父节点残差变体在标准精度和泛化任务上均优于分析和神经基线方法。相比全局MLP和GNN，在拓扑变化下性能更稳定，计算复杂度为线性O(N)，样本效率显著提高。

Conclusion: BOOST-RPF通过将模型架构与潮流递归物理特性对齐，实现了尺寸无关的应用和优异的分布外鲁棒性，为实时配电系统操作提供了可扩展且泛化能力强的替代方案。

Abstract: Accurate power flow analysis is critical for modern distribution systems, yet classical solvers face scalability issues, and current machine learning models often struggle with generalization. We introduce BOOST-RPF, a novel method that reformulates voltage prediction from a global graph regression task into a sequential path-based learning problem. By decomposing radial networks into root-to-leaf paths, we leverage gradient-boosted decision trees (XGBoost) to model local voltage-drop regularities. We evaluate three architectural variants: Absolute Voltage, Parent Residual, and Physics-Informed Residual. This approach aligns the model architecture with the recursive physics of power flow, ensuring size-agnostic application and superior out-of-distribution robustness. Benchmarked against the Kerber Dorfnetz grid and the ENGAGE suite, BOOST-RPF achieves state-of-the-art results with its Parent Residual variant which consistently outperforms both analytical and neural baselines in standard accuracy and generalization tasks. While global Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLPs) and Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) often suffer from performance degradation under topological shifts, BOOST-RPF maintains high precision across unseen feeders. Furthermore, the framework displays linear $O(N)$ computational scaling and significantly increased sample efficiency through per-edge supervision, offering a scalable and generalizable alternative for real-time distribution system operator (DSO) applications.

</details>


### [752] [On the Interplay of Priors and Overparametrization in Bayesian Neural Network Posteriors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22030)
*Julius Kobialka,Emanuel Sommer,Chris Kolb,Juntae Kwon,Daniel Dold,David Rügamer*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究了过参数化贝叶斯神经网络后验分布的特性，揭示了冗余如何通过平衡性、权重重分配和先验一致性三种现象重塑后验几何结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 贝叶斯神经网络后验分布通常被认为不实用，因为对称性导致后验碎片化、不可识别性增加维度、权重空间先验被认为无意义。本文旨在研究过参数化和先验如何共同重塑BNN后验，以更好地理解它们的相互作用。

Method: 通过理论分析过参数化如何重塑后验几何结构，识别三种关键现象：平衡性、等概率流形上的权重重分配、先验一致性。使用远超先前工作的后验采样预算进行广泛实验验证。

Result: 过参数化诱导出结构化、与先验对齐的权重后验分布，验证了理论分析中识别的三种现象确实重塑了后验几何。

Conclusion: 过参数化与先验共同作用，通过三种关键现象重塑BNN后验几何，使后验分布更加结构化并与先验对齐，这有助于理解BNN后验的实际特性。

Abstract: Bayesian neural network (BNN) posteriors are often considered impractical for inference, as symmetries fragment them, non-identifiabilities inflate dimensionality, and weight-space priors are seen as meaningless. In this work, we study how overparametrization and priors together reshape BNN posteriors and derive implications allowing us to better understand their interplay. We show that redundancy introduces three key phenomena that fundamentally reshape the posterior geometry: balancedness, weight reallocation on equal-probability manifolds, and prior conformity. We validate our findings through extensive experiments with posterior sampling budgets that far exceed those of earlier works, and demonstrate how overparametrization induces structured, prior-aligned weight posterior distributions.

</details>


### [753] [Gradient Descent with Projection Finds Over-Parameterized Neural Networks for Learning Low-Degree Polynomials with Nearly Minimax Optimal Rate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21062)
*Yingzhen Yang,Ping Li*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 30.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究通过过参数化两层神经网络学习低阶球面多项式的问题，提出了梯度下降投影算法，显著降低了样本复杂度，获得了接近最优的回归风险界限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 学习低阶球面多项式是机器学习中的基础问题，现有方法通常需要较高的样本复杂度。作者旨在通过过参数化神经网络结合新颖的优化算法，显著降低样本复杂度，同时获得接近最优的理论保证。

Method: 提出梯度下降投影算法训练过参数化两层神经网络，使用ReLU激活函数。当真实阶数未知时，还设计了可证明的自适应阶数选择算法来识别真实阶数。

Result: 获得了显著改进的样本复杂度：对于回归风险ε∈(0,Θ(d^{-k₀})]，需要样本复杂度n≍Θ(log(4/δ)·d^{k₀}/ε)，相比代表性样本复杂度Θ(d^{k₀}max{ε^{-2},log d})有显著提升。训练的网络实现了接近最优的非参数回归风险率log(4/δ)·Θ(d^{k₀}/n)。

Conclusion: 这是首次通过训练过参数化神经网络获得接近最优风险界限的工作，超越了神经正切核的限制，展示了特征学习能力。为学习低阶球面多项式提供了理论和算法保证。

Abstract: We study the problem of learning a low-degree spherical polynomial of degree $k_0 = Θ(1) \ge 1$ defined on the unit sphere in $\RR^d$ by training an over-parameterized two-layer neural network with augmented feature in this paper. Our main result is the significantly improved sample complexity for learning such low-degree polynomials. We show that, for any regression risk $\eps \in (0, Θ(d^{-k_0})]$, an over-parameterized two-layer neural network trained by a novel Gradient Descent with Projection (GDP) requires a sample complexity of $n \asymp Θ( \log(4/δ) \cdot d^{k_0}/\eps)$ with probability $1-δ$ for $δ\in (0,1)$, in contrast with the representative sample complexity $Θ(d^{k_0} \max\set{\eps^{-2},\log d})$. Moreover, such sample complexity is nearly unimprovable since the trained network renders a nearly optimal rate of the nonparametric regression risk of the order $\log({4}/δ) \cdot Θ(d^{k_0}/{n})$ with probability at least $1-δ$. On the other hand, the minimax optimal rate for the regression risk with a kernel of rank $Θ(d^{k_0})$ is $Θ(d^{k_0}/{n})$, so that the rate of the nonparametric regression risk of the network trained by GDP is nearly minimax optimal. In the case that the ground truth degree $k_0$ is unknown, we present a novel and provable adaptive degree selection algorithm which identifies the true degree and achieves the same nearly optimal regression rate. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that a nearly optimal risk bound is obtained by training an over-parameterized neural network with a popular activation function (ReLU) and algorithmic guarantee for learning low-degree spherical polynomials. Due to the feature learning capability of GDP, our results are beyond the regular Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) limit.

</details>


### [754] [The Multiverse of Time Series Machine Learning: an Archive for Multivariate Time Series Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20352)
*Matthew Middlehurst,Aiden Rushbrooke,Ali Ismail-Fawaz,Maxime Devanne,Germain Forestier,Angus Dempster,Geoffrey I. Webb,Christopher Holder,Anthony Bagnall*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文将UEA时间序列分类数据集库从30个扩展到147个，并更名为Multiverse档案库，提供预处理版本、基准评估和交互式探索界面。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间序列机器学习研究需要更全面、多样化的基准数据集来推动算法发展。现有的UEA档案库（30个数据集）已不足以满足当前研究需求，需要扩展到更多领域和问题类型。

Method: 1. 从多个来源收集和整合时间序列分类数据集，将档案库从30个扩展到133个分类问题
2. 对包含缺失值或不等长序列的数据集进行预处理，使总数达到147个
3. 创建Multiverse-core（MV-core）子集用于初始探索
4. 建立基准评估框架，测试现有和最新的分类算法
5. 开发专用存储库，提供兼容aeon和scikit-learn的框架、结果记录和交互界面

Result: 1. 成功创建了包含147个数据集的Multiverse档案库，比原UEA档案库扩大了近5倍
2. 提供了预处理版本，解决了缺失值和不等长序列问题
3. 建立了全面的性能基准，为未来研究提供参考
4. 开发了支持可重复性的工具和交互式探索界面

Conclusion: Multiverse档案库为时间序列分类研究提供了更全面、多样化的基准资源，将促进算法开发和公平比较，推动整个领域的发展。

Abstract: Time series machine learning (TSML) is a growing research field that spans a wide range
  of tasks. The popularity of established tasks such as classification, clustering, and
  extrinsic regression has, in part, been driven by the availability of benchmark datasets.
  An archive of 30 multivariate time series classification datasets, introduced in 2018 and
  commonly known as the UEA archive, has since become an essential resource cited in hundreds
  of publications. We present a substantial expansion of this archive that more than quadruples
  its size, from 30 to 133 classification problems. We also release preprocessed versions of
  datasets containing missing values or unequal length series, bringing the total number of
  datasets to 147. Reflecting the growth of the archive and the broader community, we rebrand
  it as the Multiverse archive to capture its diversity of domains. The Multiverse archive
  includes datasets from multiple sources, consolidating other collections and standalone
  datasets into a single, unified repository. Recognising that running experiments across the
  full archive is computationally demanding, we recommend a subset of the full archive called
  Multiverse-core (MV-core) for initial exploration. To support researchers in using the new
  archive, we provide detailed guidance and a baseline evaluation of established and recent
  classification algorithms, establishing performance benchmarks for future research. We have
  created a dedicated repository for the Multiverse archive that provides a common aeon
  and scikit-learn compatible framework for reproducibility, an extensive record of
  published results, and an interactive interface to explore the results.

</details>


### [755] [Bayesian Learning in Episodic Zero-Sum Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20604)
*Chang-Wei Yueh,Andy Zhao,Ashutosh Nayyar,Rahul Jain*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文研究零和马尔可夫博弈中的贝叶斯学习，提出后验采样算法，分析两种设置下的期望遗憾界，并在网格世界捕食者-猎物环境中验证了次线性遗憾缩放。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究零和马尔可夫博弈中的贝叶斯学习问题，其中转移和奖励模型未知。需要设计能够在未知环境中有效学习均衡策略的算法，并分析其理论性能保证。

Method: 提出后验采样算法：每个玩家维护游戏模型的贝叶斯后验分布，在每个episode开始时独立采样一个游戏模型，然后为采样模型计算均衡策略。分析两种设置：1) 双方都使用后验采样；2) 只有一方使用后验采样而对手遵循任意学习算法。

Result: 理论结果：后验采样代理的期望遗憾界为O(HS√(ABHKlog(SABHK)))，其中K是episode数，H是episode长度，S是状态数，A,B是双方动作空间大小。实验在网格世界捕食者-猎物环境中验证了次线性遗憾缩放，且后验采样优于虚构博弈基线。

Conclusion: 后验采样算法在零和马尔可夫博弈中具有理论保证的次线性遗憾性能，能够有效处理未知环境模型，并在实际环境中表现出竞争力。

Abstract: We study Bayesian learning in episodic, finite-horizon zero-sum Markov games with unknown transition and reward models. We investigate a posterior algorithm in which each player maintains a Bayesian posterior over the game model, independently samples a game model at the beginning of each episode, and computes an equilibrium policy for the sampled model. We analyze two settings: (i) Both players use the posterior sampling algorithm, and (ii) Only one player uses posterior sampling while the opponent follows an arbitrary learning algorithm. In each setting, we provide guarantees on the expected regret of the posterior sampling agent. Our notion of regret compares the expected total reward of the learning agent against the expected total reward under equilibrium policies of the true game. Our main theoretical result is an expected regret bound for the posterior sampling agent of order $O(HS\sqrt{ABHK\log(SABHK)})$ where $K$ is the number of episodes, $H$ is the episode length, $S$ is the number of states, and $A,B$ are the action space sizes of the two players. Experiments in a grid-world predator--prey domain illustrate the sublinear regret scaling and show that posterior sampling competes favorably with a fictitious-play baseline.

</details>


### [756] [Breaking the $O(\sqrt{T})$ Cumulative Constraint Violation Barrier while Achieving $O(\sqrt{T})$ Static Regret in Constrained Online Convex Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20671)
*Haricharan Balasundaram,Karthick Krishna Mahendran,Rahul Vaze*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文研究了约束在线凸优化问题，提出了在d=2时能同时实现O(√T)遗憾和O(T^{1/3})累积约束违反的算法，打破了之前认为两者不能同时达到O(√T)的普遍认知。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线凸优化中，同时最小化静态遗憾和累积约束违反是一个重要问题。先前研究普遍认为当d≥2时，任何确保O(√T)遗憾的算法在最坏情况下都会产生Ω(√T)的累积约束违反。本文旨在挑战这一认知，证明在d=2时可以做得更好。

Method: 基于Vaze和Sinha[2025]的算法框架，针对二维情况(d=2)进行改进和理论分析。算法在每轮选择动作时同时考虑损失函数和约束函数，通过特定的更新机制来平衡遗憾和约束违反。

Result: 证明了在d=2时，算法能同时实现O(√T)的静态遗憾和O(T^{1/3})的累积约束违反，打破了先前认为两者不能同时达到O(√T)的普遍认知。

Conclusion: 本文展示了在二维约束在线凸优化中，可以同时获得次线性遗憾和比平方根更小的约束违反，为这一领域提供了新的理论洞见。

Abstract: The problem of constrained online convex optimization is considered, where at each round, once a learner commits to an action $x_t \in \mathcal{X} \subset \mathbb{R}^d$, a convex loss function $f_t$ and a convex constraint function $g_t$ that drives the constraint $g_t(x)\le 0$ are revealed. The objective is to simultaneously minimize the static regret and cumulative constraint violation (CCV) compared to the benchmark that knows the loss functions and constraint functions $f_t$ and $g_t$ for all $t$ ahead of time, and chooses a static optimal action that is feasible with respect to all $g_t(x)\le 0$. In recent prior work Sinha and Vaze [2024], algorithms with simultaneous regret of $O(\sqrt{T})$ and CCV of $O(\sqrt{T})$ or (CCV of $O(1)$ in specific cases Vaze and Sinha [2025], e.g. when $d=1$) have been proposed. It is widely believed that CCV is $Ω(\sqrt{T})$ for all algorithms that ensure that regret is $O(\sqrt{T})$ with the worst case input for any $d\ge 2$. In this paper, we refute this and show that the algorithm of Vaze and Sinha [2025] simultaneously achieves regret of $O(\sqrt{T})$ regret and CCV of $O(T^{1/3})$ when $d=2$.

</details>


### [757] [Evaluating Uplift Modeling under Structural Biases: Insights into Metric Stability and Model Robustness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20775)
*Yuxuan Yang,Dugang Liu,Yiyan Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个用于提升模型评估的系统化基准测试框架，重点关注现实数据中的偏差问题（选择偏差、溢出效应、未观测混杂），通过半合成方法保留真实特征依赖并提供反事实真值，研究发现提升目标与预测是不同的目标，TARNet模型在多种偏差下表现稳健，ATE近似指标能提供更一致的模型排名。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 个性化营销中的提升模型用于估计不同处理下的增量效应，但现实数据存在选择偏差、溢出效应和未观测混杂等偏差，这些偏差影响估计准确性和指标有效性。目前缺乏系统化的偏差感知评估研究，需要建立系统化的基准测试框架来填补这一空白。

Method: 采用半合成方法构建基准测试框架，既保留真实世界数据的特征依赖关系，又提供反事实真值以隔离结构性偏差。该框架能够系统评估不同提升模型在各种偏差条件下的表现，并分析评估指标的稳定性。

Result: 研究发现：(1) 提升目标与预测是不同的目标，擅长一个不一定擅长另一个；(2) 许多模型在不同偏差下表现不一致，但TARNet表现出显著稳健性；(3) 评估指标的稳定性与其与ATE的数学对齐程度相关，ATE近似指标在结构性数据缺陷下能提供更一致的模型排名。

Conclusion: 研究结果表明需要开发更稳健的提升模型和评估指标。半合成基准测试框架为系统评估偏差条件下的提升模型提供了有效工具，TARNet的稳健性为后续模型设计提供了洞见，ATE近似指标应优先考虑用于模型评估。

Abstract: In personalized marketing, uplift models estimate incremental effects by modeling how customer behavior changes under alternative treatments. However, real-world data often exhibit biases - such as selection bias, spillover effects, and unobserved confounding - which adversely affect both estimation accuracy and metric validity. Despite the importance of bias-aware assessment, a lack of systematic studies persists. To bridge this gap, we design a systematic benchmarking framework. Unlike standard predictive tasks, real-world uplift datasets lack counterfactual ground truth, rendering direct metric validation infeasible. Therefore, a semi-synthetic approach serves as a critical enabler for systematic benchmarking, effectively bridging the gap by retaining real-world feature dependencies while providing the ground truth needed to isolate structural biases. Our investigations reveal that: (i) uplift targeting and prediction can manifest as distinct objectives, where proficiency in one does not ensure efficacy in the other; (ii) while many models exhibit inconsistent performance under diverse biases, TARNet shows notable robustness, providing insights for subsequent model design; (iii) evaluation metric stability is linked to mathematical alignment with the ATE, suggesting that ATE-approximating metrics yield more consistent model rankings under structural data imperfections. These findings suggest the need for more robust uplift models and metrics. Code will be released upon acceptance.

</details>


### [758] [Incentive-Aware Federated Averaging with Performance Guarantees under Strategic Participation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20873)
*Fateme Maleki,Krishnan Raghavan,Farzad Yousefian*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种激励感知的联邦平均方法，通过纳什均衡寻求更新规则动态调整客户端数据参与策略，在保证全局模型性能的同时实现稳定的数据参与。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习虽然能提高全局模型性能，但个体客户端可能策略性地权衡学习收益与贡献本地数据的成本。需要设计能够成功保留参与客户端的联邦学习框架。

Method: 提出激励感知的联邦平均方法：每个通信轮次中，客户端传输本地模型参数和更新的训练数据集大小到服务器。数据集大小通过纳什均衡寻求更新规则动态调整，捕捉策略性数据参与。

Result: 在凸和非凸全局目标设置下分析了所提方法，建立了激励感知联邦学习算法的性能保证。在MNIST和CIFAR-10数据集上的数值实验表明，客户端在实现竞争性全局模型性能的同时收敛到稳定的数据参与策略。

Conclusion: 该方法能够有效平衡全局模型性能与客户端参与激励，为联邦学习中的策略性数据贡献问题提供了解决方案。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) is a communication-efficient collaborative learning framework that enables model training across multiple agents with private local datasets. While the benefits of FL in improving global model performance are well established, individual agents may behave strategically, balancing the learning payoff against the cost of contributing their local data. Motivated by the need for FL frameworks that successfully retain participating agents, we propose an incentive-aware federated averaging method in which, at each communication round, clients transmit both their local model parameters and their updated training dataset sizes to the server. The dataset sizes are dynamically adjusted via a Nash equilibrium (NE)-seeking update rule that captures strategic data participation. We analyze the proposed method under convex and nonconvex global objective settings and establish performance guarantees for the resulting incentive-aware FL algorithm. Numerical experiments on the MNIST and CIFAR-10 datasets demonstrate that agents achieve competitive global model performance while converging to stable data participation strategies.

</details>


### [759] [Bayesian Scattering: A Principled Baseline for Uncertainty on Image Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20908)
*Bernardo Fichera,Zarko Ivkovic,Kjell Jorner,Philipp Hennig,Viacheslav Borovitskiy*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出Bayesian scattering作为图像不确定性量化的可解释、数学基础的基线方法，结合小波散射变换（非学习特征提取器）与简单概率头，在分布偏移下提供合理的不确定性估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前图像数据的不确定性量化领域被复杂的深度学习方法主导，但缺乏可解释、数学基础的基线方法。作者希望提出类似贝叶斯线性回归在表格数据中的角色，为图像不确定性量化提供第一个基准方法。

Method: 方法结合小波散射变换（一种基于几何原理的深度非学习特征提取器）与简单概率头。小波散射特征是从几何原理推导而非学习得到，避免了过拟合训练分布，从而在显著分布偏移下提供合理的不确定性估计。

Result: 在多个任务上验证了方法的有效性，包括机构偏移下的医学影像、国家间偏移下的财富映射、以及分子特性的贝叶斯优化。结果表明Bayesian scattering是复杂不确定性量化方法的坚实基线。

Conclusion: Bayesian scattering填补了图像不确定性量化领域缺乏可解释、数学基础基线的空白，可作为复杂方法的基准参考。

Abstract: Uncertainty quantification for image data is dominated by complex deep learning methods, yet the field lacks an interpretable, mathematically grounded baseline. We propose Bayesian scattering to fill this gap, serving as a first-step baseline akin to the role of Bayesian linear regression for tabular data. Our method couples the wavelet scattering transform-a deep, non-learned feature extractor-with a simple probabilistic head. Because scattering features are derived from geometric principles rather than learned, they avoid overfitting the training distribution. This helps provide sensible uncertainty estimates even under significant distribution shifts. We validate this on diverse tasks, including medical imaging under institution shift, wealth mapping under country-to-country shift, and Bayesian optimization of molecular properties. Our results suggest that Bayesian scattering is a solid baseline for complex uncertainty quantification methods.

</details>


### [760] [Joint Surrogate Learning of Objectives, Constraints, and Sensitivities for Efficient Multi-objective Optimization of Neural Dynamical Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20984)
*Frithjof Gressmann,Ivan Georgiev Raikov,Seung Hyun Kim,Mattia Gazzola,Lawrence Rauchwerger,Ivan Soltesz*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: DMOSOPT是一个可扩展的优化框架，使用联合学习的代理模型处理高维约束优化问题，特别适用于计算神经科学中的生物物理模拟


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物物理神经模拟计算需求巨大，需要在无梯度信号的高维参数空间中导航，同时处理大量约束条件，这些约束将空间划分为可行/不可行区域，传统优化方法难以应对

Method: 提出DMOSOPT框架，通过联合学习的统一代理模型捕捉目标、约束和参数敏感性之间的相互作用，学习目标景观和可行性边界的平滑近似，提供统一梯度指导搜索

Result: 从单细胞动力学到群体网络活动，在神经回路建模工作流程的各个阶段验证了框架有效性，在超级计算规模上实现了高效优化，显著减少了问题评估次数

Conclusion: 虽然受计算神经科学启发，但DMOSOPT是一个通用框架，适用于科学和工程领域的约束多目标优化问题

Abstract: Biophysical neural system simulations are among the most computationally demanding scientific applications, and their optimization requires navigating high-dimensional parameter spaces under numerous constraints that impose a binary feasible/infeasible partition with no gradient signal to guide the search. Here, we introduce DMOSOPT, a scalable optimization framework that leverages a unified, jointly learned surrogate model to capture the interplay between objectives, constraints, and parameter sensitivities. By learning a smooth approximation of both the objective landscape and the feasibility boundary, the joint surrogate provides a unified gradient that simultaneously steers the search toward improved objective values and greater constraint satisfaction, while its partial derivatives yield per-parameter sensitivity estimates that enable more targeted exploration. We validate the framework from single-cell dynamics to population-level network activity, spanning incremental stages of a neural circuit modeling workflow, and demonstrate efficient, effective optimization of highly constrained problems at supercomputing scale with substantially fewer problem evaluations. While motivated by and demonstrated in the context of computational neuroscience, the framework is general and applicable to constrained multi-objective optimization problems across scientific and engineering domains.

</details>


### [761] [Constrained Online Convex Optimization with Memory and Predictions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21375)
*Mohammed Abdullah,George Iosifidis,Salah Eddine Elayoubi,Tijani Chahed*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文研究了带记忆的约束在线凸优化问题，提出了首个在时变约束下实现次线性遗憾和次线性累积约束违反的算法，包括无预测和有预测两种场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是扩展经典的约束在线凸优化框架，使其能够处理损失函数和约束条件都依赖于过去有限窗口决策的场景。这种设置能够更好地建模实际问题，如约束动态系统控制和具有重新配置预算的调度问题。

Method: 提出了两种主要方法：1）无预测场景下，采用自适应惩罚方法保证次线性遗憾和约束违反；2）有预测场景下，将问题重新解释为带延迟反馈的在线学习，设计乐观算法，其性能随预测精度提高而改善，同时在预测不准确时保持鲁棒性。

Result: 论文提出了首个在带记忆的约束在线凸优化中实现次线性遗憾和次线性累积约束违反的算法，填补了经典约束在线凸优化与记忆依赖设置之间的空白，提供了一个适用于多种应用场景的通用学习工具箱。

Conclusion: 该研究成功地将约束在线凸优化扩展到记忆依赖场景，提出的算法框架能够处理时变约束，并在有无预测的情况下都能保证性能，为控制约束动态系统和调度等实际问题提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: We study Constrained Online Convex Optimization with Memory (COCO-M), where both the loss and the constraints depend on a finite window of past decisions made by the learner. This setting extends the previously studied unconstrained online optimization with memory framework and captures practical problems such as the control of constrained dynamical systems and scheduling with reconfiguration budgets. For this problem, we propose the first algorithms that achieve sublinear regret and sublinear cumulative constraint violation under time-varying constraints, both with and without predictions of future loss and constraint functions. Without predictions, we introduce an adaptive penalty approach that guarantees sublinear regret and constraint violation. When short-horizon and potentially unreliable predictions are available, we reinterpret the problem as online learning with delayed feedback and design an optimistic algorithm whose performance improves as prediction accuracy improves, while remaining robust when predictions are inaccurate. Our results bridge the gap between classical constrained online convex optimization and memory-dependent settings, and provide a versatile learning toolbox with diverse applications.

</details>


### [762] [MISApp: Multi-Hop Intent-Aware Session Graph Learning for Next App Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21653)
*Yunchi Yang,Longlong Li,Jianliang Wu,Cunquan Qu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: MISApp：基于多跳会话图学习的无配置文件移动应用预测框架，通过构建多跳会话图捕获不同结构范围的转移依赖，在标准设置和冷启动条件下均优于现有基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确预测用户下一个要启动的移动应用对于主动式移动服务至关重要。但在现实场景中，用户意图可能在短会话内快速变化，且用户特定历史配置文件通常稀疏或不可用（尤其在冷启动条件下）。现有方法主要将应用使用建模为顺序行为或局部会话转移，限制了捕获高阶结构依赖和演化会话意图的能力。

Method: 提出MISApp框架：1) 构建多跳会话图以捕获不同结构范围的转移依赖；2) 通过轻量级图传播学习会话表示；3) 结合时空上下文表征会话条件；4) 从最近交互中捕获意图演化。

Result: 在两个真实世界应用使用数据集上的实验表明，MISApp在标准设置和冷启动条件下均一致优于竞争基线，同时在预测准确性和实际效率之间保持良好平衡。进一步分析显示，学习到的跳级注意力权重与结构相关性良好对齐，为多跳建模策略的有效性提供了可解释证据。

Conclusion: MISApp通过多跳会话图学习有效解决了移动应用预测中的冷启动和意图演化挑战，提供了准确且高效的无配置文件预测解决方案，其可解释的注意力机制增强了模型的可信度。

Abstract: Predicting the next mobile app a user will launch is essential for proactive mobile services. Yet accurate prediction remains challenging in real-world settings, where user intent can shift rapidly within short sessions and user-specific historical profiles are often sparse or unavailable, especially under cold-start conditions. Existing approaches mainly model app usage as sequential behavior or local session transitions, limiting their ability to capture higher-order structural dependencies and evolving session intent. To address this issue, we propose MISApp, a profile-free framework for next app prediction based on multi-hop session graph learning. MISApp constructs multi-hop session graphs to capture transition dependencies at different structural ranges, learns session representations through lightweight graph propagation, incorporates temporal and spatial context to characterize session conditions, and captures intent evolution from recent interactions. Experiments on two real-world app usage datasets show that MISApp consistently outperforms competitive baselines under both standard and cold-start settings, while maintaining a favorable balance between predictive accuracy and practical efficiency. Further analyses show that the learned hop-level attention weights align well with structural relevance, offering interpretable evidence for the effectiveness of the proposed multi-hop modeling strategy.

</details>


### [763] [Deriving Health Metrics from the Photoplethysmogram: Benchmarks and Insights from MIMIC-III-Ext-PPG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21832)
*Mohammad Moulaeifard,Philip J. Aston,Peter H. Charlton,Nils Strodthoff*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个基于PPG（光电容积描记术）信号的临床预测综合基准，使用大规模数据集评估多类心律失常分类和生理参数回归任务，首次全面评估了除房颤外的普通心律失常检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PPG是临床预测中最广泛采集的生物信号之一，但现有算法通常在质量不确定的小规模数据集上训练，这阻碍了有意义的算法比较。需要建立全面的基准来评估PPG在各种临床相关应用中的性能。

Method: 使用大规模PPG数据集建立基准，评估多类心脏节律分类（包括普通心律失常检测）和生理参数回归（呼吸率、心率、血压）。采用已建立的深度学习架构，并进行跨数据集验证和临床亚组分析。

Result: 房颤检测达到AUROC=0.96的优异性能；生理参数估计准确：呼吸率MAE=2.97 bpm，心率MAE=1.13 bpm，收缩压/舒张压MAE=16.13/8.70 mmHg。跨数据集验证显示房颤检测泛化性优秀（AUROC=0.97）。亚组分析显示不同血压、心率和人口统计学亚组间存在显著性能差异。

Conclusion: 该框架建立了首个多任务PPG临床预测集成基准，证明PPG信号能有效支持多个同时监测任务，为未来算法开发提供了重要基线。性能差异反映了人群特异性波形差异而非模型行为的系统性偏差。

Abstract: Photoplethysmography (PPG) is one of the most widely captured biosignals for clinical prediction tasks, yet PPG-based algorithms are typically trained on small-scale datasets of uncertain quality, which hinders meaningful algorithm comparisons. We present a comprehensive benchmark for PPG-based clinical prediction using the \dbname~dataset, establishing baselines across the full spectrum of clinically relevant applications: multi-class heart rhythm classification, and regression of physiological parameters including respiratory rate (RR), heart rate (HR), and blood pressure (BP). Most notably, we provide the first comprehensive assessment of PPG for general arrhythmia detection beyond atrial fibrillation (AF) and atrial flutter (AFLT), with performance stratified by BP, HR, and demographic subgroups. Using established deep learning architectures, we achieved strong performance for AF detection (AUROC = 0.96) and accurate physiological parameter estimation (RR MAE: 2.97 bpm; HR MAE: 1.13 bpm; SBP/DBP MAE: 16.13/8.70 mmHg). Cross-dataset validation demonstrates excellent generalizability for AF detection (AUROC = 0.97), while clinical subgroup analysis reveals marked performance differences across subgroups by BP, HR, and demographic strata. These variations appear to reflect population-specific waveform differences rather than systematic bias in model behavior. This framework establishes the first integrated benchmark for multi-task PPG-based clinical prediction, demonstrating that PPG signals can effectively support multiple simultaneous monitoring tasks and providing essential baselines for future algorithm development.

</details>


### [764] [SmaAT-QMix-UNet: A Parameter-Efficient Vector-Quantized UNet for Precipitation Nowcasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21879)
*Nikolas Stavrou,Siamak Mehrkanoon*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: SmaAT-QMix-UNet是SmaAT-UNet的增强变体，用于降水临近预报，通过向量量化瓶颈和混合核深度卷积减少模型大小并提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统数值天气预报系统计算密集，不适合某些应用场景。深度学习模型在临近预报任务中展现出潜力，需要更高效、性能更好的模型。

Method: 在SmaAT-UNet基础上引入两个创新：1) 编码器-解码器桥接处的向量量化瓶颈，2) 用混合核深度卷积替换部分编码器和解码器块。在荷兰雷达降水数据集上训练和评估。

Result: 评估了三种配置：仅使用VQ、仅使用MixConv、完整SmaAT-QMix-UNet。模型既减小了尺寸又提升了临近预报性能，并通过Grad-CAM和UMAP可视化提供了可解释性分析。

Conclusion: SmaAT-QMix-UNet通过向量量化和混合核卷积的集成，为降水临近预报提供了更高效、性能更好的深度学习解决方案。

Abstract: Weather forecasting supports critical socioeconomic activities and complements environmental protection, yet operational Numerical Weather Prediction (NWP) systems remain computationally intensive, thus being inefficient for certain applications. Meanwhile, recent advances in deep data-driven models have demonstrated promising results in nowcasting tasks. This paper presents SmaAT-QMix-UNet, an enhanced variant of SmaAT-UNet that introduces two key innovations: a vector quantization (VQ) bottleneck at the encoder-decoder bridge, and mixed kernel depth-wise convolutions (MixConv) replacing selected encoder and decoder blocks. These enhancements both reduce the model's size and improve its nowcasting performance. We train and evaluate SmaAT-QMix-UNet on a Dutch radar precipitation dataset (2016-2019), predicting precipitation 30 minutes ahead. Three configurations are benchmarked: using only VQ, only MixConv, and the full SmaAT-QMix-UNet. Grad-CAM saliency maps highlight the regions influencing each nowcast, while a UMAP embedding of the codewords illustrates how the VQ layer clusters encoder outputs. The source code for SmaAT-QMix-UNet is publicly available on GitHub \footnote{\href{https://github.com/nstavr04/MasterThesisSnellius}{https://github.com/nstavr04/MasterThesisSnellius}}.

</details>


### [765] [SparseDVFS: Sparse-Aware DVFS for Energy-Efficient Edge Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21908)
*Ziyang Zhang,Zheshun Wu,Jie Liu,Luca Mottola*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: SparseDVFS：面向边缘推理的细粒度稀疏感知DVFS框架，通过算子稀疏性指导硬件频率调节，实现78.17%的能效提升


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘设备部署DNN面临能效挑战。传统DVFS方法存在两难：模型级调节粒度太粗，无法捕捉推理内部变化；算子级调节粒度太细，硬件切换延迟导致性能严重下降。需要一种既能精细调节又能避免切换开销的解决方案。

Method: 1. 离线建模器：通过白盒时间线分析，建立算子稀疏性与最优频率三元组（CPU/GPU/EMC）的确定性映射
2. 运行时图分区器：使用贪心合并启发式算法将算子聚合成超块，通过延迟摊销约束平衡调节粒度与DVFS切换延迟
3. 统一协同控制器：采用频率统一缩放引擎（FUSE）和前瞻指令队列，消除独立控制器间的对抗效应并隐藏硬件切换延迟

Result: SparseDVFS相比现有最优方案平均提升78.17%的能效，同时保持14%的优异成本收益比

Conclusion: SparseDVFS通过稀疏感知的细粒度DVFS调节，有效解决了边缘推理的能效优化问题，在精细调节与切换开销间取得了良好平衡

Abstract: Deploying deep neural networks (DNNs) on power-sensitive edge devices presents a formidable challenge. While Dynamic Voltage and Frequency Scaling (DVFS) is widely employed for energy optimization, traditional model-level scaling is often too coarse to capture intra-inference variations, whereas fine-grained operator-level scaling suffers from prohibitive performance degradation due to significant hardware switching latency. This paper presents SparseDVFS, a fine-grained, sparse-aware DVFS framework designed for energy-efficient edge inference. Our key insight is that operator sparsity is a primary metric for hardware frequency modulation. By distinguishing between compute-bound dense operators and memory-bound sparse operators, the system can apply specialized frequency triplets to maximize energy efficiency. To overcome switching overheads and component interference, SparseDVFS incorporates three key innovations: (1) an offline modeler that established a deterministic mapping between operator sparsity and optimal frequency triplets (CPU/GPU/EMC) via white-box timeline analysis; (2) a runtime graph partitioner that utilizes a greedy merging heuristic to aggregate operators into super-blocks, balancing scaling granularity and DVFS switching latency through a latency amortization constraint; and (3) a unified co-governor that employs a frequency unified scaling engine (FUSE) and a look-ahead instruction queue to eliminate antagonistic effects between independent controllers and hide hardware transition latencies. Extensive evaluations show that SparseDVFS achieves an average 78.17% energy efficiency gain over state-of-the-art solutions while maintaining a superior 14% cost-gain ratio.

</details>


### [766] [Viability-Preserving Passive Torque Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.03367)
*Zizhe Zhang,Yicong Wang,Zhiquan Zhang,Tianyu Li,Nadia Figueroa*

Main category: eess.SY

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出一种基于生存性理论的机器人安全控制框架，通过预计算状态空间中的安全集合，结合二次规划约束被动控制器，确保机器人在无限时间范围内保持安全状态


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于被动性的力矩控制器通常无约束，在外部扰动下可能导致安全违规。需要一种能确保机器人在无限时间范围内始终保持在安全状态空间内的控制方法

Method: 1) 使用生存性理论预计算关节位置和速度状态空间中的安全集合；2) 通过数据驱动和解析方法构建避免自碰撞、外部物体碰撞以及关节位置/速度限制的可行集合；3) 基于二次规划的控制框架将这些约束施加在跟踪动态系统的被动控制器上

Result: 在7自由度Franka Emika机械臂上通过仿真和硬件实验验证。相比基准约束被动控制器，该方法在更高控制回路频率下运行，产生更平滑的轨迹

Conclusion: 提出的框架能够确保机器人状态在无限时间范围内保持在安全集合内，提高了机器人操作的安全性和控制性能

Abstract: Conventional passivity-based torque controllers for manipulators are typically unconstrained, which can lead to safety violations under external perturbations. In this paper, we employ viability theory to pre-compute safe sets in the state-space of joint positions and velocities. These viable sets, constructed via data-driven and analytical methods for self-collision avoidance, external object collision avoidance and joint-position and joint-velocity limits, provide constraints on joint accelerations and thus joint torques via the robot dynamics. A quadratic programming-based control framework enforces these constraints on a passive controller tracking a dynamical system, ensuring the robot states remain within the safe set in an infinite time horizon. We validate the proposed approach through simulations and hardware experiments on a 7-DoF Franka Emika manipulator. In comparison to a baseline constrained passive controller, our method operates at higher control-loop rates and yields smoother trajectories.

</details>


### [767] [Compact Lifted Relaxations for Low-Rank Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20228)
*Ryan Cory-Wright,Jean Pauphilet*

Main category: math.OC

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了针对秩约束二次优化问题的可处理凸松弛方法，通过提升半定规划技术，在不依赖谱结构的情况下，为低秩矩阵优化问题提供可扩展的紧致松弛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 秩约束二次优化问题在机器学习中广泛存在，但传统方法通常需要目标函数或约束具有谱结构（置换不变性）。本文旨在为更一般的秩约束二次优化问题开发可处理的凸松弛方法，特别是针对那些缺乏谱结构的问题。

Method: 采用提升半定规划技术，通过引入额外的变量将原问题转化为半定规划松弛。虽然直接提升会导致维度为n²+nm+1的大规模半定约束，但作者证明了矩矩阵的许多块是冗余的，从而推导出仅包含维度为nm+1和n+m的两个半定约束的紧致松弛。对于矩阵补全、基追踪和降秩回归等具体问题，进一步利用结构特性获得维度最多为2max(n,m)的更紧凑公式。

Result: 获得了针对广泛低秩二次问题的可扩展半定边界，为矩阵补全、基追踪和降秩回归等实际问题提供了高效的凸松弛方法，显著降低了计算复杂度。

Conclusion: 本文开发了一套通用的凸松弛框架，能够处理缺乏谱结构的秩约束二次优化问题，通过巧妙的降维技术实现了可扩展性，为低秩矩阵优化问题提供了实用的理论工具。

Abstract: We develop tractable convex relaxations for rank-constrained quadratic optimization problems over $n \times m$ matrices, a setting for which tractable relaxations are typically only available when the objective or constraints admit spectral (permutation-invariant) structure. We derive lifted semidefinite relaxations that do not require such spectral terms. Although a direct lifting introduces a large semidefinite constraint in dimension $n^2 + nm + 1$, we prove that many blocks of moment matrix are redundant and derive an equivalent compact relaxation that only involves two semidefinite constraints of dimension $nm + 1$ and $n+m$ respectively. For matrix completion, basis pursuit, and reduced-rank regression problems, we exploit additional structure to obtain even more compact formulations involving semidefinite matrices of dimension at most $2\max(n,m)$. Overall, we obtain scalable semidefinite bounds for a broad class of low-rank quadratic problems.

</details>


### [768] [A chemical language model for reticular materials design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20389)
*Dhruv Menon,Vivek Singh,Xu Chen,Mohammad Reza Alizadeh Kiapi,Ivan Zyuzin,Hamish W. Macleod,Nakul Rampal,William Shepard,Omar M. Yaghi,David Fairen-Jimenez*

Main category: cond-mat.mtrl-sci

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: Nexerra-R1是一个用于网状化学逆设计的构建块化学语言模型，通过生成有机连接体来设计金属有机框架材料，实现了从计算设计到可合成框架的直接转化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网状化学虽然已经合成了数万种金属有机框架，但新材料发现仍主要依赖直觉驱动的连接体设计和迭代实验，只能探索巨大化学空间的一小部分，限制了针对特定性质框架的系统发现。

Method: 开发了Nexerra-R1构建块化学语言模型，在分子构建块层面操作，支持无约束生成低连接性连接体和支架约束的对称多齿基元设计。结合流引导分布目标导向，将生成过程引导至应用相关目标，同时保持化学有效性和组装可行性。

Result: 模型成功重新发现了已知MOFs，并提出了完全在计算机中生成的先前未报道的框架CU-525的实验合成方案，验证了该逆设计策略的有效性。

Conclusion: 建立了一个通用的网状材料逆设计范式，其中可控的化学语言建模实现了从计算设计到可合成框架的直接转化。

Abstract: Reticular chemistry has enabled the synthesis of tens of thousands of metal-organic frameworks (MOFs), yet the discovery of new materials still relies largely on intuition-driven linker design and iterative experimentation. As a result, researchers explore only a small fraction of the vast chemical space accessible to reticular materials, limiting the systematic discovery of frameworks with targeted properties. Here, we introduce Nexerra-R1, a building-block chemical language model that enables inverse design in reticular chemistry through the targeted generation of organic linkers. Rather than generating complete frameworks directly, Nexerra-R1 operates at the level of molecular building blocks, preserving the modular logic that underpins reticular synthesis. The model supports both unconstrained generation of low-connectivity linkers and scaffold-constrained design of symmetric multidentate motifs compatible with predefined nodes and topologies. We further combine linker generation with flow-guided distributional targeting to steer the generative process toward application-relevant objectives while maintaining chemical validity and assembly feasibility. The generated linkers are subsequently assembled into three-dimensional frameworks and are structurally optimized to produce candidate materials compatible with experimental synthesis. Using Nexerra-R1, we validate this strategy by rediscovering known MOFs and by proposing the experimental synthesis of a previously unreported framework, CU-525, generated entirely in silico. Together, these results establish a general inverse-design paradigm for reticular materials in which controllable chemical language modelling enables the direct translation from computational design to synthesizable frameworks.

</details>


### [769] [Verifiable Error Bounds for Physics-Informed Neural KKL Observers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20434)
*Hannah Berin-Costain,Harry Wang,Kirsten Morris,Jun Liu*

Main category: eess.SY

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于学习的KKL观测器的可计算状态估计误差界，解决了现有方法缺乏可计算误差界的问题，并扩展到有界加性测量噪声情况。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习的KKL观测器方法（使用PINN学习KKL变换映射和传统神经网络学习左逆映射）缺乏可计算的状态估计误差界，这限制了该方法在实际应用中的可靠性和可信度。

Method: 1. 推导状态估计误差界，该界仅依赖于可通过神经网络验证在指定区域上认证的量
2. 将结果扩展到有界加性测量噪声情况
3. 在非线性基准系统上演示保证

Result: 成功推导出可计算的状态估计误差界，该界可通过神经网络验证工具进行认证，并在非线性基准系统上验证了所提方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 本文为基于学习的KKL观测器提供了首个可计算的状态估计误差界，增强了该方法的可信度和实用性，特别是在安全关键应用中。

Abstract: This paper proposes a computable state-estimation error bound for learning-based Kazantzis--Kravaris/Luenberger (KKL) observers. Recent work learns the KKL transformation map with a physics-informed neural network (PINN) and a corresponding left-inverse map with a conventional neural network. However, no computable state-estimation error bounds are currently available for this approach. We derive a state-estimation error bound that depends only on quantities that can be certified over a prescribed region using neural network verification. We further extend the result to bounded additive measurement noise and demonstrate the guarantees on nonlinear benchmark systems.

</details>


### [770] [Ontology-driven personalized information retrieval for XML documents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21139)
*Ounnaci Iddir,Ahmed-ouamer Rachid,Tai Dinh*

Main category: cs.IR

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出一个结合领域本体和用户档案的XML文档检索框架，通过语义相似度计算实现个性化检索，相比传统关键词方法提高了精确率和召回率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统信息检索系统忽略用户特定需求，对相同查询返回相同结果，无法适应不同用户的知识、偏好和目标差异。需要更个性化的XML文档检索方法。

Method: 整合领域本体和用户档案到检索过程，将文档、查询和用户档案表示为加权概念向量。本体应用概念加权机制强调层次结构中较低层的具体概念，使用语义相似度度量评估相关性。

Result: 实验结果表明，结合本体和用户档案提高了检索效果，相比基于关键词的方法获得了更高的精确率和召回率。

Conclusion: 提出的框架增强了XML搜索结果的相关性和适应性，支持更以用户为中心的检索。

Abstract: This paper addresses the challenge of improving information retrieval from semi-structured eXtensible Markup Language (XML) documents. Traditional information retrieval systems (IRS) often overlook user-specific needs and return identical results for the same query, despite differences in users' knowledge, preferences, and objectives. We integrate external semantic resources, namely a domain ontology and user profiles, into the retrieval process. Documents, queries, and user profiles are represented as vectors of weighted concepts. The ontology applies a concept-weighting mechanism that emphasizes highly specific concepts, as lower-level nodes in the hierarchy provide more precise and targeted information. Relevance is assessed using semantic similarity measures that capture conceptual relationships beyond keyword matching, enabling personalized and fine-grained matching among user profiles, queries, and documents. Experimental results show that combining ontologies with user profiles improves retrieval effectiveness, achieving higher precision and recall than keyword-based approaches. Overall, the proposed framework enhances the relevance and adaptability of XML search results, supporting more user-centered retrieval.

</details>


### [771] [Accelerate Vector Diffusion Maps by Landmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21247)
*Sing-Yuan Yeh,Yi-An Wu,Hau-Tieng Wu,Mao-Pei Tsui*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出LA-VDM算法，通过地标约束加速向量扩散映射框架，采用两阶段归一化处理非均匀采样密度，在流形模型下能准确恢复平行传输，收敛于连接拉普拉斯算子


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有向量扩散映射(VDM)框架基于图连接拉普拉斯算子(GCL)能捕捉复杂数据集中的成对连接关系，但计算效率有待提升。需要一种加速方法，同时处理数据点和地标点集的非均匀采样密度问题

Method: 提出LA-VDM（地标加速向量扩散映射）算法：1）引入地标约束加速VDM框架；2）采用新颖的两阶段归一化技术，分别处理数据和地标集的非均匀采样密度；3）在具有框架束结构的流形模型下，通过地标约束扩散从点云中准确恢复平行传输

Result: 理论证明：LA-VDM渐近收敛于连接拉普拉斯算子；实验验证：在模拟数据集上展示性能和准确性，应用于非局部图像去噪任务

Conclusion: LA-VDM有效加速了VDM框架，通过两阶段归一化解决了非均匀采样问题，在流形学习框架下具有理论保证，适用于复杂数据分析和图像处理任务

Abstract: We propose a landmark-constrained algorithm, LA-VDM (Landmark Accelerated Vector Diffusion Maps), to accelerate the Vector Diffusion Maps (VDM) framework built upon the Graph Connection Laplacian (GCL), which captures pairwise connection relationships within complex datasets. LA-VDM introduces a novel two-stage normalization that effectively address nonuniform sampling densities in both the data and the landmark sets. Under a manifold model with the frame bundle structure, we show that we can accurately recover the parallel transport with landmark-constrained diffusion from a point cloud, and hence asymptotically LA-VDM converges to the connection Laplacian. The performance and accuracy of LA-VDM are demonstrated through experiments on simulated datasets and an application to nonlocal image denoising.

</details>


### [772] [Which Alert Removals are Beneficial?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21322)
*Idan Amit*

Main category: cs.SE

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 该研究评估了静态分析警告移除对代码复杂度和bug倾向性的影响，通过随机对照试验、标签函数分析和监督学习方法，发现复杂度降低的干预能减少未来bug概率，相关方法可用于因果研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 静态分析能够捕获软件工程知识并警告可能的问题模式，已有研究表明这些警告对各种问题具有预测能力。然而，移除这些警告的实际影响尚不清楚。本研究旨在评估警告移除对代码复杂度和bug倾向性的影响。

Method: 采用三种互补方法：1）进行随机对照试验，构建包含521个手动警告移除干预的数据集；2）使用标签函数分析类似干预的自然事件，应用于代码提交以分析对bug倾向性的影响；3）构建包含8,245个警告移除的数据集（比手动干预数据集大15倍以上），应用监督学习预测其对bug倾向性的影响。

Result: 研究发现复杂度降低的干预能够减少未来bug的概率。这类干预与33%的Python文件相关，可能将bug倾向性降低5.5个百分点。

Conclusion: 提出了评估干预影响的方法，这些方法能够识别大量自然干预，对许多领域的因果研究具有重要价值。

Abstract: Context: Static analysis captures software engineering knowledge and alerts on possibly problematic patterns. Previous work showed that they indeed have predictive power for various problems. However, the impact of removing the alerts is unclear. Aim: We would like to evaluate the impact of alert removals on code complexity and the tendency to bugs. Method: We evaluate the impact of removing alerts using three complementary methods. 1. We conducted a randomized controlled trial and built a dataset of 521 manual alert-removing interventions 2. We profiled intervention-like events using labeling functions. We applied these labeling functions to code commits, found intervention-like natural events, and used them to analyze the impact on the tendency to bugs. 3. We built a dataset of 8,245 alert removals, more than 15 times larger than our dataset of manual interventions. We applied supervised learning to the alert removals, aiming to predict their impact on the tendency to bugs. Results: We identified complexity-reducing interventions that reduce the probability of future bugs. Such interventions are relevant to 33\% of Python files and might reduce the tendency to bugs by 5.5 percentage points. Conclusions: We presented methods to evaluate the impact of interventions. The methods can identify a large number of natural interventions that are highly needed in causality research in many domains.

</details>


### [773] [Engineering Distributed Governance for Regional Prosperity: A Socio-Technical Framework for Mitigating Under-Vibrancy via Human Data Engines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21639)
*Amil Khanzada,Takuji Takemoto*

Main category: cs.CY

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 本文提出分布式人类数据引擎（DHDE）框架，用于优化区域经济流动，解决"活力不足"问题。在日本福井县的应用中，AI决策支持系统实现了81%的解释力和68%的预测性能，识别出86.6万未实现访问和约120亿日元收入损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大多数城市信息学和旅游研究关注缓解全球大城市的过度旅游问题。然而，对于经历人口下降和结构停滞的地区，主要风险是"活力不足"——游客密度低抑制经济活动并降低满意度。需要新的方法来优化区域经济流动。

Method: 引入分布式人类数据引擎（DHDE）这一先前在生物危机管理中验证的社会技术框架，并将其适应于区域经济流动优化。使用日本访问量最少县（福井）的高粒度数据，采用AI驱动的决策支持系统分析两个数据集：原始福井消费数据库（90,350条记录）和区域标准化情感数据库（97,719条响应）。

Result: 系统实现了81%的样本内解释力（R² = 0.810）和68%的样本外预测性能（R² = 0.683）。量化了每年86.6万未实现访问的机会缺口，相当于约120亿日元（7620万美元）的收入损失。

Conclusion: 提出了利用DHDE重新分配跨县流动和减少经济泄漏的双重助推治理架构。该方法为应对区域活力不足问题提供了有效的技术解决方案。

Abstract: Most research in urban informatics and tourism focuses on mitigating overtourism in dense global cities. However, for regions experiencing demographic decline and structural stagnation, the primary risk is "under-vibrancy", a condition where low visitor density suppresses economic activity and diminishes satisfaction. This paper introduces the Distributed Human Data Engine (DHDE), a socio-technical framework previously validated in biological crisis management, and adapts it for regional economic flow optimization. Using high-granularity data from Japan's least-visited prefecture (Fukui), we utilize an AI-driven decision support system (DSS) to analyze two datasets: a raw Fukui spending database (90,350 records) and a regional standardized sentiment database (97,719 responses). The system achieves in-sample explanatory power of 81% (R^2 = 0.810) and out-of-sample predictive performance of 68% (R^2 = 0.683). We quantify an annual opportunity gap of 865,917 unrealized visits, equivalent to approximately 11.96 billion yen (USD 76.2 million) in lost revenue. We propose a dual-nudge governance architecture leveraging the DHDE to redistribute cross-prefectural flows and reduce economic leakage.

</details>


### [774] [Structural Concentration in Weighted Networks: A Class of Topology-Aware Indices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21918)
*L. Riso,M. G. Zoia*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 25.0

TL;DR: 提出一个统一框架来测量网络中加权系统的集中度，该框架同时考虑权重分布和网络拓扑结构，超越了传统仅关注权重分散度的指数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统集中度指数（如赫芬达尔-赫希曼指数）只关注权重的分散程度，忽略了权重接收元素之间关系的拓扑结构。在现实系统中，元素通过网络相互作用，网络拓扑会影响系统的结构集中度，因此需要开发能够同时考虑权重分布和网络结构的拓扑感知集中度指数。

Method: 提出了一个统一的框架，核心是网络集中度指数（NCI），定义为归一化的二次型，测量沿观测网络链接实现的潜在加权互连比例。在此基础上构建了灵活的扩展类别，包括加权、密度调整、零模型、度约束、数据转换和多层变体，这些扩展可以修改交互结构或归一化基准。

Result: 理论和实证分析表明，具有相同权重分布的系统可能因网络拓扑而表现出显著不同的结构集中度水平。该框架保留了归一化、不变性和可解释性等关键特性，同时允许在不同依赖维度（包括强度、高阶交互和极端事件）上评估集中度。

Conclusion: 提出的拓扑感知集中度指数框架为测量网络化加权系统的集中度提供了更全面的方法，能够捕捉传统指数忽略的结构信息，适用于经济、金融和复杂系统分析。

Abstract: This paper develops a unified framework for measuring concentration in weighted systems embedded in networks of interactions. While traditional indices such as the Herfindahl-Hirschman Index capture dispersion in weights, they neglect the topology of relationships among the elements receiving those weights. To address this limitation, we introduce a family of topology-aware concentration indices that jointly account for weight distributions and network structure. At the core of the framework lies a baseline Network Concentration Index (NCI), defined as a normalized quadratic form that measures the fraction of potential weighted interconnection realized along observed network links. Building on this foundation, we construct a flexible class of extensions that modify either the interaction structure or the normalization benchmark, including weighted, density-adjusted, null-model, degree-constrained, transformed-data, and multi-layer variants. This family of indices preserves key properties such as normalization, invariance, and interpretability, while allowing concentration to be evaluated across different dimensions of dependence, including intensity, higher-order interactions, and extreme events. Theoretical results characterize the indices and establish their relationship with classical concentration and network measures. Empirical and simulation evidence demonstrate that systems with identical weight distributions may exhibit markedly different levels of structural concentration depending on network topology, highlighting the additional information captured by the proposed framework. The approach is broadly applicable to economic, financial, and complex systems in which weighted elements interact through networks.

</details>


### [775] [High-dimensional online learning via asynchronous decomposition: Non-divergent results, dynamic regularization, and beyond](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20696)
*Shixiang Liu,Zhifan Li,Hanming Yang,Jianxin Yin*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 20.0

TL;DR: 提出异步分解框架，利用汇总统计构建代理评分函数进行在线学习，通过动态正则化迭代硬阈值算法实现稀疏在线优化，解决了高维在线学习中误差界随数据批次增加而发散的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高维在线学习方法面临误差界或每批样本量随数据批次增加而发散的问题，需要开发能够保持稳定误差界的高效在线学习算法。

Method: 提出异步分解框架，利用汇总统计构建当前批次学习的代理评分函数，通过动态正则化迭代硬阈值算法实现计算和内存高效的稀疏在线优化。

Result: 估计器在所有批次中保持非发散误差界和ℓ₀稀疏性，随着批次积累自适应获得额外增益，达到如同访问整个历史数据集且已知真实支持集的oracle精度。

Conclusion: 该框架为高维在线学习提供了理论保证和实用算法，解决了误差发散问题，并在广义线性模型示例中得到验证。

Abstract: Existing high-dimensional online learning methods often face the challenge that their error bounds, or per-batch sample sizes, diverge as the number of data batches increases. To address this issue, we propose an asynchronous decomposition framework that leverages summary statistics to construct a surrogate score function for current-batch learning. This framework is implemented via a dynamic-regularized iterative hard thresholding algorithm, providing a computationally and memory-efficient solution for sparse online optimization. We provide a unified theoretical analysis that accounts for both the streaming computational error and statistical accuracy, establishing that our estimator maintains non-divergent error bounds and $\ell_0$ sparsity across all batches. Furthermore, the proposed estimator adaptively achieves additional gains as batches accumulate, attaining the oracle accuracy as if the entire historical dataset were accessible and the true support were known. These theoretical properties are further illustrated through an example of the generalized linear model.

</details>


### [776] [Hybrid Autoencoder-Isolation Forest approach for time series anomaly detection in C70XP cyclotron operation data at ARRONAX](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20335)
*F Basbous,F Poirier,F Haddad,D Mateus*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出一种结合自编码器和孤立森林的混合方法，用于粒子加速器传感器数据的早期异常检测，能更好检测接近正常数据均值的细微异常


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ARRONAX的C70XP回旋加速器用于医疗和研究用放射性同位素生产，其复杂昂贵的系统容易发生故障导致运行中断。现有孤立森林方法依赖轴平行分割，难以检测接近正常数据均值的细微异常。

Method: 提出混合方法：使用全连接自编码器重构传感器数据，计算均方立方误差作为孤立森林的输入特征，增强对细微异常的检测能力。

Result: 在质子束强度时间序列数据上验证，实验结果表明该方法在检测性能上有明显提升。

Conclusion: 自编码器与孤立森林的混合方法能有效增强对粒子加速器传感器数据中细微异常的检测能力，提高系统运行可靠性。

Abstract: The Interest Public Group ARRONAX's C70XP cyclotron, used for radioisotope production for medical and research applications, relies on complex and costly systems that are prone to failures, leading to operational disruptions. In this context, this study aims to develop a machine learning-based method for early anomaly detection, from sensor measurements over a temporal window, to enhance system performance. One of the most widely recognized methods for anomaly detection is Isolation Forest (IF), known for its effectiveness and scalability. However, its reliance on axis-parallel splits limits its ability to detect subtle anomalies, especially those occurring near the mean of normal data. This study proposes a hybrid approach that combines a fully connected Autoencoder (AE) with IF to enhance the detection of subtle anomalies. In particular, the Mean Cubic Error (MCE) of the sensor data reconstructed by the AE is used as input to the IF model. Validated on proton beam intensity time series data, the proposed method demonstrates a clear improvement in detection performance, as confirmed by the experimental results.

</details>


### [777] [Data-driven discovery of roughness descriptors for surface characterization and intimate contact modeling of unidirectional composite tapes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20418)
*Sebastian Rodriguez,Mikhael Tannous,Jad Mounayer,Camilo Cruz,Anais Barasinski,Francisco Chinesta*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出基于秩降自编码器（RRAE）的新方法，从单向胶带表面粗糙度中提取既能用于胶带分类又能用于固结建模的描述符，解决传统统计描述符与界面物理过程脱节的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单向胶带表面粗糙度决定了热塑性分子扩散所需的亲密接触程度演化，进而影响胶带间固结质量。传统粗糙度表征依赖统计描述符，虽能表示表面拓扑，但与界面固结过程中的物理现象缺乏直接联系。关键研究问题：哪些粗糙度描述符能同时支持胶带分类（工艺控制关键）和通过推断亲密接触程度演化来进行固结建模？

Method: 提出基于秩降自编码器（RRAE）的新策略，这是一种具有线性潜在向量空间的自编码器，通过在编码器-解码器训练期间对潜在矩阵应用截断奇异值分解（SVD）来强制实现。通过强制潜在SVD模式：（i）在解码后准确表示粗糙度；（ii）允许提取现有先验知识（如分类或建模特性），从而提取有用的粗糙度描述符。

Result: 论文提出了一种新颖的RRAE框架，能够从表面粗糙度数据中提取同时满足分类和物理建模需求的描述符。该方法通过线性潜在空间和SVD约束，确保提取的特征既具有代表性又具有物理意义。

Conclusion: RRAE方法为复合材料制造中的表面粗糙度表征提供了新思路，能够提取同时支持工艺控制和物理建模的描述符，解决了传统统计描述符与界面物理过程脱节的问题。

Abstract: Unidirectional tapes surface roughness determines the evolution of the degree of intimate contact required for ensuring the thermoplastic molecular diffusion and the associated inter-tapes consolidation during manufacturing of composite structures. However, usual characterization of rough surfaces relies on statistical descriptors that even if they are able to represent the surface topology, they are not necessarily connected with the physics occurring at the interface during inter-tape consolidation. Thus, a key research question could be formulated as follows: Which roughness descriptors simultaneously enable tape classification-crucial for process control-and consolidation modeling via the inference of the evolution of the degree of intimate contact, itself governed by the process parameters?. For providing a valuable response, we propose a novel strategy based on the use of Rank Reduction Autoencoders (RRAEs), autoencoders with a linear latent vector space enforced by applying a truncated Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) to the latent matrix during the encoder-decoder training. In this work, we extract useful roughness descriptors by enforcing the latent SVD modes to (i) accurately represent the roughness after decoding, and (ii) allow the extraction of existing a priori knowledge such as classification or modelling properties.

</details>


### [778] [Distributed Gradient Clustering: Convergence and the Effect of Initialization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20507)
*Aleksandar Armacki,Himkant Sharma,Dragana Bajović,Dušan Jakovetić,Mrityunjoy Chakraborty,Soummya Kar*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文研究分布式梯度聚类算法中中心初始化对性能的影响，提出了一种新的分布式中心初始化方案，相比随机初始化能提升算法性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在分布式聚类场景中，每个用户拥有本地数据集且仅与邻居通信，目标是找到全局聚类。中心初始化对聚类算法性能有重要影响，需要研究如何改进分布式环境下的初始化策略。

Method: 1) 对文献[1]提出的分布式梯度聚类算法进行大量数值实验，评估中心初始化的影响；2) 受K-means++初始化启发，提出新的分布式中心初始化方案；3) 与集中式梯度聚类[2]和随机初始化基线进行比较。

Result: 1) 分布式梯度聚类算法对初始化的鲁棒性优于集中式方法；2) 提出的分布式中心初始化方案相比随机初始化能显著提升算法性能。

Conclusion: 中心初始化对分布式聚类算法性能有重要影响，提出的分布式初始化方案能有效提升算法性能，且分布式方法相比集中式方法对初始化更鲁棒。

Abstract: We study the effects of center initialization on the performance of a family of distributed gradient-based clustering algorithms introduced in [1], that work over connected networks of users. In the considered scenario, each user contains a local dataset and communicates only with its immediate neighbours, with the aim of finding a global clustering of the joint data. We perform extensive numerical experiments, evaluating the effects of center initialization on the performance of our family of methods, demonstrating that our methods are more resilient to the effects of initialization, compared to centralized gradient clustering [2]. Next, inspired by the $K$-means++ initialization [3], we propose a novel distributed center initialization scheme, which is shown to improve the performance of our methods, compared to the baseline random initialization.

</details>
