### [779] [Towards Practical Multimodal Hospital Outbreak Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20536)
*Chang Liu,Jieshi Chen,Alexander J. Sundermann,Kathleen Shutt,Marissa P. Griffith,Lora Lee Pless,Lee H. Harrison,Artur W. Dubrawski*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种机器学习方法，利用MALDI-TOF质谱、抗生素耐药性模式和电子健康记录三种替代模式来快速检测医院疫情，减少对全基因组测序的依赖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全基因组测序作为疫情调查的金标准，成本高、耗时长，限制了其在常规监测中的可行性，特别是在设备较差的医疗机构中。需要寻找快速、经济的替代方案来支持医院疫情早期检测。

Method: 提出机器学习方法，从三种模式学习判别特征：MALDI-TOF质谱、抗生素耐药性模式和电子健康记录。采用多物种评估，并提出了分层监测范式，通过替代模式减少对WGS的需求。

Result: 多物种评估显示，整合这三种模式可以显著提升疫情检测性能。电子健康记录分析识别出与特定临床程序相关的高风险污染途径，特别是涉及侵入性设备和高频工作流程的程序。

Conclusion: 该研究为医院疫情检测提供了快速、经济的替代方案，通过机器学习整合多模态数据，不仅提高了检测性能，还为感染预防团队提供了可操作的风险缓解目标，支持分层监测策略。

Abstract: Rapid identification of outbreaks in hospitals is essential for controlling pathogens with epidemic potential. Although whole genome sequencing (WGS) remains the gold standard in outbreak investigations, its substantial costs and turnaround times limit its feasibility for routine surveillance, especially in less-equipped facilities. We explore three modalities as rapid alternatives: matrix-assisted laser desorption ionization-time of flight (MALDI-TOF) mass spectrometry, antimicrobial resistance (AR) patterns, and electronic health records (EHR). We present a machine learning approach that learns discriminative features from these modalities to support outbreak detection. Multi-species evaluation shows that the integration of these modalities can boost outbreak detection performance. We also propose a tiered surveillance paradigm that can reduce the need for WGS through these alternative modalities. Further analysis of EHR information identifies potentially high-risk contamination routes linked to specific clinical procedures, notably those involving invasive equipment and high-frequency workflows, providing infection prevention teams with actionable targets for proactive risk mitigation

</details>


### [780] [Achieving $\widetilde{O}(1/ε)$ Sample Complexity for Bilinear Systems Identification under Bounded Noises](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20819)
*Hongyu Yi,Chenbei Lu,Jing Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文研究离散时间双线性系统在有界对称对数凹扰动下的有限样本集成员识别，证明了可行参数集直径以样本复杂度Õ(1/ε)收缩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有有限样本结果主要针对线性系统，或在更强的噪声假设下进行分析。本文考虑更具挑战性的双线性设置，包含轨迹相关回归量和允许边际稳定动态，填补了该领域的研究空白。

Method: 采用有限样本集成员识别方法，针对离散时间双线性系统，在有界对称对数凹扰动条件下，分析轨迹相关回归量和多项式均方状态增长的边际稳定动态。

Result: 证明了可行参数集直径以样本复杂度Õ(1/ε)收缩，仿真结果支持理论分析，并展示了所提估计器在不确定性量化方面的优势。

Conclusion: 本文为双线性系统的有限样本集成员识别提供了理论保证，即使在具有挑战性的动态条件下也能实现参数集的有效收缩，为系统识别和不确定性量化提供了新工具。

Abstract: This paper studies finite-sample set-membership identification for discrete-time bilinear systems under bounded symmetric log-concave disturbances. Compared with existing finite-sample results for linear systems and related analyses under stronger noise assumptions, we consider the more challenging bilinear setting with trajectory-dependent regressors and allow marginally stable dynamics with polynomial mean-square state growth. Under these conditions, we prove that the diameter of the feasible parameter set shrinks with sample complexity $\widetilde{O}(1/ε)$. Simulation supports the theory and illustrates the advantage of the proposed estimator for uncertainty quantification.

</details>


### [781] [Fuel Consumption Prediction: A Comparative Analysis of Machine Learning Paradigms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21034)
*Ali Akram*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该研究使用经典机器学习方法（SVM回归、逻辑回归等）分析车辆燃油效率影响因素，发现车辆重量和发动机排量是关键物理参数，挑战了深度学习在静态物理数据集上的必要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 汽车行业面临减少环境影响的压力，需要准确的预测模型支持可持续工程设计。研究旨在识别影响车辆燃油效率的关键物理因素，为制造商提供数据驱动的设计指导。

Method: 使用Motor Trend数据集，进行数据清洗、统计异常值消除和探索性数据分析（EDA）以减少多重共线性。比较多种机器学习范式：多元线性回归、支持向量机（SVM）回归和逻辑回归。

Result: SVM回归在连续预测上最准确（R²=0.889，RMSE=0.326），能有效捕捉车辆质量与发动机排量间的非线性关系。逻辑回归在分类任务上表现最优（准确率90.8%），识别低效车辆时召回率达0.957。

Conclusion: 车辆效率主要由物理设计参数（重量和排量）决定，为制造商提供了轻量化和发动机小型化的数据驱动框架。研究验证了经典可解释模型在静态物理数据集上的鲁棒性能，挑战了当前过度依赖黑盒深度学习的趋势。

Abstract: The automotive industry is under growing pressure to reduce its environmental impact, requiring accurate predictive modeling to support sustainable engineering design. This study examines the factors that determine vehicle fuel consumption from the seminal Motor Trend dataset, identifying the governing physical factors of efficiency through rigorous quantitative analysis. Methodologically, the research uses data sanitization, statistical outlier elimination, and in-depth Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) to curb the occurrence of multicollinearity between powertrain features. A comparative analysis of machine learning paradigms including Multiple Linear Regression, Support Vector Machines (SVM), and Logistic Regression was carried out to assess predictive efficacy. Findings indicate that SVM Regression is most accurate on continuous prediction (R-squared = 0.889, RMSE = 0.326), and is effective in capturing the non-linear relationships between vehicle mass and engine displacement. In parallel, Logistic Regression proved superior for classification (Accuracy = 90.8%) and showed exceptional recall (0.957) when identifying low-efficiency vehicles. These results challenge the current trend toward black-box deep learning architectures for static physical datasets, providing validation of robust performance by interpretable and well-tuned classical models. The research finds that intrinsic vehicle efficiency is fundamentally determined by physical design parameters, weight and displacement, offering a data-driven framework for how manufacturers should focus on lightweighting and engine downsizing to achieve stringent global sustainability goals.

</details>


### [782] [Benchmarking Scientific Machine Learning Models for Air Quality Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21039)
*Khawja Imran Masud,Venkata Sai Rahul Unnam,Sahara Ali*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一个可解释的综合基准，通过对比经典时间序列、机器学习和深度学习方法，为北德克萨斯州（达拉斯县）的多时间尺度AQI预测提供指南，并展示了物理引导的深度学习模型在短期预测中的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确的空气质量指数（AQI）预测对于保护快速发展的城市地区的公众健康至关重要，但实际模型评估和选择常常缺乏针对特定区域的标准化数据集上的严格基准测试。物理引导的机器学习和深度学习模型可能是解决这些问题、实现更准确高效AQI预测的有效方案。

Method: 研究提出了一个可解释的综合基准，通过对比线性回归（LR）、SARIMAX、多层感知机（MLP）和LSTM网络等经典方法，以及提出的物理引导变体（MLP+Physics和LSTM+Physics）。物理引导方法将EPA基于断点的AQI公式作为一致性约束，通过加权损失函数融入模型。使用2022-2024年美国环保署（EPA）的每日空气质量观测数据，为PM2.5和O3构建了城市级时间序列，并创建了LAG在{1,7,14,30}天的预测数据集。

Result: 实验使用时间顺序的训练-测试分割和MAE、RMSE误差指标显示，深度学习模型优于简单基线，而物理引导提高了稳定性并产生了物理一致的污染物与AQI关系。最大的改进出现在短期预测以及PM2.5和O3污染物上。

Conclusion: 研究结果为北德克萨斯州选择AQI预测模型提供了实用参考，并阐明了轻量级物理约束在何种情况下能够有意义地改善不同污染物和预测时间尺度上的预测性能。

Abstract: Accurate air quality index (AQI) forecasting is essential for the protecting public health in rapidly growing urban regions, and the practical model evaluation and selection are often challenged by the lack of rigorous, region-specific benchmarking on standardized datasets. Physics-guided machine learning and deep learning models could be a good and effective solution to resolve such issues with more accurate and efficient AQI forecasting. This research study presents an explainable and comprehensive benchmark that enables a guideline and proposed physics-guided best model by benchmarking classical time-series, machine-learning, and deep-learning approaches for multi-horizon AQI forecasting in North Texas (Dallas County). Using publicly available U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) daily observations of air quality data from 2022 to 2024, we curate city-level time series for PM2.5 and O3 by aggregating station measurements and constructing lag-wise forecasting datasets for LAG in {1,7,14,30} days. For benchmarking the best model, linear regression (LR), SARIMAX, multilayer perceptrons (MLP), and LSTM networks are evaluated with the proposed physics-guided variants (MLP+Physics and LSTM+Physics) that incorporate the EPA breakpoint-based AQI formulation as a consistency constraint through a weighted loss. Experiments using chronological train-test splits and error metrics MAE, RMSE showed that deep-learning models outperform simpler baselines, while physics guidance improves stability and yields physically consistent pollutant with AQI relationships, with the largest benefits observed for short-horizon prediction and for PM2.5 and O3. Overall, the results provide a practical reference for selecting AQI forecasting models in North Texas and clarify when lightweight physics constraints meaningfully improve predictive performance across pollutants and forecast horizons.

</details>


### [783] [BOxCrete: A Bayesian Optimization Open-Source AI Model for Concrete Strength Forecasting and Mix Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21525)
*Bayezid Baten,M. Ayyan Iqbal,Sebastian Ament,Julius Kusuma,Nishant Garg*

Main category: cs.LG

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: BOxCrete是一个开源的概率建模和优化框架，用于预测混凝土抗压强度并进行多目标优化（强度和碳排放）。基于包含123种混合物的500多个强度测量值的开放数据集，使用高斯过程回归，实现了R²=0.94的预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代混凝土设计需要同时满足机械性能、可加工性、耐久性和可持续性等多重要求，使得配合比设计日益复杂。现有AI/ML方法大多基于专有工业数据集和闭源实现，缺乏可重复性和开放性。

Method: 开发了BOxCrete开源框架，基于包含123种混合物（69种砂浆和54种混凝土）的开放数据集，包含1-15 ksi范围内的500多个强度测量值。使用高斯过程回归预测强度发展，并量化不确定性。进行抗压强度和隐含碳排放的多目标优化。

Result: 高斯过程回归实现了平均R²=0.94和RMSE=0.69 ksi的预测精度。框架能够量化不确定性并进行多目标优化，为AI驱动的配合比设计提供了可重复的开源基础。

Conclusion: BOxCrete框架和数据集为数据驱动的AI优化配合比设计建立了可重复的开源基础，解决了现有方法依赖专有数据和闭源实现的问题。

Abstract: Modern concrete must simultaneously satisfy evolving demands for mechanical performance, workability, durability, and sustainability, making mix designs increasingly complex. Recent studies leveraging Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) models show promise for predicting compressive strength and guiding mix optimization, but most existing efforts are based on proprietary industrial datasets and closed-source implementations. Here we introduce BOxCrete, an open-source probabilistic modeling and optimization framework trained on a new open-access dataset of over 500 strength measurements (1-15 ksi) from 123 mixtures - 69 mortar and 54 concrete mixes tested at five curing ages (1, 3, 5, 14, and 28 days). BOxCrete leverages Gaussian Process (GP) regression to predict strength development, achieving average R$^2$ = 0.94 and RMSE = 0.69 ksi, quantify uncertainty, and carry out multi-objective optimization of compressive strength and embodied carbon. The dataset and model establish a reproducible open-source foundation for data-driven development of AI-based optimized mix designs.

</details>


### [784] [Solomonoff induction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20274)
*Tom F. Sterkenburg*

Main category: cs.FL

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文批判性地分析了Solomonoff通用预测方法，指出其基于可计算性的核心思想存在理论缺陷，无法满足合理的可计算性要求，并通过对角线论证证明其失败。作者质疑该方法为奥卡姆剃刀提供理论基础以及作为机器学习理论理想的作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 论文旨在分析Solomonoff通用预测方法的理论基础，特别是其基于可计算性的核心思想。作者试图检验该方法是否能够满足合理的可计算性要求，并评估其作为预测理论和机器学习基础的有效性。

Method: 采用理论分析方法，首先阐述Solomonoff方法的核心思想——可计算性要求，然后通过推广Putnam的对角线论证来证明该方法无法满足这些要求。最后对方法的理论价值进行批判性讨论。

Result: 研究发现Solomonoff方法存在根本性缺陷：无法满足合理的可计算性要求，通过对角线论证证明了其理论上的失败。该方法既不能为奥卡姆剃刀提供可靠的理论基础，也不能作为机器学习方法的理论理想。

Conclusion: Solomonoff通用预测方法在理论上存在严重缺陷，无法实现其宣称的目标。该方法既不能作为预测理论的坚实基础，也不能为机器学习提供有效的理论指导。

Abstract: This chapter discusses the Solomonoff approach to universal prediction. The crucial ingredient in the approach is the notion of computability, and I present the main idea as an attempt to meet two plausible computability desiderata for a universal predictor. This attempt is unsuccessful, which is shown by a generalization of a diagonalization argument due to Putnam. I then critically discuss purported gains of the approach, in particular it providing a foundation for the methodological principle of Occam's razor, and it serving as a theoretical ideal for the development of machine learning methods.

</details>


### [785] [Forward and inverse problems for measure flows in Bayes Hilbert spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20329)
*S. David Mis,Maarten V. de Hoop*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文研究贝叶斯-希尔伯特空间中时间依赖概率度量的正问题和反问题，建立了概率路径的规范动力学实现理论，并提出了从时变间接观测中重建概率演化规律的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究贝叶斯-希尔伯特空间中概率度量随时间演化的数学理论，旨在为概率分布的动力学描述提供严格的几何框架，并解决从间接观测数据中重建概率演化规律的反问题。

Method: 1. 正问题：通过加权诺伊曼问题将log密度变化转化为最小动能梯度速度场，建立贝叶斯-希尔伯特路径的规范动力学实现
2. 反问题：在贝叶斯-希尔伯特路径空间上构建变分问题，结合数据拟合项和传输作用，添加时空正则化保证紧致性
3. 理论分析：在索伯列夫正则性和可观测性假设下，证明极小元存在性，推导一阶变分公式，建立观测映射的局部稳定性

Result: 1. 证明了每个充分正则的贝叶斯-希尔伯特路径都存在规范动力学实现
2. 建立了传输形式度量指定运动的动力学成本
3. 在无限维设置中，通过时空正则化获得了紧致性理论
4. 证明了在强拓扑下能够恢复演化规律、分数和规范速度场

Conclusion: 本文为贝叶斯-希尔伯特空间中概率度量的动力学提供了完整的数学理论框架，既解决了正问题中的规范实现，又解决了反问题中的重建问题，为概率演化的几何描述和从数据中学习概率动力学提供了理论基础。

Abstract: We study forward and inverse problems for time-dependent probability measures in Bayes--Hilbert spaces. On the forward side, we show that each sufficiently regular Bayes--Hilbert path admits a canonical dynamical realization: a weighted Neumann problem transforms the log-density variation into the unique gradient velocity field of minimum kinetic energy. This construction induces a transport form on Bayes--Hilbert tangent directions, which measures the dynamical cost of realizing prescribed motions, and yields a flow-matching interpretation in which the canonical velocity field is the minimum-energy execution of the prescribed path.
  On the inverse side, we formulate reconstruction directly on Bayes--Hilbert path space from time-dependent indirect observations. The resulting variational problem combines a data-misfit term with the transport action induced by the forward geometry. In our infinite-dimensional setting, however, this transport geometry alone does not provide sufficient compactness, so we add explicit temporal and spatial regularization to close the theory. The linearized observation operator induces a complementary observability form, which quantifies how strongly tangent directions are seen through the data. Under explicit Sobolev regularity and observability assumptions, we prove existence of minimizers, derive first-variation formulas, establish local stability of the observation map, and deduce recovery of the evolving law, its score, and its canonical velocity field under the strong topologies furnished by the compactness theory.

</details>


### [786] [Hetero-Net: An Energy-Efficient Resource Allocation and 3D Placement in Heterogeneous LoRa Networks via Multi-Agent Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20404)
*Abdullahi Isa Ahmed,Ana Maria Drăgulinescu,El Mehdi Amhoud*

Main category: cs.NI

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出Hetero-Net统一异构LoRa框架，通过多智能体PPO优化无人机网关3D部署，显著提升物联网系统能效


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LoRa网络设计将地面和地下无线传感器网络视为独立系统，导致跨环境连接效率低下且不集成，需要统一框架解决这一问题

Method: 提出Hetero-Net统一异构LoRa框架，集成多种LoRa终端设备与多个无人机网关，将问题建模为部分可观测随机博弈，采用多智能体近端策略优化(MAPPO)联合优化扩频因子、传输功率和无人机3D部署

Result: 相比传统孤立网络设计，MAPPO Hetero-Net显著提升能效：相比孤立WSN-only部署提升55.81%，相比孤立WUSN-only部署提升198.49%

Conclusion: Hetero-Net框架成功解决了地面和地下物联网网络的集成问题，通过多智能体强化学习优化显著提升了系统能效

Abstract: The evolution of Internet of Things (IoT) into multi-layered environments has positioned Low-Power Wide Area Networks (LPWANs), particularly Long Range (LoRa), as the backbone for connectivity across both surface and subterranean landscapes. However, existing LoRa-based network designs often treat ground-based wireless sensor networks (WSNs) and wireless underground sensor networks (WUSNs) as separate systems, resulting in inefficient and non-integrated connectivity across diverse environments. To address this, we propose Hetero-Net, a unified heterogeneous LoRa framework that integrates diverse LoRa end devices with multiple unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV)-mounted LoRa gateways. Our objective is to maximize system energy efficiency through the joint optimization of the spreading factor, transmission power, and three-dimensional (3D) placement of the UAVs. To manage the dynamic and partially observable nature of this system, we model the problem as a partially observable stochastic game (POSG) and address it using a multi-agent proximal policy optimization (MAPPO) framework. An ablation study shows that our proposed MAPPO Hetero-Net significantly outperforms traditional, isolated network designs, achieving energy efficiency improvements of 55.81\% and 198.49\% over isolated WSN-only and WUSN-only deployments, respectively.

</details>


### [787] [CERN: Correcting Errors in Raw Nanopore Signals Using Hidden Markov Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20420)
*Simon Ambrozak,Ulysse McConnell,Bhargav Srinivasan,Burak Ozkan,Can Firtina*

Main category: q-bio.GN

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: CERN是一种基于隐马尔可夫模型的原始纳米孔测序信号错误检测与校正方法，能提高原始信号分析的准确性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纳米孔测序能读取更长的核酸序列，但原始电信号常包含噪声和处理错误，限制了原始信号分析的准确性。现有方法虽然可以直接分析原始信号而无需碱基识别，但错误问题仍未解决

Method: 提出CERN机制，训练并利用隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）来准确校正信号错误。该方法能系统识别和校正原始纳米孔信号中的错误

Result: 在大肠杆菌、果蝇和人类基因组等多个数据集上的广泛评估显示：1）持续提高底层原始信号分析工具的总体映射准确性；2）最小化新纳米孔化学对分割算法优化的负担；3）运行时不造成显著计算开销

Conclusion: CERN提供了一种有效机制，可在进一步分析前系统识别和校正原始纳米孔信号中的错误，这有助于开发专门针对原始纳米孔信号的新型错误校正机制

Abstract: Nanopore sequencing can read substantially longer sequences of nucleic acid molecules than other sequencing methods, which has led to advances in genomic analysis such as the gapless human genome assembly. By analyzing the raw electrical signal reads that nanopore sequencing generates from molecules, existing works can map these reads without translating them into DNA characters (i.e., basecalling), allowing for quick and efficient analysis of sequencing data. However, raw signals often contain errors due to noise and mistakes when processing them, which limits the overall accuracy of raw signal analysis.
  Our goal in this work is to detect and correct errors in raw signals to improve the accuracy of raw signal analyses. To this end, we propose CERN, a mechanism that trains and utilizes a Hidden Markov Model (HMM) to accurately correct signal errors. Our extensive evaluation on various datasets including E. coli, Fruit Fly, and Human genomes shows that CERN 1) consistently improves the overall mapping accuracy of the underlying raw signal analysis tools, 2) minimizes the burden on segmentation algorithm optimization with newer nanopore chemistries, and 3) functions without causing substantial computational overhead. We conclude that CERN provides an effective mechanism to systematically identify and correct the errors in raw nanopore signals before further analysis, which can enable the development of a new class of error correction mechanisms purely designed for raw nanopore signals.
  CERN is available at https://github.com/STORMgroup/CERN. We also provide the scripts to fully reproduce our results on our GitHub page.

</details>


### [788] [mmWave-Diffusion:A Novel Framework for Respiration Sensing Using Observation-Anchored Conditional Diffusion Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20700)
*Yong Wang,Qifan Shen,Bao Zhang,Zijun Huang,Chengbo Zhu,Shuai Yao,Qisong Wu*

Main category: eess.IV

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了mmWave-Diffusion框架，利用条件扩散模型去除毫米波雷达呼吸监测中的微运动干扰，通过观测锚定采样和物理先验注入实现高精度呼吸波形重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 毫米波雷达可实现非接触式呼吸监测，但身体微运动产生的非平稳干扰会降低监测精度。现有方法难以有效去除这种干扰，需要一种能够建模观测与真实呼吸信号之间残差、并利用物理先验的鲁棒方法。

Method: 提出观测锚定条件扩散框架(mmWave-Diffusion)，直接建模雷达相位观测与呼吸真值之间的残差；采用观测一致邻域初始化而非高斯噪声；设计雷达扩散变换器(RDT)，通过补丁级双位置编码强制时间对齐，使用带掩码多头交叉注意力注入局部物理先验。

Result: 在13.25小时同步雷达-呼吸数据上评估，mmWave-Diffusion在波形重建和呼吸率估计方面达到最先进性能，仅需20个反向步骤即可实现鲁棒去噪和干扰去除，具有强泛化能力。

Conclusion: mmWave-Diffusion通过将生成过程与测量物理对齐，有效解决了毫米波雷达呼吸监测中的微运动干扰问题，为基于扩散模型的传感器信号处理提供了新思路。

Abstract: Millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar enables contactless respiratory sensing,yet fine-grained monitoring is often degraded by nonstationary interference from body micromotions.To achieve micromotion interference removal,we propose mmWave-Diffusion,an observation-anchored conditional diffusion framework that directly models the residual between radar phase observations and the respiratory ground truth,and initializes sampling within an observation-consistent neighborhood rather than from Gaussian noise-thereby aligning the generative process with the measurement physics and reducing inference overhead. The accompanying Radar Diffusion Transformer (RDT) is explicitly conditioned on phase observations, enforces strict one-to-one temporal alignment via patch-level dual positional encodings, and injects local physical priors through banded-mask multi-head cross-attention, enabling robust denoising and interference removal in just 20 reverse steps. Evaluated on 13.25 hours of synchronized radar-respiration data, mmWave-Diffusion achieves state-of-the-art waveform reconstruction and respiratory-rate estimation with strong generalization. Code repository:https://github.com/goodluckyongw/mmWave-Diffusion.

</details>


### [789] [Time-adaptive functional Gaussian Process regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21144)
*MD Ruiz-Medina,AE Madrid,A Torres-Signes,JM Angulo*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种在流形上进行功能高斯过程回归的新方法，采用经验贝叶斯框架，利用流形等距群下的协方差核不变性，通过拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子的特征函数实现降维。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的高斯过程回归方法在处理流形上的时空随机场时存在局限性，需要发展能够有效利用流形几何结构的功能回归方法，以更好地建模复杂时空数据。

Method: 基于经验贝叶斯方法，利用可分离希尔伯特空间中的紧高斯测度，通过流形等距群下的协方差核不变性，结合拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子的特征函数将测度识别为无限乘积高斯测度，使用时变角谱进行降维实现。

Result: 模拟研究和合成数据应用展示了所提出的功能回归预测器在有限样本和渐近性质方面的良好表现，验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 该方法为流形上的功能高斯过程回归提供了新的理论框架和实用工具，能够有效处理时空随机场数据，具有理论和应用价值。

Abstract: This paper proposes a new formulation of functional Gaussian Process regression in manifolds, based on an Empirical Bayes approach, in the spatiotemporal random field context. We apply the machinery of tight Gaussian measures in separable Hilbert spaces, exploiting the invariance property of covariance kernels under the group of isometries of the manifold. The identification of these measures with infinite-product Gaussian measures is then obtained via the eigenfunctions of the Laplace-Beltrami operator on the manifold. The involved time-varying angular spectra constitute the key tool for dimension reduction in the implementation of this regression approach, adopting a suitable truncation scheme depending on the functional sample size. The simulation study and synthetic data application undertaken illustrate the finite sample and asymptotic properties of the proposed functional regression predictor.

</details>


### [790] [Architecture for Multi-Unmanned Aerial Vehicles based Autonomous Precision Agriculture Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21183)
*Ebasa Temesgen,Nathnael Minyelshowa,Lebsework Negash*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个用于精准农业的多无人机系统架构框架，将无人机任务建模为包含图像处理、路径规划、通信、数据采集和田间地图等模块的自主端到端解决方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着无人机在精准农业中的广泛应用，需要一个结构化框架来整合各种算法和任务，实现多无人机协调合作，同时考虑实际应用中的各种限制条件。

Method: 定义无人机在精准农业中的各种任务，并将其建模为架构框架，包括任务规划、数据采集、图像处理等模块，支持多无人机协调合作，最小化物理干预。

Result: 通过仿真和实地测试验证，该架构具有容错性、鲁棒性、开发者友好性和用户友好性等优势，能够为农民提供高效的无人机部署解决方案。

Conclusion: 提出的架构为精准农业中的多无人机系统提供了一个有效的框架，能够实现端到端的自主操作，提高农业无人机应用的效率和可靠性。

Abstract: The use of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) in precision agriculture has seen a huge increase recently. As such, systems that aim to apply various algorithms on the field need a structured framework of abstractions. This paper defines the various tasks of the UAVs in precision agriculture and model them into an architectural framework. The presented architecture is built on the context that there will be minimal physical intervention to do the tasks defined with multiple coordinated and cooperative UAVs. Various tasks such as image processing, path planning, communication, data acquisition, and field mapping are employed in the architecture to provide an efficient system. Besides, different limitation for applying Multi-UAVs in precision agriculture has been considered in designing the architecture. The architecture provides an autonomous end-to-end solution, starting from mission planning, data acquisition and image processing framework that is highly efficient and can enable farmers to comprehensively deploy UAVs onto their lands. Simulation and field tests shows that the architecture offers a number of advantages that include fault-tolerance, robustness, developer and user-friendliness.

</details>


### [791] [The Average Relative Entropy and Transpilation Depth determines the noise robustness in Variational Quantum Classifiers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21300)
*Aakash Ravindra Shinde,Arianne Meijer - van de Griend,Jukka K. Nurminen*

Main category: quant-ph

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出基于相对熵的度量方法，用于评估变分量子分类算法在噪声量子设备上的性能可重现性，发现电路深度不足以表征浅层电路。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 变分量子算法（VQAs）主要是在经典模拟中评估，但在噪声量子设备上的可重现性存在不确定性。虽然研究表明VQAs在特定参数化浅层量子电路中可能具有噪声弹性，但缺乏明确定义浅层电路或最优电路深度的度量标准。这些挑战自然延伸到变分量子分类（VQC）算法。

Method: 提出基于相对熵的度量方法，用于验证VQC模型在噪声设备上的性能是否与模拟结果相似。通过分析类别间的平均相对熵差异、转译电路深度与噪声量子设备上的性能差异之间的相关性。

Result: 建立了平均相对熵差异、转译电路深度与噪声量子设备上性能差异之间的强相关性。结果表明仅凭电路深度不足以表征浅层电路。通过多种VQC实现技术、数据集和多个噪声量子设备的实证证据支持这些结论。

Conclusion: 提出的相对熵度量方法能够有效评估VQC模型在噪声量子设备上的性能可重现性，为变分量子算法的实际部署提供了重要工具。

Abstract: Variational Quantum Algorithms (VQAs) have been extensively researched for applications in Quantum Machine Learning (QML), Optimization, and Molecular simulations. Although designed for Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) devices, VQAs are predominantly evaluated classically due to uncertain results on noisy devices and limited resource availability. Raising concern over the reproducibility of simulated VQAs on noisy hardware. While prior studies indicate that VQAs may exhibit noise resilience in specific parameterized shallow quantum circuits, there are no definitive measures to establish what defines a shallow circuit or the optimal circuit depth for VQAs on a noisy platform. These challenges extend naturally to Variational Quantum Classification (VQC) algorithms, a subclass of VQAs for supervised learning. In this article, we propose a relative entropy-based metric to verify whether a VQC model would perform similarly on a noisy device as it does on simulations. We establish a strong correlation between the average relative entropy difference in classes, transpilation circuit depth, and their performance difference on a noisy quantum device. Our results further indicate that circuit depth alone is insufficient to characterize shallow circuits. We present empirical evidence to support these assertions across a diverse array of techniques for implementing VQC, datasets, and multiple noisy quantum devices.

</details>


### [792] [GaussianSSC: Triplane-Guided Directional Gaussian Fields for 3D Semantic Completion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21487)
*Ruiqi Xian,Jing Liang,He Yin,Xuewei Qi,Dinesh Manocha*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: GaussianSSC是一种用于语义场景补全的两阶段方法，结合了高斯表示和体素网格，通过高斯锚定和Gaussian-Triplane精炼模块提升单目占用估计和语义预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语义场景补全方法在体素-图像对齐和表面几何表示方面存在局限，需要一种既能保持体素网格效率又能引入高斯表示优势的方法。

Method: 提出两阶段方法：1) 高斯锚定：通过高斯加权图像聚合改进体素-图像对齐；2) Gaussian-Triplane精炼：将体素特征转换为高斯场，通过局部聚集和全局聚合精炼triplane特征。

Result: 在SemanticKITTI数据集上，Stage 1占用估计提升：Recall +1.0%，Precision +2.0%，IoU +1.8%；Stage 2语义预测提升：IoU +1.8%，mIoU +0.8%。

Conclusion: GaussianSSC成功将高斯表示的优势注入体素网格，通过各向异性支持捕捉表面几何特性，同时保持triplane表示的高效性。

Abstract: We present \emph{GaussianSSC}, a two-stage, grid-native and triplane-guided approach to semantic scene completion (SSC) that injects the benefits of Gaussians without replacing the voxel grid or maintaining a separate Gaussian set. We introduce \emph{Gaussian Anchoring}, a sub-pixel, Gaussian-weighted image aggregation over fused FPN features that tightens voxel--image alignment and improves monocular occupancy estimation. We further convert point-like voxel features into a learned per-voxel Gaussian field and refine triplane features via a triplane-aligned \emph{Gaussian--Triplane Refinement} module that combines \emph{local gathering} (target-centric) and \emph{global aggregation} (source-centric). This directional, anisotropic support captures surface tangency, scale, and occlusion-aware asymmetry while preserving the efficiency of triplane representations. On SemanticKITTI~\cite{behley2019semantickitti}, GaussianSSC improves Stage~1 occupancy by +1.0\% Recall, +2.0\% Precision, and +1.8\% IoU over state-of-the-art baselines, and improves Stage~2 semantic prediction by +1.8\% IoU and +0.8\% mIoU.

</details>


### [793] [Stability and Bifurcation Analysis of Nonlinear PDEs via Random Projection-based PINNs: A Krylov-Arnoldi Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21568)
*Gianluca Fabiani,Michail E. Kavousanakis,Constantinos Siettos,Ioannis G. Kevrekidis*

Main category: math.NA

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出基于物理信息随机投影神经网络(PI-RPNNs)的PDE稳定性与分岔分析数值框架，通过矩阵自由Krylov-Arnoldi方法可靠计算物理Jacobian的主导特征对


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PDE稳定性分析需要多次求解特征值问题，计算成本高。现有基于神经网络的PDE求解方法难以直接进行稳定性分析，因为需要计算非线性优化问题的Hessian矩阵。本文旨在开发一种既能高效求解PDE又能直接进行稳定性分析的统一框架。

Method: 使用单隐藏层随机投影神经网络(PI-RPNNs)，固定隐藏层权重，仅优化线性输出层权重，将训练简化为最小二乘问题。通过矩阵自由shift-invert Krylov-Arnoldi方法直接计算物理Jacobian的特征值，避免数值秩缺陷问题。证明了PI-RPNN广义特征值问题几乎必然正则。

Result: 成功实现了PDE稳定性分析的统一框架，能够可靠计算物理Jacobian的主导特征对。证明了随机投影配置矩阵的奇异值对于解析激活函数呈指数衰减，为方法的数值稳定性提供了理论保证。

Conclusion: PI-RPNNs为PDE稳定性分析提供了高效统一的数值框架，结合矩阵自由Krylov方法克服了数值秩缺陷问题，理论分析保证了方法的可靠性。

Abstract: We address a numerical framework for the stability and bifurcation analysis of nonlinear partial differential equations (PDEs) in which the solution is sought in the function space spanned by physics-informed random projection neural networks (PI-RPNNs), and discretized via a collocation approach. These are single-hidden-layer networks with randomly sampled and fixed a priori hidden-layer weights; only the linear output layer weights are optimized, reducing training to a single least-squares solve. This linear output structure enables the direct and explicit formulation of the eigenvalue problem governing the linear stability of stationary solutions. This takes a generalized eigenvalue form, which naturally separates the physical domain interior dynamics from the algebraic constraints imposed by boundary conditions, at no additional training cost and without requiring additional PDE solves. However, the random projection collocation matrix is inherently numerically rank-deficient, rendering naive eigenvalue computation unreliable and contaminating the true eigenvalue spectrum with spurious near-zero modes. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a matrix-free shift-invert Krylov-Arnoldi method that operates directly in weight space, avoiding explicit inversion of the numerically rank-deficient collocation matrix and enabling the reliable computation of several leading eigenpairs of the physical Jacobian - the discretized Frechet derivative of the PDE operator with respect to the solution field, whose eigenvalue spectrum determines linear stability. We further prove that the PI-RPNN-based generalized eigenvalue problem is almost surely regular, guaranteeing solvability with standard eigensolvers, and that the singular values of the random projection collocation matrix decay exponentially for analytic activation functions.

</details>


### [794] [CoNBONet: Conformalized Neuroscience-inspired Bayesian Operator Network for Reliability Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21678)
*Shailesh Garg,Souvik Chakraborty*

Main category: stat.ML

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: CoNBONet：一种受神经科学启发的代理模型，用于非线性动力系统在随机激励下的时变可靠性分析，提供快速、节能且具有不确定性感知的可靠性评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非线性动力系统在随机激励下的时变可靠性分析计算成本高昂。传统方法（如蒙特卡洛模拟）需要重复调用计算昂贵的数值求解器，导致显著的计算瓶颈。

Method: CoNBONet（Conformalized Neuroscience-inspired Bayesian Operator Network）结合深度算子网络的表达能力与受神经科学启发的神经元模型，实现快速低功耗推理。通过分割保形预测提供具有理论保证的校准不确定性量化，并通过算子学习范式实现强泛化能力。

Result: 在各种非线性动力系统上的验证表明，CoNBONet保持了预测保真度，并实现了失效概率的可靠覆盖，成为工程设计中稳健可扩展可靠性分析的有力工具。

Conclusion: CoNBONet为高维时变可靠性问题提供了一种可扩展的替代方案，相比传统代理模型（如高斯过程、多项式混沌展开、支持向量回归）具有更好的可扩展性。

Abstract: Time-dependent reliability analysis of nonlinear dynamical systems under stochastic excitations is a critical yet computationally demanding task. Conventional approaches, such as Monte Carlo simulation, necessitate repeated evaluations of computationally expensive numerical solvers, leading to significant computational bottlenecks. To address this challenge, we propose \textit{CoNBONet}, a neuroscience-inspired surrogate model that enables fast, energy-efficient, and uncertainty-aware reliability analysis, providing a scalable alternative to techniques such as Monte Carlo simulations. CoNBONet, short for \textbf{Co}nformalized \textbf{N}euroscience-inspired \textbf{B}ayesian \textbf{O}perator \textbf{Net}work, leverages the expressive power of deep operator networks while integrating neuroscience-inspired neuron models to achieve fast, low-power inference. Unlike traditional surrogates such as Gaussian processes, polynomial chaos expansions, or support vector regression, that may face scalability challenges for high-dimensional, time-dependent reliability problems, CoNBONet offers \textit{fast and energy-efficient inference} enabled by a neuroscience-inspired network architecture, \textit{calibrated uncertainty quantification with theoretical guarantees} via split conformal prediction, and \textit{strong generalization capability} through an operator-learning paradigm that maps input functions to system response trajectories. Validation of the proposed CoNBONet for various nonlinear dynamical systems demonstrates that CoNBONet preserves predictive fidelity, and achieves reliable coverage of failure probabilities, making it a powerful tool for robust and scalable reliability analysis in engineering design.

</details>


### [795] [Cluster-Specific Predictive Modeling: A Scalable Solution for Resource-Constrained Wi-Fi Controllers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21778)
*Gianluca Fontanesi,Luca Barbieri,Lorenzo Galati Giordano,Alfonso Fernandez Duran,Thorsten Wild*

Main category: eess.SP

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该研究通过聚类算法和模型评估技术，优化了托管Wi-Fi网络中的预测建模，在资源受限环境下实现了更准确的预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决在内存和计算资源受限的中央控制器管理的大规模环境中部署预测算法的挑战，优化网络管理策略。

Method: 采用基于特征的聚类（支持PCA和高级特征工程）对时间序列数据进行分组，开发集群特定的预测模型，并比较全局模型与集群特定模型的性能。

Result: 集群特定模型在高活动集群中始终实现更低的平均绝对误差（MAE），在模型复杂度、准确性和资源利用之间取得良好平衡。

Conclusion: 研究支持通过选择性模型部署的自适应网络管理策略，以优化资源分配、提高预测准确性，并确保大规模托管Wi-Fi环境的可扩展操作。

Abstract: This manuscript presents a comprehensive analysis of predictive modeling optimization in managed Wi-Fi networks through the integration of clustering algorithms and model evaluation techniques. The study addresses the challenges of deploying forecasting algorithms in large-scale environments managed by a central controller constrained by memory and computational resources. Feature-based clustering, supported by Principal Component Analysis (PCA) and advanced feature engineering, is employed to group time series data based on shared characteristics, enabling the development of cluster-specific predictive models. Comparative evaluations between global models (GMs) and cluster-specific models demonstrate that cluster-specific models consistently achieve superior accuracy in terms of Mean Absolute Error (MAE) values in high-activity clusters. The trade-offs between model complexity (and accuracy) and resource utilization are analyzed, highlighting the scalability of tailored modeling approaches. The findings advocate for adaptive network management strategies that optimize resource allocation through selective model deployment, enhance predictive accuracy, and ensure scalable operations in large-scale, centrally managed Wi-Fi environments.

</details>


### [796] [A Novel Method for Enforcing Exactly Dirichlet, Neumann and Robin Conditions on Curved Domain Boundaries for Physics Informed Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21909)
*Suchuan Dong,Yuchuan Zhang*

Main category: math.NA

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出了一种在任意曲边四边形域上精确执行Dirichlet、Neumann和Robin边界条件的系统方法，结合TFC约束表达式和超限插值，确保边界交点处的兼容性约束


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在科学机器学习中，精确执行边界条件对于偏微分方程求解至关重要。现有方法在处理复杂几何域和多种边界条件组合时存在困难，特别是在Neumann或Robin边界相交处需要精确满足兼容性约束

Method: 基于一般四边形域与标准域之间的精确映射，结合TFC（函数连接理论）约束表达式和超限插值。提出四步系统程序处理两种情形：(i) Neumann/Robin边界仅与Dirichlet边界相交，(ii) 两个Neumann/Robin边界相交。与极端学习机（ELM）技术结合实现

Result: 通过大量数值实验验证，在线性/非线性静态/动态问题中，该方法能够在复杂几何边界上精确执行所有三种边界条件，数值边界条件误差达到机器精度

Conclusion: 该方法为科学机器学习提供了在复杂几何域上精确执行多种边界条件的有效框架，特别解决了边界交点处的兼容性约束问题，具有高精度和通用性

Abstract: We present a systematic method for exactly enforcing Dirichlet, Neumann, and Robin type conditions on general quadrilateral domains with arbitrary curved boundaries. Our method is built upon exact mappings between general quadrilateral domains and the standard domain, and employs a combination of TFC (theory of functional connections) constrained expressions and transfinite interpolations. When Neumann or Robin boundaries are present, especially when two Neumann (or Robin) boundaries meet at a vertex, it is critical to enforce exactly the induced compatibility constraints at the intersection, in order to enforce exactly the imposed conditions on the joining boundaries. We analyze in detail and present constructions for handling the imposed boundary conditions and the induced compatibility constraints for two types of situations: (i) when Neumann (or Robin) boundary only intersects with Dirichlet boundaries, and (ii) when two Neumann (or Robin) boundaries intersect with each other. We describe a four-step procedure to systematically formulate the general form of functions that exactly satisfy the imposed Dirichlet, Neumann, or Robin conditions on general quadrilateral domains. The method developed herein has been implemented together with the extreme learning machine (ELM) technique we have developed recently for scientific machine learning. Ample numerical experiments are presented with several linear/nonlinear stationary/dynamic problems on a variety of two-dimensional domains with complex boundary geometries. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed method has enforced the Dirichlet, Neumann, and Robin conditions on curved domain boundaries exactly, with the numerical boundary-condition errors at the machine accuracy.

</details>


### [797] [A plug-and-play approach with fast uncertainty quantification for weak lensing mass mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22006)
*Hubert Leterme,Andreas Tersenov,Jalal Fadili,Jean-Luc Starck*

Main category: astro-ph.CO

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: PnPMass：一种用于弱引力透镜质量映射的即插即用方法，通过交替梯度下降和去噪步骤实现快速推理，并提供具有覆盖保证的采样自由不确定性量化方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 即将到来的第四阶段巡天（如Euclid和Rubin）将提供大量高精度数据，需要从噪声弱引力透镜剪切测量中重建暗物质分布。现有深度学习方法要么需要为每个新观测区域重新训练模型（不实用），要么依赖缓慢的MCMC采样，因此需要一种准确、灵活且推理快速的新方法，同时需要具有覆盖保证的不确定性量化。

Method: PnPMass采用即插即用方法，通过交替执行两个步骤：1）使用精心选择的数据保真项进行梯度下降；2）使用在模拟数据上训练的单个深度学习模型进行去噪。同时提出基于矩网络的快速采样自由不确定性量化方案，并通过保形预测获得校准误差条以确保覆盖保证。

Result: PnPMass在性能上接近最先进的深度学习方法，同时提供快速推理（仅需几次迭代收敛），且只需单次训练，与观测噪声协方差无关。与现有方法相比，能提供更紧密的误差条。

Conclusion: PnPMass结合了灵活性、效率和重建准确性，同时提供比现有方法更精确的不确定性量化，非常适合即将到来的弱引力透镜巡天。

Abstract: Upcoming stage-IV surveys such as Euclid and Rubin will deliver vast amounts of high-precision data, opening new opportunities to constrain cosmological models with unprecedented accuracy. A key step in this process is the reconstruction of the dark matter distribution from noisy weak lensing shear measurements.
  Current deep learning-based mass mapping methods achieve high reconstruction accuracy, but either require retraining a model for each new observed sky region (limiting practicality) or rely on slow MCMC sampling. Efficient exploitation of future survey data therefore calls for a new method that is accurate, flexible, and fast at inference. In addition, uncertainty quantification with coverage guarantees is essential for reliable cosmological parameter estimation.
  We introduce PnPMass, a plug-and-play approach for weak lensing mass mapping. The algorithm produces point estimates by alternating between a gradient descent step with a carefully chosen data fidelity term, and a denoising step implemented with a single deep learning model trained on simulated data corrupted by Gaussian white noise. We also propose a fast, sampling-free uncertainty quantification scheme based on moment networks, with calibrated error bars obtained through conformal prediction to ensure coverage guarantees. Finally, we benchmark PnPMass against both model-driven and data-driven mass mapping techniques.
  PnPMass achieves performance close to that of state-of-the-art deep-learning methods while offering fast inference (converging in just a few iterations) and requiring only a single training phase, independently of the noise covariance of the observations. It therefore combines flexibility, efficiency, and reconstruction accuracy, while delivering tighter error bars than existing approaches, making it well suited for upcoming weak lensing surveys.

</details>


### [798] [RAFL: Generalizable Sim-to-Real of Soft Robots with Residual Acceleration Field Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22039)
*Dong Heon Cho,Boyuan Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 提出RAFL框架，通过可学习的残差加速度场增强基础模拟器，解决软机器人仿真中几何形态变化导致的sim-to-real差距问题，实现跨形状的零样本泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可微分模拟器在软机器人材料参数、控制和形态优化中具有优势，但几何形态作为设计变量时，sim-to-real差距更加显著。系统识别方法在材料模型误设或观测稀疏时，识别的参数往往吸收几何依赖效应而非反映内在材料行为。更复杂的材料模型虽能提高精度但计算成本高，实用性受限。

Method: 提出残差加速度场学习（RAFL）框架，在基础模拟器上增加可转移的单元级校正动力学场。该模型基于共享局部特征，对全局网格拓扑和离散化不敏感。通过可微分模拟器使用稀疏标记观测进行端到端训练，学习到的残差能泛化到不同形状。

Result: 在sim-to-sim和sim-to-real实验中，该方法在未见形态上实现一致的零样本改进，而系统识别方法经常表现出负迁移。该框架还支持持续细化，在形态优化过程中积累模拟精度。

Conclusion: RAFL框架通过可学习的残差场有效解决软机器人仿真中的几何形态变化问题，实现跨形状泛化，为形态优化提供更准确的模拟基础。

Abstract: Differentiable simulators enable gradient-based optimization of soft robots over material parameters, control, and morphology, but accurately modeling real systems remains challenging due to the sim-to-real gap. This issue becomes more pronounced when geometry is itself a design variable. System identification reduces discrepancies by fitting global material parameters to data; however, when constitutive models are misspecified or observations are sparse, identified parameters often absorb geometry-dependent effects rather than reflect intrinsic material behavior. More expressive constitutive models can improve accuracy but substantially increase computational cost, limiting practicality.
  We propose a residual acceleration field learning (RAFL) framework that augments a base simulator with a transferable, element-level corrective dynamics field. Operating on shared local features, the model is agnostic to global mesh topology and discretization. Trained end-to-end through a differentiable simulator using sparse marker observations, the learned residual generalizes across shapes. In both sim-to-sim and sim-to-real experiments, our method achieves consistent zero-shot improvements on unseen morphologies, while system identification frequently exhibits negative transfer. The framework also supports continual refinement, enabling simulation accuracy to accumulate during morphology optimization.

</details>


### [799] [Data Curation for Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials by Determinantal Point Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22160)
*Joanna Zou,Youssef Marzouk*

Main category: stat.AP

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文提出使用行列式点过程（DPPs）从量子力学计算中高效选择信息量大的原子构型子集，用于训练机器学习势能，解决训练数据生成的计算瓶颈问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习原子间势能的发展面临关键计算瓶颈：需要生成和标注有用的训练数据集。量子力学方法计算能量和力非常昂贵，因此需要高效选择信息量大的原子构型子集进行标注。

Method: 提出使用行列式点过程（DPPs）来选择信息量大的原子构型子集。DPPs利用分子描述符的核函数，从大量候选构型中选择既多样又具有代表性的子集，用于量子力学计算标注。

Result: 在氧化铪数据上的实验表明，DPPs与现有方法相比具有竞争力，能够构建紧凑但多样化的训练集，提高机器学习表示分子系统的准确性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: DPPs为无监督训练数据整理（特别是异构或多模态数据）以及在线主动学习方案（在分子动力学模拟中迭代数据增强）提供了有前景的方向。

Abstract: The development of machine learning interatomic potentials faces a critical computational bottleneck with the generation and labeling of useful training datasets. We present a novel application of determinantal point processes (DPPs) to the task of selecting informative subsets of atomic configurations to label with reference energies and forces from costly quantum mechanical methods. Through experiments with hafnium oxide data, we show that DPPs are competitive with existing approaches to constructing compact but diverse training sets by utilizing kernels of molecular descriptors, leading to improved accuracy and robustness in machine learning representations of molecular systems. Our work identifies promising directions to employ DPPs for unsupervised training data curation with heterogeneous or multimodal data, or in online active learning schemes for iterative data augmentation during molecular dynamics simulation.

</details>


### [800] [Characterizing High-Capacity Janus Aminobenzene-Graphene Anode for Sodium-Ion Batteries with Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22254)
*Claudia Islas-Vargas,L. Ricardo Montoya,Carlos A. Vital-José,Oliver T. Unke,Klaus-Robert Müller,Huziel E. Sauceda*

Main category: cond-mat.mtrl-sci

Relevance: 15.0

TL;DR: 该论文使用机器学习力场和密度泛函理论研究了氨基苯功能化Janus石墨烯作为钠离子电池阳极材料的性能，发现其具有高容量、低电压平台、快速钠离子扩散和结构稳定性等优异特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 钠离子电池需要兼具高容量、低工作电压、快速钠离子传输和机械稳定性的阳极材料，而传统阳极材料难以同时满足这些要求。研究人员希望通过机器学习力场模拟来探索新型功能化石墨烯材料的钠存储性能。

Method: 使用SpookyNet机器学习力场（MLFF）结合全电子密度泛函理论（DFT）计算，在室温条件下表征氨基苯功能化Janus石墨烯（Na_xAB）中的钠存储行为。通过模拟不同荷电状态，揭示了材料的钠存储机制。

Result: 研究发现氨基苯功能化Janus石墨烯具有独特的钠存储机制：氨基苯基团的位点特异性吸附和Na_n@AB_m结构形成，随后是层间填充。该材料表现出0.15 V vs. Na/Na⁺的低电压平台，约400 mAh g⁻¹的比容量，可忽略的体积变化，以及比硬碳高2-3个数量级的钠离子扩散系数（~10⁻⁶ cm² s⁻¹）。

Conclusion: 氨基苯功能化Janus石墨烯是一种有前景的结构明确的钠离子电池高容量阳极材料。该研究展示了基于机器学习力场的模拟在电极材料表征方面的强大能力。

Abstract: Sodium-ion batteries require anodes that combine high capacity, low operating voltage, fast Na-ion transport, and mechanical stability, which conventional anodes struggle to deliver. Here, we use the SpookyNet machine-learning force field (MLFF) together with all-electron density-functional theory calculations to characterize Na storage in aminobenzene-functionalized Janus graphene (Na$_x$AB) at room-temperature. Simulations across state of charge reveal a three-stage storage mechanism-site-specific adsorption at aminobenzene groups and Na$_n$@AB$_m$ structure formation, followed by interlayer gallery filling-contrasting the multi-stage pore-, graphite-interlayer-, and defect-controlled behavior in hard carbon. This leads to an OCV profile with an extended low-voltage plateau of 0.15 V vs. Na/Na$^{+}$, an estimated gravimetric capacity of $\sim$400 mAh g$^{-1}$, negligible volume change, and Na diffusivities of $\sim10^{-6}$ cm$^{2}$ s$^{-1}$, two to three orders of magnitude higher than in hard carbon. Our results establish Janus aminobenzene-graphene as a promising, structurally defined high-capacity Na-ion anode and illustrate the power of MLFF-based simulations for characterizing electrode materials.

</details>


### [801] [Universal Coefficients and Mayer-Vietoris for Moore Homology of Ample Groupoids](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.20861)
*Luciano Melodia*

Main category: math.AT

Relevance: 5.0

TL;DR: 本文建立了ample群胚Moore同调的两个结构结果：通用系数定理和Mayer-Vietoris长正合序列，为计算Moore同调提供了有效工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究ample群胚的Moore同调计算问题，旨在建立有效的计算工具，理解同调群与系数群之间的关系。

Method: 1. 证明通用系数定理：建立H_n(𝒢;A)与积分Moore同调之间的自然短正合序列
2. 证明Mayer-Vietoris长正合序列：基于单位空间分解，在链水平上构造相应限制群胚的Moore链复形短正合序列

Result: 1. 建立了ample群胚Moore同调的通用系数定理
2. 建立了基于单位空间分解的Mayer-Vietoris长正合序列
3. 解释了系数群离散性对通用系数定理的必要性

Conclusion: 这些结果为计算Moore同调提供了有效的工具，并阐明了系数群离散性在通用系数定理中的关键作用。

Abstract: We establish two structural results for Moore homology of ample groupoids. First, for every ample groupoid $\mathcal{G}$ and every discrete abelian coefficient group $A$, we prove a universal coefficient theorem relating the homology groups $H_n(\mathcal{G};A)$ to the integral Moore homology of $\mathcal{G}$. More precisely, we obtain a natural short exact sequence $$ 0 \longrightarrow H_n(\mathcal{G};\mathbb{Z})\otimes_{\mathbb{Z}} A \xrightarrow{κ_n^{\mathcal{G}}} H_n(\mathcal{G};A) \xrightarrow{ι_n^{\mathcal{G}}} \operatorname{Tor}_1^{\mathbb{Z}}\bigl(H_{n-1}(\mathcal{G};\mathbb{Z}),A\bigr) \longrightarrow 0. $$ Second, for a decomposition of the unit space into clopen saturated subsets, we prove a Mayer-Vietoris long exact sequence in Moore homology. The proof is carried out at the chain level and is based on a short exact sequence of Moore chain complexes associated to the corresponding restricted groupoids. These results provide effective tools for the computation of Moore homology. We also explain why the discreteness of the coefficient group is essential for the universal coefficient theorem.

</details>
